subject: this race will decide control of the Senate

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84hbi_quy4uObMbXNhkfGilrukGg3qYSB0k7NFsoTm-_lGf1X6Or7H7RMLZoHCR3ksDtMQTS-K0WlnrXGQfDsA4gInHO_n7RSjnveA9EiynsMTCQjMTdRSemGjYlAjRIpS4TsCjw0lO2dWPtX4uQi_yi3xH-I33CROhwIsDmqV8yMsuLuP5QwzLQknHhkfmpMfbF5PMW_bvwRiI3wvSAIZPb3gdIpU-ctcSNoWFZfCyBA8WgdP_akd0L9b2cKA8sXuNEfrF0NenxbCmvWYQX-G0MJr451bo6KpIxafnqgjHOpXqqGWjpFv1udigIWWNtecA/3eq/ShqqcY-5TvKZsGoBptDa8w/h0/t2w-rT_hER0AcnqFlpD2QIRajtqdJpNrBVSKbGi2CiA)
Derek,

I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection next year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record.

Here's why: experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority _hinge_ on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.**

**So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:[please, split $25 or more right now – as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – between my campaign and Common Good VA so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84kRqiT87ANYqq0JmUm3Gcz0bj2U6P5kfu7CAPoXAysN1X6JyqfArHIiKK5elaGfgG9FycyBTNKhK0_jvoE_tqe56-TijoEVxzebYHh9Oo79AtSd3kkdDzTrYhUel8Vb3reUQt8feDvTXCNeYIL0FO3JuakAA4lnukAiMm87tk9WNKlFfyl7Q1ojhIdKQPxBp9Ta_HeQKZj-_67zeXgjqwYetCWptS35B82G28yAoLfdFjZ6KICmqsc0D0KWAAD5DbnrlyekhrRm3QCXYxBn6ShgtIEg5VfQN-xpsWTbdvyK5Rg5jdtroLwZ0KFdfghWWd6ch8TOm3DafhtGmHFDLR28/3eq/ShqqcY-5TvKZsGoBptDa8w/h1/VjCmaQwHwdWwhR1F5ylyLvpYiA1Z4Kr-W0JHwmDKkqM)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84kRqiT87ANYqq0JmUm3Gcz0bj2U6P5kfu7CAPoXAysN10DubEMGU1F-n16VxGv712HH2tCyI1lhzAUUVYQjWJdeVq2yjYHcbeah1FsZ4O1bxUTRQv3tyWEZ1EP7Cwx1AXdcsoGWWTSBzf9_I-6uUjaD--J-Eo09mXQabRWyc7N3gGcYy3Gdh-eEgMQ63o_1ejY-Wz3SjSKNoqOg3CNh8cY--CHq0n0NbCMrRIXjNqmMqOXwPW5FWz2Fc0Mvvt3DS6YEVY441KLHyb6SXmrsSuSW-_0wTwfDrd0EnWUnmET4TJyscQGC-ZdNw2s3G5LycSLbWaDrTMVk0Ky0FcYwjeV0/3eq/ShqqcY-5TvKZsGoBptDa8w/h2/Fw3sTdeChwXbZOMJHepx_zl8RIIjd65EKpCrIC7-WM8)

[ Donate other ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84hbi_quy4uObMbXNhkfGilqniwK2uDfc_LSsjl4CIueGx_fmxqCpdgRXBe92GlLP-X5YKbaa4D9e0zKCApsVdR8XBiKxDtvKoKtuwnG-KdOCYBTXplmdsoOL1X3_s2dgIqXJKC5GCyvNN9jALG7KmERQSvudFqzhpOYLDpx-62tASc8Rz-d8wwwtZdcqoEpBL98Ue-xJ7Gm4bVez01FSBDHcjZb30nwZywAAmUj3uyeofzyYTAimPE9b9BdokzesimcfeRS5nvpgmyWd5WhLZJ7JWEXJ6Q15EIwPSeF3uauBjI6ndW4DH-roXWgD8kO_bw/3eq/ShqqcY-5TvKZsGoBptDa8w/h5/PxgRUEafHDgb6_FxzgMVqBzf99klDAFpxZQ9zSP1-k8) ** As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history.

But here's the deal: **with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat.**

That's why we have to fight back _now_ – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn.

**The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, Derek. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late:

[Please, split a donation of $25 or more now between my campaign and Common Good VA – before our crucial midnight deadline – to help us fight back against GOP attacks, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority! ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miM_JJ6uA61gaM_sKscLy84kRqiT87ANYqq0JmUm3Gcz0bj2U6P5kfu7CAPoXAysN1ZoGN9gtuBk5v2kLdN4MU7_MmBKKMHVPlNeJqGexZIGzSy2fulV30540hcu8WaMGfKbwMw0myXXdMPj3SYvaY0AqCOxMNeYj4Jg3Zz1MLguxRdlNqUuMU2eaZ-ZVI3nmlCo_Skx5dt65ohjgFSItLvptfslxP_0N-kU7MGGApbqdOHpfOCmhKLqMwGG3yfWsqn3xmw5TKOqSYbg-F7IuaGfGr0fRrACxwUJItdTIkfeYoH9efumsSHn3DSFGm4I8nzdsSWauGA_Y3kNpKRGxWNRiZThM9Mjmh91Cz9vyny5Y/3eq/ShqqcY-5TvKZsGoBptDa8w/h6/5cxRxBSEZJS4-XTWzxiynFNk75lHByRm5I8e4gBsYG8)**

I appreciate it – thank you so much.

– Raphael Warnock

name: Team AOC
subject: “Asthma Alley”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We cannot and will not allow corporations to continue to pollute and harm our communities.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210823-2369-header&t=1&akid=2369%2E2526796%2EyFtWRe)
A large fossil fuel company — NRG Energy — is attempting to build a fracked gas power plant in the heart of AOC’s district.
Their current power plant is so dirty that the state is forcing it to shut down by 2023. But the company wants to replace it with an option that will continue to pollute our community and climate just the same — instead of with a renewable energy option.
**Before this proposal moves forward, the state is considering public comments this week.** So for the past several months, our organizing team has been knocking on doors, making calls, and tabling throughout the district to educate our neighbors on ways they can make their voices heard against the NRG power plant.
[This is the type of organizing work our campaign invests in outside of elections. If you’re able to, can you make a $3 contribution today to power our work this week fighting for a cleaner, safer future for generations to come? ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210823?refcode=em20210823-2369-P_FND_EGR_ORG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2369_2526796_yFtWRe&akid=2369%2E2526796%2EyFtWRe)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210823?refcode=em20210823-2369-P_FND_EGR_ORG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2369_2526796_yFtWRe&akid=2369%2E2526796%2EyFtWRe)**
Western Queens is already subject to high levels of air pollution from highways and the existing power plant — Astoria has long been known as “Asthma Alley.”
Not only can our climate not bear more fossil fuels, placing more sources of pollution in frontline neighborhoods that already bear the brunt of poor air quality is an environmental injustice. **Your zip code shouldn’t determine your health outcomes.**
This power plant would further poison our community’s air and worsen the climate crisis, but New York’s new Governor, Kathy Hochul, and the Department of Environmental Conservation have the authority to stop this proposal.
[We cannot allow corporations to continue to harm our communities and worsen the climate crisis. If you’re able, can you please chip in $3 or anything you can to power our outreach campaign and organize against fossil-fuel interests?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210823?refcode=em20210823-2369-P_FND_EGR_ORG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2369_2526796_yFtWRe&akid=2369%2E2526796%2EyFtWRe)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210823?refcode=em20210823-2369-P_FND_EGR_ORG&t=23&refcode2=2369_2526796_yFtWRe&akid=2369%2E2526796%2EyFtWRe)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210823-2369-P_FND_EGR_ORG&t=24&akid=2369%2E2526796%2EyFtWRe)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2369%2E2526796%2EyFtWRe) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2369%2E2526796%2EyFtWRe) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2369%2E2526796%2EyFtWRe)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Before this proposal moves forward, the state is considering public comments this week. So for the past several months, our organizing team has been knocking on doors, making calls, and tabling throughout the district to educate our neighbors on ways they can make their voices heard against the NRG power plant. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Twitter and we need your help
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179206:Jl3ZgRlN2:m:1:3253819041:F1FBC5F8CBD83F7CEE206AAB295A69DE:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179206:Jl3ZgRlN2:m:1:3253819041:F1FBC5F8CBD83F7CEE206AAB295A69DE:r)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179206:Jl3ZgRlN2:m:1:3253819041:F1FBC5F8CBD83F7CEE206AAB295A69DE:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179206:Jl3ZgRlN2:m:1:3253819041:F1FBC5F8CBD83F7CEE206AAB295A69DE:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179206:Jl3ZgRlN2:m:1:3253819041:F1FBC5F8CBD83F7CEE206AAB295A69DE:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. _ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179206:Jl3ZgRlN2:m:1:3253819041:F1FBC5F8CBD83F7CEE206AAB295A69DE:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179206:Jl3ZgRlN2:m:1:3253819041:F1FBC5F8CBD83F7CEE206AAB295A69DE:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179206:Jl3ZgRlN2:m:1:3253819041:F1FBC5F8CBD83F7CEE206AAB295A69DE:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we 're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. ** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179206:Jl3ZgRlN2:m:1:3253819041:F1FBC5F8CBD83F7CEE206AAB295A69DE:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179206:Jl3ZgRlN2:m:1:3253819041:F1FBC5F8CBD83F7CEE206AAB295A69DE:r) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179206:Jl3ZgRlN2:m:1:3253819041:F1FBC5F8CBD83F7CEE206AAB295A69DE:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179206:Jl3ZgRlN2:m:1:3253819041:F1FBC5F8CBD83F7CEE206AAB295A69DE:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179206:Jl3ZgRlN2:m:1:3253819041:F1FBC5F8CBD83F7CEE206AAB295A69DE:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179206:Jl3ZgRlN2:m:1:3253819041:F1FBC5F8CBD83F7CEE206AAB295A69DE:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179207:Jl3ZgRlN2:m:1:3253819041:F1FBC5F8CBD83F7CEE206AAB295A69DE:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177
---

name: Catalina Lauf
subject: Tucker & Kinzinger go to WAR
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catalina for Congress |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179229:J4RpQglN4:m:1:3253819041:8354D916B8AD71D2BF09991D996FDD2A:r) | |
---
Peter,

With Afghanistan in shambles and Leftists across America trampling our freedoms, "Republican" Adam Kinzinger decided it was finally time to act.

And he stood up for the people he represents by attacking the biggest threat to America... Tucker Carlson???

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179229:J4RpQglN4:m:1:3253819041:8354D916B8AD71D2BF09991D996FDD2A:r)

_What on EARTH is he thinking?!_

I don't know about you, Peter, but when it's time to choose between Crying Adam Kinzinger and Tucker Carlson, I'm Team Tucker all the way.

**That 's why I'm running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative against Rep. Adam Kinzinger (RINO-IL). It's time to finally get this clown out of office.**

My name is Catalina Lauf. I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants, I'm a former Trump administration official, and unlike too many establishment elites in Washington who have a R by their name, I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican.

**But honestly, what does 'Republican' even mean anymore? Representatives like Adam Kinzinger don't have a _damn clue_.**

Despite using the word over and over again on the campaign trail to get elected in the heartland of Illinois, Kinzinger has been anything BUT a Republican in Washington.

In fact, it seems like Adam is trying harder for a job at CNN than he's trying to work for our party.

He's gone all in with the fake news. _Total Trump Derangement Syndrome._
* _He joined the Democrat witch hunt and voted to IMPEACH President Trump!_
* _He worked with Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney to establish a January 6th commission._
* _He attacks conservative leaders like Jim Jordan, Rand Paul, and Ted Cruz whenever they stand up to the bureaucratic nightmare in Washington._

Here's MY reaction to THAT:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179229:J4RpQglN4:m:1:3253819041:8354D916B8AD71D2BF09991D996FDD2A:r)

Illinois deserves better than a CNN wannabe who throws his constituents and our President under the bus every chance he gets to grandstand on tv.

His dramatic displays are doing the dirty work for Democrats every step of the way - maybe you saw him break down in tears during that CIRCUS of a hearing?

**After that performance, it 's safe to say Adam Kinzinger should be kicked out of Washington and sent straight to Hollywood.**
[**I AGREE: KICK KINZINGER OUT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179229:J4RpQglN4:m:1:3253819041:8354D916B8AD71D2BF09991D996FDD2A:r)
This rogue 'Republican' is making a complete mockery of the voters who elected him to Congress in the first place.

That's why I'm going to primary him. And I'm going to need your help to do it.

**Despite my opponent 's weak-kneed nature, he won't be so simple to beat.** Liberal Democrats and the fake news media don't want Adam Kinzinger to lose. _He 's working for them, after all._

**And while the left rallies for Kinzinger, they 're going to RUN from me. I'm their worst nightmare:**
* I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants
* I'll fight for the America First agenda
* I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican!

That means Kinzinger will be backed by the DNC and the deep-pocketed machine of Never Trump elites in 2022.

If we're going to beat them, I need your support in this fight.

**[> > Donate to our campaign today and JOIN ME in this race. <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179229:J4RpQglN4:m:1:3253819041:8354D916B8AD71D2BF09991D996FDD2A:r)**

Peter, we can't let Rep. Kinzinger and other RINOs across the country continue to masquerade as Republicans while they do nothing to fight the liberal agenda destroying our nation.

Illinoisians need a representative who will fight for America... and I believe I'm that fighter.

As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce. As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need **TERM LIMITS** in Congress. And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda.

**As your member of Congress, I 'll represent our American values in D.C. - not trash them on cable news for 15 minutes of fame.**

I'm in this thing to WIN. Let's stand up and BEAT the globalist, anti-Trump, anti-freedom RINOs in Congress and strengthen our America First agenda together.

[**RUSH A DONATION TO MY CAMPAIGN
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58179229:J4RpQglN4:m:1:3253819041:8354D916B8AD71D2BF09991D996FDD2A:r)
Thank you,
Catalina Lauf

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, AUGUST 24, 2021
PRESIDENT TRUMP PENS ENCOURAGING WORDS TO BURT JONES CAMPAIGN
JACKSON - Today, conservative candidate for Georgia Lieutenant Governor Burt Jones released a signed note from President Trump offering encouraging words for his campaign. As President Trump's campaign Co-Chair in Georgia in both 2016 and 2020 and the first elected official in Georgia to endorse the President, Burt has been fighting for President Trump's America First Agenda like few others.

FIGHT HARD--I WILL SEE YOU SOON!
DONALD TRUMP

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Can I explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34579390/302406633/602283465?refcode=20210824_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzlmMGYyZC1lZDA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlGtqHwXNDX4rYKbEyeh6A3TTbtyZIif4yyiMATtyHM=)
Folks, In a minute, [**I’ll ask you to add a donation — split between my campaign and Seth Moulton —** **to help us reach our campaign’s critical goal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34579391/302406634/602283465?refcode=20210824_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzlmMGYyZC1lZDA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlGtqHwXNDX4rYKbEyeh6A3TTbtyZIif4yyiMATtyHM=). But first, can you give me a moment to explain why your support is so important — especially today? I’m not your typical politician. I was raised by a single mom who worked clerical jobs to make sure we had a roof over our heads and food on the table. I watched my family lose their livelihoods when steel mills closed and jobs got shipped overseas. I grew up with Saturday football games and Sunday family dinners. **I can promise you this: I’ll never forget where I came from or who I’m fighting for.** The single parents who work two jobs just to make ends meet. The tireless Ohioans who shower at the end of a long day. And every single American who works hard and does their part but still can’t seem to get by. Meanwhile, my GOP opponents are laser-focused on stockpiling campaign cash and lining up support from right-wing special interests. They’ll spend MILLIONS to make sure we lose this race, so their wealthy friends can continue to get ahead at the expense of everyday Americans. **That’s why I’m depending on grassroots folks like you to power our campaign. I know we have what it takes to beat the odds and flip this critical Senate seat blue, but only if we put our Ohio grit to work and build a team strong enough to win.** [**We need to raise another $9,000 by tomorrow to stay on track to expand our Democratic Senate Majority and cut workers in on the deal. Can I count on you to chip in $5 to be split between me and Seth Moulton?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34579392/302406635/602283465?refcode=20210824_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzlmMGYyZC1lZDA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlGtqHwXNDX4rYKbEyeh6A3TTbtyZIif4yyiMATtyHM=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34579393/302406636/-1665179247?refcode=20210824_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzlmMGYyZC1lZDA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlGtqHwXNDX4rYKbEyeh6A3TTbtyZIif4yyiMATtyHM=) Thank you for all you do, Tim
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34579394/302406637/-1665179247?refcode=20210824_TR_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzlmMGYyZC1lZDA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlGtqHwXNDX4rYKbEyeh6A3TTbtyZIif4yyiMATtyHM=)
---
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/9b38da7a-dc04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7/f39f0f2d-ed04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzlmMGYyZC1lZDA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlGtqHwXNDX4rYKbEyeh6A3TTbtyZIif4yyiMATtyHM=&id=100807537). | Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress

Federal law requires our best efforts to obtain and report the name, address,occupation, and employer of individual contributors. Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Candace Owens
subject: Black academics are rising up against Critical Race Theory >>
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58180399:J7EP6gltN:m:1:3253819041:81025A4653D87F937E10953C7D0F0095:r)
---
Peter,
---
| It's **_bigger_** than just conservative vs. liberal. This week, a group of **prominent Black academics DEMANDED that school boards nationwide END Critical Race Theory** ... which is hurting our communities and holding back Black kids. **Public schools across America are failing our kids** ... and it's even starker in Black communities: in Baltimore,**2 in 3 middle schoolers have FAILING grades** , and high schoolers are **reading up to _ten grades below_ **where they should be. The far-left would rather **teach Black kids to cast blame** and play victim... to be pawns in their communist culture war... rather than **actually** give us the tools to succeed. That's why BLEXIT is doing the hard work nationwide... **MOBILIZING Black Americans** to **fight back** for our kids, for our communities, and for our nation. We are leading the charge across the nation... **[but we need your help GROWING our movement of Americans who oppose Critical Race Theory to STOP this racist ideology, before it consumes and destroys our nation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58180399:J7EP6gltN:m:1:3253819041:81025A4653D87F937E10953C7D0F0095:r "but we need your help GROWING our movement of Americans who oppose Critical Race Theory to

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: You are key to securing our Democratic majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Grassroots supporters like you are integral to ensure the Democrats keep the Senate majority and continue to fight for our rights.
#
Team,
This is a very challenging time for us all -- and on top of it all, our Democratic majority is at risk.
Grassroots supporters like you are integral to ensure the Democrats keep the Senate majority and continue to fight for our rights.
Not only did Democrats lead the effort for the bipartisan infrastructure package, we voted for a budget that will invest in hard working families in Nevada and across the country.
But the GOP want to take back the Senate in 2022. We can’t let that happen. **So I’m setting a mid-month fundraising goal and I need your support to get there by August 25:**
**[Will you contribute $5 or more to help reach our $12,500 mid-month fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34580228/302409794/1237282793?refcode=jr_em_nd_210824_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTI3MWUxMy1lZjA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s2swZrwarHhaHvGKj-7AUlSQM3JhAruIKFJWaQ0a3L8=)**

Jacky

name: Gwen Moore
subject: Trump’s sheep will NOT stand in our way
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
"My dear friends: Your vote is precious, almost sacred. It is the most powerful nonviolent tool we have to create a more perfect union." -Rep. John Lewis

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/qpvZyY8A2LPy47aEGrEKyk5fJsVDboP4cwGE5DW0KWE=/BHPUTHbIjeUsNKS78oNUF81Qf3jhe6aKRtmTU7RLfVY=)

My Sisters and Brothers, you already know that our voting rights are under vicious GOP attacks - mainly aimed at restricting Black Americans from exercising our power at the ballot box. Just look at all the restrictive bills passed by Republican-led state legislatures since November 2020.

**Say it with me, "The Trump-sheep GOP will NOT stand in our way of creating a more perfect union for all Americans!" **

Today, Congress is likely taking a major step in shutting these racist attacks down by voting on the John Lewis Voting Rights Act! Voting = power and power is the people. If we don't keep our narrow Democratic majority in the House, we run the risk of having our voices silenced.

[**I need to show my colleagues that Gwen Nation overwhelmingly supports passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. You can help me do this by adding your name now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/qpvZyY8A2LPy47aEGrEKyk5fJsVDboP4cwGE5DW0KWE=/BHPUTHbIjeUsNKS78oNUF81Qf3jhe6aKRtmTU7RLfVY=)

We can do this!

Together, #WeRepresent

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/qpvZyY8A2LPy47aEGrEKyk5fJsVDboP4cwGE5DW0KWE=/CANzty5_fucljrMqPwxbLre7fFEA5TZ79dW1owwc0Ic=?refcode=082021)
Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District
Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice
Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/qpvZyY8A2LPy47aEGrEKyk5fJsVDboP4cwGE5DW0KWE=/CANzty5_fucljrMqPwxbLre7fFEA5TZ79dW1owwc0Ic=?refcode=0823e)

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: this is an honest email about our fundraising for this month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I cannot afford to self-fund my campaign
#

Friend,
Our campaign is built on honesty and transparency — and I want to give you an honest update on our fundraising so far this month.
Truthfully, this month has been pretty slow. Even more than we expected.
[So I'm humbly asking you to pitch in your first contribution before we close the books on August. Can I explain why?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34580615/302411362/-353695395?refcode2=bd79965c-f004-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210824-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDc5OTY1Yy1mMDA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2PFYW9vfPPkjTE6HN9HXbINJDILjcGchgPsb9wNBPpQ=)
Elections shouldn’t be decided by which candidate raises the most money.
They should be decided by the people, based on their values and priorities.
But the reality is, it’s going to take a huge amount of resources to stay competitive in this race.
Unlike some of our opponents, I cannot afford to self-fund my campaign. I don't have millions of dollars to pour into this race.
In fact, I had to get my first job washing dishes at age 12 just so we could keep the lights on in my house.
And I refuse to take a dime from corporate PACs. Because I'm running to fight for working families like yours and mine — not CEOs and special interests.
That means our campaign is funded by lots of working people giving small amounts of money. Each donation comes from a real person and is an investment in our fight for equality and justice for all.
**And one week from now, our campaign faces the huge challenge of meeting our August fundraising goal. So, I need to come out and ask you directly:**
[Can you make your first donation to our campaign today? We need to bring in 1,000 more online donations by our deadline next week, and every contribution, no matter the size, goes a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34580616/302411363/-353695395?refcode2=bd79965c-f004-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210824-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDc5OTY1Yy1mMDA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2PFYW9vfPPkjTE6HN9HXbINJDILjcGchgPsb9wNBPpQ=)
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
**[Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34580619/302411366/-353695395?refcode2=bd79965c-f004-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=em210824-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDc5OTY1Yy1mMDA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2PFYW9vfPPkjTE6HN9HXbINJDILjcGchgPsb9wNBPpQ=)** **[Donate **[Donate $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34580624/302411371/-353695395?refcode2=bd79965c-f004-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&amount=50&express_lane=true&refcode=em210824-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDc5OTY1Yy1mMDA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2PFYW9vfPPkjTE6HN9HXbINJDILjcGchgPsb9wNBPpQ=)** **[Donate $100](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34580627/302411374/-353695395?refcode2=bd79965c-f004-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&amount=100&express_lane=true&refcode=em210824-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDc5OTY1Yy1mMDA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2PFYW9vfPPkjTE6HN9HXbINJDILjcGchgPsb9wNBPpQ=)** **[Donate other amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34580630/302411377/-353695395?refcode2=bd79965c-f004-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210824-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDc5OTY1Yy1mMDA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2PFYW9vfPPkjTE6HN9HXbINJDILjcGchgPsb9wNBPpQ=)**
I know it can be hard to imagine that what we do today will make such a big impact in an election months away, but it’s true. And that’s why your contribution is so important.
With your support, I know we’ll have what it takes to win this race and take our fight for working families all the way to the United States Senate. Thanks in advance for chipping in.
\- Malcolm

name: Jim Renacci for Governor
subject: FWD: I’m sending you a FREE sign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Renacci for Ohio

name: Team WisGOP
subject: One year ago
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
Friend,

Today is the one-year anniversary of the violent riots that turned Kenosha upside down. We wanted to make sure you saw our [**_statement_**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58676301:skE6sedNB:m:1:2068296031:CF0BB0C3F0B4589AF37F7E5C5F78A57D:r) from our new chairman, Paul Farrow:

"Our thoughts are with the people of Kenosha as they continue to heal following the destruction that devastated their community one year ago. Violence is never the answer, and destruction and lawlessness are never acceptable forms of protest.

"Kenosha needed leadership with a steady hand to keep the community safe. Unfortunately, Tony Evers refused federal help, played politics, and fanned the flames of violence at Kenoshans' expense.

"The rioting and mob violence that occurred in Kenosha one year ago has no place in Wisconsin. This anniversary serves as a reminder of the need to elect strong, steady leaders who put people first -- and that should start with ousting Tony Evers so that he cannot put public safety at risk for four more years."
Over the course of several nights of violence, [_over 100_](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58676302:skE6sedNB:m:1:2068296031:CF0BB0C3F0B4589AF37F7E5C5F78A57D:r) local businesses fell prey to the violent rioters who brought over [_$50 million_](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58676303:skE6sedNB:m:1:2068296031:CF0BB0C3F0B4589AF37F7E5C5F78A57D:r) in damage to the community. The community still feels the aftermath, as city blocks that were formerly home to vibrant family businesses now lay in [_rubble_](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58676304:skE6sedNB:m:1:2068296031:CF0BB0C3F0B4589AF37F7E5C5F78A57D:r).

Tony Evers' failure to protect the community was a tragedy, and we are making it our mission to ensure that Wisconsinites hear the truth about what happened in Kenosha one year ago. If you would like to join us, you can sign up to volunteer at the link [**_here_**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58676305:skE6sedNB:m:1:2068296031:CF0BB0C3F0B4589AF37F7E5C5F78A57D:r) or find an event near you [_**here**_](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58676306:skE6sedNB:m:1:2068296031:CF0BB0C3F0B4589AF37F7E5C5F78A57D:r).
Thank you,
Team WisGOP
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system May 22, 2018.
For more information [click here](http://email.granitelists.com/p/iskE6sedNB). [Update your preferences](http://email.granitelists.com/p/oskE6sedNB)
[Unsubscribe](http://email.granitelists.com/p/oskE6sedNB) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-66238081676-echo3-E564947ECE868D822ACD071FC8BB5E32@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)
This email was sent by: The Republican Party of Wisconsin, PO Box 628250, Middleton, WI 53562.
PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN

subject: Tony is the only thing that stopped the GOP’svoter suppression bills from becoming law:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
This isn’t long, but it's really important (please read) | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miF00QrhcMYF7mAe3GjdFgiwW93IHF5eYlmTEYfPkUEaaIMcKk-5a8kx9sDDidCkJR22JZ4vR5yDaY8fKDf9yx47UGI3ZQiMUL0Yf4G3FjJteO7ez2Q_hxR8A_8yQojVAHL8GzctLYn8QZF5DXvtC7L4c9o3ks-kIxcz9VcaOnk6UhETcf7E6OAQXpC7xfD_DKhlqz38YGovruQaYn3QD3AmJmYJBaEmpjjNMSpLGqjjErmYrfWxWfmYpBZzoDbnfIFusMs-O8LE_7b0MYMPjAbNo4DYvs4wl2RV7tzQVqyctj1xuU5tMybMjTdSI9TxpIfxxVLRVJMRdicQZyp1OinzMmNKFGDhdJo1BKxdX_5B2uQ4BwmRR5O3kcYRcOoyM_/3eq/WaTUbtF0QeiG-DrkQkyohw/h0/N3TB6KKcH__WH8YODx3NWFBi1w_JL26Z1MYlBs7UuVE)
FIRST: The Wisconsin Legislature introduced anti-Democratic legislation designed to score a win for Trump’s “big lie” right here in Wisconsin.

THEN: They passed the bill and made their plan clear: they hope to defeat Tony and lock in their power by taking away the right to vote from as many people as possible.

NOW: As governor, Tony used his veto pen to stop this anti-Democratic legislation from becoming law.

Here is the thing: now that Tony is up for re-election, he needs your help to ensure he will always be a roadblock to any anti-voter legislation the GOP tries to pass into law.

clean_body: This isn’t long, but it's really important (please read) | | | FIRST: The Wisconsin Legislature introduced anti-Democratic legislation designed to score a win for Trump’s “big lie” right here in Wisconsin. THEN: They passed the bill and made their plan clear: they hope to defeat Tony and lock in their power by taking away the right to vote from as many people as possible. NOW: As governor, Tony used his veto pen to stop this anti-Democratic legislation from becoming law. Here is the thing: now that Tony is up for re-election, he needs your help to ensure he will always be a roadblock to any anti-voter legislation the GOP tries to pass into law. Thanks for all you do, Tony Evers for WI Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Kat Cammack
subject: Video: Our people deserve better leaders
body:
The Biden administration is doing everything they can to spin the violence in Kabul.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001axbUeEamZTj-9ZYdpbhmpZ6a91Ydg6ztMrUb0uaXJrQtKNtP0TexlR-nPZwpFAwsWnyvtVU8ryrRkhq11N38Z8wJH6-s_xlbS9tNBFdyYGxvRPCGg49JVX56GqpwDCWAuiYSF90Bq7ecfxgvDY24eZ8-l02hMpp9jAD2kDoU3En1PqPZ0nNeMVnfbZxFofJ_L_i32fSR64U=&c=lzn-rIGWRsfdUH1_n7Sd8wiGY6ltfDnMiahcNhStmTszVSOvcfZJLA==&ch=wA-Mp_4p4ohzE0BWARtGc5OD6iFBq7Yc7ZDzM-FiPfO1gssCHVwPOw==)
---
| Friend,

The Biden administration is doing everything they can to spin the violence in Kabul. Nancy Pelosi saying, "everything sounds like it's in a good place; everyone just needs to get to the airport" is unbelievable! The flip-flopping and sidesteps don't change the fact hundreds of Americans are trapped in the mess Biden left behind.

| Are leaders who try to blame everyone else for their own mistakes fit to lead America?
Our people deserve leaders that are prepared during a withdrawal of our forces; not leaders that vacation back to Camp David during times of international crisis. | | Derek, Maya Angelou famously said, “when someone shows you who they are, believe them the first time.” In an undercover video last month, Glenn Youngkin showed us exactly who he is. In the video, Youngkin told a young woman he won’t talk publicly about his extreme anti-abortion stance because he doesn’t want to scare independent voters. Derek, Youngkin’s admission should terrify women who care about making their own health care decisions and doing what’s best for their families. If Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he will ban abortion and defund Planned Parenthood. Virginia families are counting on us to stop that from happening. With a conservative super-majority on the Supreme Court, it’s more important than ever for governors to be staunch defenders of the right to reproductive health care.
Derek, that’s exactly who Terry McAuliffe will be.
As Governor, Terry stood as a brick wall as extreme Republicans repeatedly tried to pass bills to restrict abortion rights and defund Planned Parenthood.
With a conservative Supreme Court poised to strike down _Roe v. Wade_ , the Governor is the last line of defense against attacks on abortion rights.
We absolutely can't let Glenn Youngkin be that person.
[**Please, chip in anything you can afford right now and do your part to stop Glenn Youngkin.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34583794/302424660/1097049879?refcode=20210824.2_CR_8DE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTJlNTI4ZC1mODA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cDqYUvKWTlEs06Vl-gmt_iPnsgiSIpbtIlEMmCj0nDg=)
Thanks in advance,
Cecile Richards

name: Aaron
subject: bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hey, it’s Maggie’s campaign manager. This is a longer email, but I wanted to keep you in the loop about the uphill battle to keep our Senate majority. We’ve developed a strategic roadmap to reelect Senator Hassan and keep control of the Senate -- and I’ll go more into that in a second -- but first, I have to ask: **[can you chip in $5 today? Our August fundraising has been really slow, and I’m worried about falling behind.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34583931/302425421/565612021?refcode=e20210824-aj-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDA4ODE2My1mOTA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iE5Z79WMI9HfJO0eplUDLNtsyefk4cWFy0StRV5ZdQ4=)** | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34583932/302425422/565612021?refcode=e20210824-aj-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDA4ODE2My1mOTA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iE5Z79WMI9HfJO0eplUDLNtsyefk4cWFy0StRV5ZdQ4=)
---
Maggie’s race in 2016 _shattered_ New Hampshire spending records, and it was a tough fight to the very last second. **When the dust settled, she won by only 1,017 votes:_one of the closest Senate races in history._**
In a state this close, we knew from day one that it would be a marathon, not a sprint, to hold this seat. So we’ve gotten to work earlier than ever before to get staff on the ground, reach every Granite Stater, and build a winning campaign.
That means that we check our numbers monthly, weekly, and even daily to make sure we’re on track to hit every goal we set. Every dollar and deadline plays a crucial role in our long term strategy.
August is typically a slower month for fundraising, but Republicans are picking up the pace. Two McConnell-linked super PACs announced huge ad buys attacking Maggie. Mike Pence, Betsy DeVos, and the Trump network have been descending on New Hampshire all summer. **And a recent poll from WMUR shows Senator Hassan down by one point.**
There’s still time to correct the course and get back on track before the end of the month, but it’s not going to be easy. With our Democratic majority on the line and the race in New Hampshire quickly picking up speed, it’s not hyperbole to say that missing this deadline could cost us the Senate.
**[I could really use your help, folks. clean_body: | | | Hey, it’s Maggie’s campaign manager. This is a longer email, but I wanted to keep you in the loop about the uphill battle to keep our Senate majority. We’ve developed a strategic roadmap to reelect Senator Hassan and keep control of the Senate -- and I’ll go more into that in a second -- but first, I have to ask: = | | = Maggie’s race in 2016 shattered New Hampshire spending records, and it was a tough fight to the very last second. When the dust settled, she won by only 1,017 votes:one of the closest Senate races in history. In a state this close, we knew from day one that it would be a marathon, not a sprint, to hold this seat. So we’ve gotten to work earlier than ever before to get staff on the ground, reach every Granite Stater, and build a winning campaign. That means that we check our numbers monthly, weekly, and even daily to make sure we’re on track to hit every goal we set. Every dollar and deadline plays a crucial role in our long term strategy. August is typically a slower month for fundraising, but Republicans are picking up the pace. Two McConnell-linked super PACs announced huge ad buys attacking Maggie. Mike Pence, Betsy DeVos, and the Trump network have been descending on New Hampshire all summer. And a recent poll from WMUR shows Senator Hassan down by one point. There’s still time to correct the course and get back on track before the end of the month, but it’s not going to be easy. With our Democratic majority on the line and the race in New Hampshire quickly picking up speed, it’s not hyperbole to say that missing this deadline could cost us the Senate. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = Thank you for your support. Senator Hassan and I are grateful to have you on our team. Aaron Jacobs Campaign Manager Maggie for NH | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. It’s become abundantly clear that there is only one way to protect voting rights and stop partisan gerrymandering before the 2022 elections: the Democratic majority must come together, throw out the filibuster and pass the For the People Act.
[**_NextGen will continue fighting alongside the Democratic majority to enact federal voting rights protections. name: Jay Jones
subject: Friend, can I introduce you to Martha?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Jay Jones
body:
| | | **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/bHbt9DhHzGuDHygp6BPO6lUDOtwpSahIiLIMfmeuVTU=/kRJS41SPapICcE24b2ajy5DHXdDdA5TNS3fYtnrzYrA=)**
---
Friend -- My friend, Martha Mugler's re-election may hold the key to Democrats' majority in the House of Delegates. Martha has spent her summer in the 91st District, knocking doors, raising money, and has just received the results from an in-depth poll. This race is close! In fact, over the past six months, [**Martha Mugler 's campaign for re-election has quickly become one of the most competitive races in the entire Commonwealth of Virginia.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bHbt9DhHzGuDHygp6BPO6lUDOtwpSahIiLIMfmeuVTU=/rEWTtih456-GIqme08mxjg-xHexpHpAgNwHfRrpFNFc=) The Republican State Leadership Caucus has targeted Mugler's race and are investing heavily in the opportunity to flip this seat. Martha is running against a Republican candidate named A.C. Cordoza who launched his campaign based on two issues: turning Hampton into a "2nd Amendment Sanctuary City" and attacking Martha. **Martha 's opponent has decided to start his campaign by attacking her stances on education with bold face lies.** Martha is running for re-election to serve Virginians and their families -- and fight for the issues that matter -- from fully funding our schools and protecting our kids as they return to full-time in-person instruction to supporting our economy and helping our small businesses recover from the COVID recession. But she can't do it alone -- and once again I need to ask you for your support. [**Can I count on you to contribute to Martha's re-election campaign today to ensure she has the resources to win on November 2nd?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bHbt9DhHzGuDHygp6BPO6lUDOtwpSahIiLIMfmeuVTU=/rEWTtih456-GIqme08mxjg-xHexpHpAgNwHfRrpFNFc=) **[Chip in $10 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/bHbt9DhHzGuDHygp6BPO6lUDOtwpSahIiLIMfmeuVTU=/rEWTtih456-GIqme08mxjg-xHexpHpAgNwHfRrpFNFc=?amount=10)** **[Chip in $25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/bHbt9DhHzGuDHygp6BPO6lUDOtwpSahIiLIMfmeuVTU=/sef_F8AO8STSTKlf3L1R7HcJ85kDuypCXzIkCEyPfiI=?amount=25)** **[Chip in $50 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/bHbt9DhHzGuDHygp6BPO6lUDOtwpSahIiLIMfmeuVTU=/sef_F8AO8STSTKlf3L1R7HcJ85kDuypCXzIkCEyPfiI=?amount=50)** **[Chip in $100 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/bHbt9DhHzGuDHygp6BPO6lUDOtwpSahIiLIMfmeuVTU=/sef_F8AO8STSTKlf3L1R7HcJ85kDuypCXzIkCEyPfiI=?amount=100)** [**Chip in $500!? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bHbt9DhHzGuDHygp6BPO6lUDOtwpSahIiLIMfmeuVTU=/sef_F8AO8STSTKlf3L1R7HcJ85kDuypCXzIkCEyPfiI=?amount=500) Martha needs to raise another $7,000 by the end of August to fully keep up her momentum and properly communicate with early voters. I remain very confident that Martha will win by focusing on the issues that matter to hard-working Virginians, and I hope I can count on your support. Thank you for being an ally and a friend, Jay

name: Ivan Garcia
subject: Now or Never – 7 Days till Election Day!
body:
Hi there community,

It is with immense anticipation that we await Election Day, now exactly**one week away** on August 31st. There is still so much to do, and we are at our final push to do everything we can to ensure Mia Bonta's place in Sacramento! Whether you've been out with us every week or this will be your first time, it's now or never, so join in on the action of these final days.

Sign up to canvass and help us get those last votes! Below are our upcoming time slots, but [click here](https://www.mobilize.us/miabontaforassembly2021/event/408764/) for the final schedule of our last four days (8/28-8/31) and full event details.
* [**Thursday + Friday, Canvass @ 9am, 12pm, and 3pm**](https://www.mobilize.us/miabontaforassembly2021/event/405212/)
* [**Saturday + Sunday, Canvass @ 9:30am**](https://www.mobilize.us/miabontaforassembly2021/event/408764/)
* **[Monday, Canvass @ 9:30am, 1:30pm, 3:30pm](https://www.mobilize.us/miabontaforassembly2021/event/408764/)**
* **[ELECTION DAY, Canvass @ 9:30am, 1:30pm, 3:30pm](https://www.mobilize.us/miabontaforassembly2021/event/408764/)**

As always, we also have phone banking available! We will be calling up to the last hour. See the [**full list of our upcoming phone banking club shifts here**](https://www.mobilize.us/miabontaforassembly2021/event/405218/) or email [volunteer@miabonta.com](mailto:volunteer@miabonta.com) to make calls throughout the day.

Last but not least, **THANK YOU** for helping us get this far. We are closer than ever, and victory is in sight! Let's do this, #teamMia!

_*And don 't forget to share this email with a friend – we need all hands on deck!*_

With gratitude,
Ivan
\--

**Ivan Garcia** _(he/him)_
Oakland Field Organizer
C: (510) 695-1911

name: Team Ortt
subject: Rob Ortt joins Maria Bartiromo on FOX Business
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
Senator Ortt joined "Mornings with Maria" to discuss Andrew Cuomo's disgraceful exit and the challenges awaiting our new governor.
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
Dear Friend,
Today, Kathy Hochul was sworn in as New York's first female governor, replacing the scandal-plagued Andrew Cuomo.
We wanted to share a clip from this morning where Senate Republican Leader Robert Ortt joined Maria Bartiromo on FOX Business's "Mornings with Maria" to discuss Andrew Cuomo's disgraceful exit and the challenges awaiting our new Governor, Kathy Hochul.
[You can watch the full interview HERE. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EencVhLv87MUkAo0TBL_q3nwANXRZ-OBG80NE0X5qqTjRm_EN-JhtrC4lGePPz7u4qp21ahOcvkwfpOtJGFDdHtIk-xEfZm_WOPfnPMZ6ZA07O-le0ovanqjZYm3EZybWbKx0W1wPXKCFwEOlmCEy5VFoukuZ2OJHqkvzWZxv2yApt0JSLPNaQ==&c=kIMwggx9QzuSMw12m_MEy7U4E0ewpxkSHwJdX5yjNAQ6PxnQQxSW3g==&ch=Gv0XJHameoefZvPemuj6FRGVSR3WGL1Qlbi0tkFDZtl5-OKHkj55Qg==)
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EencVhLv87MUkAo0TBL_q3nwANXRZ-OBG80NE0X5qqTjRm_EN-JhtrC4lGePPz7u4qp21ahOcvkwfpOtJGFDdHtIk-xEfZm_WOPfnPMZ6ZA07O-le0ovanqjZYm3EZybWbKx0W1wPXKCFwEOlmCEy5VFoukuZ2OJHqkvzWZxv2yApt0JSLPNaQ==&c=kIMwggx9QzuSMw12m_MEy7U4E0ewpxkSHwJdX5yjNAQ6PxnQQxSW3g==&ch=Gv0XJHameoefZvPemuj6FRGVSR3WGL1Qlbi0tkFDZtl5-OKHkj55Qg==)
---
\- Team Ortt
---
| |
---
| STATEMENT FROM ROB ORTT ON KATHY HOCHUL'S SWEARING-IN
Congratulations to our new Governor and Western New York native Kathy Hochul on her inauguration as New York's 57th Governor, and the first female to hold the office in state history. I am looking forward to working with this new administration to try to improve the lives of New Yorkers all across the state.
Governor Hochul takes office in the face of many challenges. It is my hope that she will work with elected leaders in both parties to address pressing issues like the pandemic, rising crime, continued outmigration and other threats to the future of our state. Saving our state will require input from across the political spectrum, not just the most radical voices from one region of our state.
###
---

clean_body: Senator Ortt joined "Mornings with Maria" to discuss Andrew Cuomo's disgraceful exit and the challenges awaiting our new governor. | | | | | | | Dear Friend, Today, Kathy Hochul was sworn in as New York's first female governor, replacing the scandal-plagued Andrew Cuomo. We wanted to share a clip from this morning where Senate Republican Leader Robert Ortt joined Maria Bartiromo on FOX Business's "Mornings with Maria" to discuss Andrew Cuomo's disgraceful exit and the challenges awaiting our new Governor, Kathy Hochul. == == \- Team Ortt | | | STATEMENT FROM ROB ORTT ON KATHY HOCHUL'S SWEARING-IN Congratulations to our new Governor and Western New York native Kathy Hochul on her inauguration as New York's 57th Governor, and the first female to hold the office in state history. I am looking forward to working with this new administration to try to improve the lives of New Yorkers all across the state. Governor Hochul takes office in the face of many challenges. It is my hope that she will work with elected leaders in both parties to address pressing issues like the pandemic, rising crime, continued outmigration and other threats to the future of our state. Saving our state will require input from across the political spectrum, not just the most radical voices from one region of our state. | | | | == | == | | | | SENATE REPUBLICAN LEADER ROB ORTT == | == == | PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:info@robortt.com powered by

name: Heidi St. John for Congress
subject: Will I see you at the Freedom Rally on August 25th?
body:
| | | | |
---
| Hey Friends!
Bring your signs, wear your Heidi St. John for Congress t-shirt, and meet us at Felida Park (3798 NW 122nd St, Vancouver, WA 98685) on Wednesday night to let everyone know you stand for Freedom!
Signs should be clear and easy to read:

* "Unmask Our Children"
* "Medical Freedom"
* "Parental Rights"

Speakers include: Suzanne Gallagher - Founder, Parent's Rights in Education (PIRE) Rey Reynolds - Candidate for Clark County Sheriff Jim Walsh-State Rep 19th LD Jennifer Heine-Withee-WA PRIE Melanie Gabriel- Vancouver High School Student Madelene Denny- Lower Columbia College Graduate John Nicholson- Toutle Lake High School Graduate
We'll have a free notary for Medical/Religious Exemption forms, so be sure to bring a valid driver's license.
Let your friends and neighbors know about the event.
We look forward to seeing you there!
---
|

_**Silencing dissenting viewpoints...**_

name: MS GOP
subject: Leave no man behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mississippi Republican Party
body:
It’s the most basic principle, but Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have ignored it and are leaving Americans and our allies in the hands of the Taliban. | |
---
Fellow Republican,
Leave no man behind. It’s the most basic principle, but Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have ignored it and are leaving Americans and our allies in the hands of the Taliban.

[_BUSINESS INSIDER: US Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin contradicts Biden, says Americans are being assaulted by the Taliban in Kabu_ l](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=d1b38985c07446278ae241f871c0d96d&_e=wESmRzr_fREKUZGA8XLZyKXHjHuz1ESS61SRzfZbqQUB4DYdoCXKK8OTX8W-tbmGVxIY8sdtay-AjqQtIk54xo43PGX0HLkuAtNCH8j9-COl9NOm6AvHEh0e0yhRPP3WaXRXpGIJ51TH2GKo0nIvY7TiaiYmOWuQfS3AZZuRXDC7KANDiJXia3U0VrA9Hw-tX0MLSd1PV_nULpJ7dZo9R_DlHUPl7uh_W6umGGJMOuanjJXixgha1Cdc0nZKGcdm0dLsrYRUYU5ozejDGYwTWgoxEZVrG2G6G_1Sr14gwak_MVSry--7KEqH6lycqdjedAUZb5TuiibZap7TLaaFfRnyuOSbMfLaO6Y70wvFmS7bLtwv7QhZqAmwvtAtjmpMs1zpte4YTkyAZhNE7VMfXmSZJV8V-X9e6M2Zd4mAtFtoVM1dZ0L69ljINsJi96o8q-mtxE0PC49bVrIxUZcdBw%3D%3D)

_[THE NEW YORK TIMES: How many Americans are waiting to leave Afghanistan? clean_body: It’s the most basic principle, but Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have ignored it and are leaving Americans and our allies in the hands of the Taliban. | | Fellow Republican, Leave no man behind. It’s the most basic principle, but Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have ignored it and are leaving Americans and our allies in the hands of the Taliban. The Biden Administration has a good idea of how many American weapons it left behind for the Taliban, but not how many Americans it abandoned to them. This is not okay. This is not who America is. The world is watching. Will you help us ensure Mississippians are represented by elected officials who say No! and who stand up for our nation? name: Erica Smith
subject: Tell President Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Student debt should be cancelled in America, every last dollar of it.
#
I will always speak out unapologetically and boldly for what I believe in. So let me be clear when I say the following:
**Student loan debt should be CANCELLED in America — _every last dollar of it!_**
[**_If you’re with me, will you add your name to my latest petition demanding that the White House act swiftly to cancel student loan debt now?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/cancel-student-debt/?refcode=em20210824-373&t=1&akid=373%2E3698%2EKonaxu)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/cancel-student-debt/?refcode=em20210824-373&t=2&akid=373%2E3698%2EKonaxu)**
Here’s how I see it: A higher education should NOT be a condemnation to a lifetime of debt.
**Especially not when there are concrete steps that the White House could take _right now_ to cancel student debt for millions of Americans.**
The current predatory system perpetuates inequality, with a disproportionate impact on Black and brown students. Society demands that young people get a college education in order to have a fighting chance in our rigged economy — then condemns them to a lifetime of debt!
From rural North Carolina to cities like Durham, the American people want to see student debt canceled. They know that a government that can afford to bail out Wall Street can ALSO bail out Americans getting crushed by student debt.
President Biden rightfully prides himself on his working class background. **Now the White House is in the perfect position to deliver the biggest stimulus for working people in American history by cancelling all student loan debt** — _and they could do it just with the stroke of a pen!_
Together, we can put pressure on the White House to keep their promises and cancel student debt. We can't let up now.
[**_Add your name: Tell the White House to follow through and cancel student loan debt for millions of Americans._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/cancel-student-debt/?refcode=em20210824-373&t=3&akid=373%2E3698%2EKonaxu)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.ericaforus.com/sign/cancel-student-debt/?refcode=em20210824-373&t=4&akid=373%2E3698%2EKonaxu)**
In solidarity,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210824-373-footer&t=5&refcode2=373_3698_Konaxu&akid=373%2E3698%2EKonaxu)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=6&akid=373%2E3698%2EKonaxu)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=373%2E3698%2EKonaxu)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Kevin Cate
subject: Memo: How Nikki Fried Wins the Florida Primary by Double Digits
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Memo: How Nikki Fried Wins the Florida Primary by Double Digits

One year from now, Nikki Fried will be the Democratic Nominee for Florida Governor, by double digits.

Here’s why.

Let’s start with the obvious. Democrats want to win. It’s literally the most important attribute when you poll primary voters — and Nikki Fried is the only statewide Democrat to win Florida since 2012.

MCI Maps. The 2018 Election of Nikki Fried. [https://mcimaps.substack.com/p/issue-1-the-2018-election-of-nikki]

If delivered correctly, that messaging alone ends this primary.

But let’s dig deeper. Let’s talk about voter intensity and excitement — the most important way to measure the primary right now.

By every measure — even with a lower name ID and one year out — Nikki Fried is dominating.

Since launching, Nikki has earned 135 million impressions on Twitter [https://twitter.com/NikkiFried] . On Google, despite having a former Governor in the primary (which gets lots of academic
searching), over the last 90 days, Nikki Fried has doubled the Google search traffic [https://trends.google.com/trends/explore?date=today%203-m&geo=US-FL&q=Nikki%20Fried,Charlie%20Crist&hl=en-US&tz=240] of her primary opponent and leads every single market in the state.

It’s similarly lopsided on other mediums.

And all of this is organic.

And then there is polling. While nobody would expect Nikki to be up on a former governor with nearly universal name ID, we’ve already seen a PPP (A- pollster) poll doing just that [https://floridapolitics.com/archives/449843-poll-shows-nikki-fried-leading-charlie-crist-in-democratic-primary-for-governor/] . And we know that in Florida, primary voters have a tendency to not look back when that happens ( see the eerily similar 2010 GOP Senate Primary [https://www.orlandosentinel.com/news/os-xpm-2010-03-26-os-rubio-crist-florida-senate-poll-story.html] ). So expect a few more months of bouncing, and then a clear trajectory.

We’ve also seen multiple polls with Nikki leading Ron DeSantis among NPA voters. And just yesterday, August 23, 2021, one showing her leading. [http://thelistenergroup.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/Rubio-Winning-DeSantis-is-Losing.pdf]

So we know, DeSantis is far from a lock.

Finally, on money, Nikki again shocks and outperforms conventional wisdom. Even with a one month disadvantage, Nikki has 2,504 more donors than her primary opponent — a lead expected to only grow.

Now let’s talk about an actual primary campaign.

You’ve got the only statewide elected Democrat since 2012 vs. a former Republican Governor now Democratic Congressman. I don’t need or want to say more about this because I like Charlie and think Democrats would be well served if he stayed in his highly competitive swing congressional seat. But if this race is still competitive next year, it doesn’t take a political genius to understand how that scenario turns out. [https://fivethirtyeight.com/features/the-governor-and-house-primary-races-were-watching-so-far/]

“Fried could be more in line with the current zeitgeist of the party. Crist is an older white guy and, as a veteran of state politics, represents the party’s past. Fried, by contrast, is a younger woman who has already demonstrated a knack for online media” — 538, Nathaniel Rakich

So, that was why. Let’s talk about how.

You.

We need Democrats and NPAs to rally behind Nikki now — financially and field — because we can’t wait to start Nikki’s general election campaign until after she wins the primary. That’s how we lose the general.

We know DeSantis will have $150 million. And we expect that money to start being flooded on TV, digital, and field early next year. Literally, our only path to victory includes holding and expanding how Nikki won in 2018. [https://mcimaps.substack.com/p/issue-1-the-2018-election-of-nikki]

And that has to start now.

So, one year out, the real question is not who’s going to win the Democratic primary for Governor of Florida, it’s what are we doing to win the general?

I hope, for Florida’s sake, you’re not waiting to help Nikki until after she wins the primary by double digits.

Here is the link to donate. Help fund the winning primary campaign so we can start working on the most important thing— beating Ron DeSantis. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-1-year?refcode=kevin]

Thanks for reading. Let's do this.

Kevin Cate
Senior Advisor

Miami, FL 33143
United States

Let’s start with the obvious. Democrats want to win. It’s similarly lopsided on other mediums. And all of this is organic. And then there is polling. While nobody would expect Nikki to be up on a former governor with nearly universal name ID, we’ve already seen a PPP (A- pollster) poll doing just that [] . And we know that in Florida, primary voters have a tendency to not look back when that happens ( see the eerily similar 2010 GOP Senate Primary [] ). So expect a few more months of bouncing, and then a clear trajectory. We’ve also seen multiple polls with Nikki leading Ron DeSantis among NPA voters. name: Peter Franchot
subject: Statewide 5G for Maryland
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
If Maryland is going to attract the best American technology companies and entrepreneurs, and take the lead in high tech industries like biotechnology and cybersecurity, then we must be able to provide access to world class technology infrastructure. That’s why if I’m blessed to be your next Governor, I’m going to make sure that Maryland achieves statewide 5G connectivity and high-speed broadband access by the end of my first term.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/SSZ4-HRaJUWAcDlsrPTUHA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/SSZ4-HRaJUWAcDlsrPTUHA2]Beyond creating a competitive economic advantage for our state, this is also a matter of economic justice for many of our working families who have been frozen out of opportunities due to the lack of high speed internet access. With remote work and remote learning here to stay in some capacity in the years to come, now is the time to make critical investments in the next generation of internet connectivity -- for ALL communities in every corner of our state.
If you have a moment, will you take my 2021 Technology Infrastructure Survey? I’d like to hear from you directly on how bringing statewide 5G to Maryland’s communities will benefit you and your family! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/SSZ4-HRaJUWAcDlsrPTUHA2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em082321]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

name: RightUSA on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: The price of independence
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58180768:Jz1XygleN:m:1:3253819041:86C8A17B8852EE18D0D259F47B32A586:r) Dear Peter,
Too many American colleges and universities are failing to equip their students with the knowledge and character required for a good and happy life--much less for useful citizenship.
And they are failing to do these things while receiving billions of your tax dollars in the process!
There are many reasons for the sorry state of American higher education today. Not the least of them is the financial entanglement of our colleges and universities with the federal government--an entanglement that goes back now over 60 years.
By accepting tax dollars over these many decades, colleges and universities have also had to accept the corrupting and unconstitutional regulations attached to those dollars. **It has proved a devil 's bargain.**
Hillsdale College has rejected this bargain: we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of federal or state government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
**With your support, the College****stands as a beacon of genuine independence in American higher education --free of regulations about what students to enroll, what professors to hire, and how or what to teach.**
**** **This independence allows Hillsdale to remain true to its 177-year-old-mission: to provide "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty." **
The resulting contrast between Hillsdale and the vast majority of other American colleges and universities could not be greater.

* **Hillsdale teaches that there is a right and a wrong way to live** , while most other colleges and universities promote moral and cultural relativism.
* **Hillsdale teaches that America has a great heritage of liberty** , while other colleges and universities increasingly promote the false narrative of America as essentially unjust and irredeemable.
* **Hillsdale upholds the American tradition of free and civil speech and debate** , while too many other colleges and universities enforce the deadening dictates of political correctness.

**Hillsdale College remains true to its original mission on behalf of liberty not only on its southern Michigan campus, but also nationwide through its many educational outreach initiatives.**
But this work is only possible with the ongoing support of informed patriots, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. [**That 's why today, I hope you will consider making a tax-deductible gift toward our 2021 Annual Fund.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58180768:Jz1XygleN:m:1:3253819041:86C8A17B8852EE18D0D259F47B32A586:r)
**What does the Annual Fund support?**
First, it replaces all federal and state student aid with privately funded student aid so that the best and most deserving students can attend Hillsdale College.
The cost of replacing federal and state student grants and loans over the past 36 years exceeds $130 million. It will cost the College more than $5 million this year alone.
The Annual Fund also makes possible Hillsdale's extensive educational outreach efforts nationwide, **reaching** and **teaching** additional millions each year on behalf of liberty. These outreach efforts include:

* **_Imprimis_** , Hillsdale's digest of liberty--over**5.7 million households and businesses** receive _Imprimis_ , free of charge, ten times each year.
* **Hillsdale 's free online courses **on topics including the Constitution, American history, and free market economics--over **2.5 million citizens** have already enrolled in one or more of these courses.
* **Hillsdale 's K-12 education programs,** including the**Barney Charter School Initiative,** which founds and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide--currently, there are**over 20 Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 schools operating in over eleven states.**

**** Hillsdale also **provides an American classical curriculum****-- including American civics--to a growing network of educators and homeschoolers**; these materials are provided free of charge as part of Hillsdale's educational mission on behalf of liberty.
In 1844, the founders of Hillsdale College--like the founders of America before them--acted on the belief that education is the surest way to maintain liberty and free government.
In the same belief, Hillsdale College continues to expand its educational outreach efforts.**[This is why I hope you'll consider supporting Hillsdale College with a special gift to its Annual Fund today. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58180768:Jz1XygleN:m:1:3253819041:86C8A17B8852EE18D0D259F47B32A586:r)**
But it seems clear to us today that Hillsdale's educational mission on behalf of liberty has never been more urgently needed.
The far-Left is pulling out all the stops in its open and aggressive efforts to undermine informed patriotism and transform our government and our American way of life.
**We must engage these forces with equal strength and determination. That 's why we need your support today. **
No matter the size of the gift, your support will ensure Hillsdale's independence, help increase the reach of _Imprimis_ and Hillsdale's free online courses, and help provide increasing thousands of K-12 students an American classical education (including American civics).
**If you agree that it is vital for Hillsdale College to remain a beacon of independence in American higher education --and to continue to reach and teach additional millions on behalf of liberty--I hope you will make your best tax-deductible gift toward our ambitious Annual Fund goal today. **
I've provided a secure link for you here:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/price-of-independence](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58180768:Jz1XygleN:m:1:3253819041:86C8A17B8852EE18D0D259F47B32A586:r)**
With your help, Hillsdale will maintain its independence without compromise and will increase and expand its work on behalf of American liberty for years to come.
Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you before the end of our fiscal year on June 30.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Hillsdale College's refusal to accept taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans--frees it from the corrupting and unconstitutional regulations that burden and compromise other colleges and universities.
The resulting independence ensures that Hillsdale can remain true to its 1844 mission: to provide "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."
Also, because of this independence, your support is critical to Hillsdale's work.
So please, if possible, give your best tax-deductible Annual Fund gift today using the secure link below. Your response is vital as we build our budget for the next academic year and engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education through 2021 and into the crucial year of 2022.
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/price-of-independence](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58180768:Jz1XygleN:m:1:3253819041:86C8A17B8852EE18D0D259F47B32A586:r)**
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system March 29, 2021.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/iJz1XygleN). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJz1XygleN)

body:
Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is quickly approaching, so we have an important request today:
#

Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is quickly approaching, so we have an important request today:
**[We are humbly asking you to make a $3 donation to send Cheri Beasley to the U.S. Senate. We’ve set an ambitious goal, and we need another 217 people to donate before midnight to stay on track to reach it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34590003/302447035/-928165870?refcode2=3de90d4a-0905-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210824-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGU5MGQ0YS0wOTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=opFekeywsjfdj45uoiDTfQZhSpXG7EVJdgX-8L3FYkg=)**
