That’s why Donald Trump has already campaigned in our state this summer. And Trump’s hand-picked candidate also funneled $250,000 of his own money into his campaign to try to buy this seat.
It’s up to us to do everything we can to make sure Democrats win this seat by electing Cheri Beasley. This is critical to our fights to hold the majority, secure our democracy, and protect the right to vote.
**[Will you please make a $3 donation to help us reach our ambitious August fundraising goal? Every dollar goes a long way for our campaign and will help us stop Republicans from buying this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34590005/302447037/-928165870?refcode2=3de90d4a-0905-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210824-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGU5MGQ0YS0wOTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=opFekeywsjfdj45uoiDTfQZhSpXG7EVJdgX-8L3FYkg=)**

\- Team Cheri Beasley

My name is Mark Warner, and I’m the senior U.S. Senator from the great Commonwealth of Virginia.

[**I’ve proudly endorsed Del. Hala Ayala for Virginia Lt. Governor. So today, I'm personally asking you to step up with a $3 donation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34590118/302447262/-169005911?amount=3&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=HAFV_20210824_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjlhMTQ1MC0wOTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p-k-b0Q30YmOMYIFbq0fFj7m_zAJDXKjRPt6ryd5fPM=) Here’s why I'm supporting Hala:

**Hala is a driving force** as a leader of the House of Delegates. She knows how to get results for the people of Virginia, and will do just that as Lt. Governor.

**Hala is a passionate advocate** for all Virginians. Her personal story connects with so many of us, and helps her serve Virginians at the highest level.

And the bottom line is: We must protect our Democratic majority.

With Republicans coming out of the woodwork to crush our progress ‐‐ _from health care, to voting rights, and so much more_ ‐‐ we need voices like Hala’s on a state level now more than ever.

[**So if you’re with me, Peter, will you chip in $3 today to fund Hala’s campaign in its next critical months before Election Day? subject: Will you take my Back to School Survey today?

body:
Peter,

It's just about that time of year again: back to school. As the son of two now-retired public school teachers and the father of two kiddos in public school, I know all about the mixed emotions this time of year holds during a "normal" time: excitement, anxiety, frenzy, and more.

This year, these emotions are heightened by the fear of the COVID-19 virus and the Delta Variant. I understand these concerns, and I want you to know -- first and foremost -- that **the safety of our students and teachers is a top priority of mine.**

I'm reaching out today because I want to hear from you. As we head into the new school year, I'm gathering your responses so I can get a better sense of what's most important to you and your family as our schools open their doors.

**[Will you take my short Back to School Survey today so I know what your biggest concerns and priorities are?](https://act.myngp.com/el/uPJNIQyJDD1VbteMu_h-1AcqdPXeO9L3t7haJ3UzMVM=/ERg6BfyvVqOjPcoK7GnIXvWAC43a2Oz88iamqc4-n0I=?gpsid=50_115_20235&ms=em21_210824_SclSur_engg_gq_act__DK_ettx&refcode=em21_210824_SclSur_engg_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210824_SclSur_engg_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**
**What are your top priorities this school year?**

Securing more federal government funding for public schools
Keeping students and teachers safe from COVID-19
Securing food programs for students
Ensuring students meet learning standards
Providing mental health support for students and teachers
Attaining support for after school programs
Funding for extracurricular sports and arts programming
Other
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.myngp.com/el/uPJNIQyJDD1VbteMu_h-1AcqdPXeO9L3t7haJ3UzMVM=/ERg6BfyvVqOjPcoK7GnIXvWAC43a2Oz88iamqc4-n0I=?gpsid=50_115_20235&ms=em21_210824_SclSur_engg_gq_act__DK_ettx&refcode=em21_210824_SclSur_engg_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210824_SclSur_engg_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)
I wish I could sit down with each and every one of you to talk with you about your priorities, but surveys like this are the next best way I can learn what's on your mind. Your responses are important to me, and I look forward to hearing from you.

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/uPJNIQyJDD1VbteMu_h-1AcqdPXeO9L3t7haJ3UzMVM=/J_j9GsyT-WrkUTqtKKJplQfbsO9pKzDaj_ajYDbNluo=?gpsid=50_115_20237&refcode=em21_210824_SclSur_engg_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210824_SclSur_engg_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

name: Team Kaptur
subject: Another victory for working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
In just one month, the Child Tax Credit has slashed hunger. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux0pvCc4-jR_QNhCTtU9hpm5nno3i2AxbgNcXSwvbPd8Vm5qF96T1UoxNIH7Y08-r5ym7DKG2rx8PnDp1bBeaFHlolHzSPqPh26Z6Vl3Igyo_HyDn1IE_wgsZOPLi3FIl4ZF1cEp_dhxX1PVaWh0HUmbn5qKPBEdf0damQX0QUy-BJ-edEmBB-dnl9gimgeBVWohxGUfO0hk9cAHIzj4NtbtTH0Ed72RoVU15RLf9JkzkglJPt6hESDsqVeQgRzvOKhRjksnYE-dZ81pvu-6ys2NRbUHEZ0-pw9XIZP2NVFRfKDIFfKUbSF7oEpvLAZBRhrwj366sRFKxIQJjbI3j6Hqfzji8vDQOxM-vJiccrVD-wWoTa8SFF4Z4grIar8JucmrrWhUzVpCnoO7CxIuMYWw/3eq/d4c13HpZS8iBYyX5Htl1XA/h0/QrX-XAo0JmRKM7tjl60f6EZtVA082SBRJGHpMYSbceY)

| | Friend,

In July, working families across our country began receiving their annual **Child Tax Credit as a monthly installment of up to $300 a month per child** to help alleviate financial pressure in the pandemic’s aftermath.

A provision of the American Rescue Plan, this new tax credit provides necessary income for rent, child-care, and groceries -- and is already having a significant impact on the futures of our nation’s children. **Since payments began a month ago, hunger rates have reached a pandemic low, dropping three percent from the previous month’s prediction.**

This is incredible news, friend, but we cannot stop here. Our nation’s working class is critical to our nation’s economy, and we cannot stop until we’ve ensured continued investments in their financial futures.

**Marcy Kaptur has devoted her service to fighting for Ohio’s working families, using her voice to speak out against economic inequality and the nation’s wealth gap — partially driven by decades of Republican tax policy.** Join us in the fight to send her back to Congress and continue the push for long-lasting change for America’s working families.

**[Marcy Kaptur is fighting for a brighter financial future for Ohio’s working class. clean_body: In just one month, the Child Tax Credit has slashed hunger. | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Friend, In July, working families across our country began receiving their annual Child Tax Credit as a monthly installment of up to $300 a month per child to help alleviate financial pressure in the pandemic’s aftermath. A provision of the American Rescue Plan, this new tax credit provides necessary income for rent, child-care, and groceries -- and is already having a significant impact on the futures of our nation’s children. Since payments began a month ago, hunger rates have reached a pandemic low, dropping three percent from the previous month’s prediction. This is incredible news, friend, but we cannot stop here. Our nation’s working class is critical to our nation’s economy, and we cannot stop until we’ve ensured continued investments in their financial futures. Marcy Kaptur has devoted her service to fighting for Ohio’s working families, using her voice to speak out against economic inequality and the nation’s wealth gap — partially driven by decades of Republican tax policy. Join us in the fight to send her back to Congress and continue the push for long-lasting change for America’s working families. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | Thank you for your support, \-- Team Kaptur Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. Can you help us send Marcy Kaptur back to Congress? ****** | **** **** **** **** | | Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress Checks may be mailed to: P.O. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Cash on hand (data)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Here’s what we found.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210824-2379-header&t=1&akid=2379%2E434096%2EulKXND)
**$7,690,491**
That’s how much cash on hand outgoing Senator Pat Toomey (R-PA) raised by the end of Q3 in 2016, the last time this Senate seat was contested. "Cash on hand" is how much money a campaign actually has left in the bank.
_Peter, our interns dug through some old FEC filings to give you an exclusive look at Senator Toomey’s actual report from Q3 of 2016. Here’s what they found._
[__](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28623?refcode=em20210824-2379&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2379%2E434096%2EulKXND)
In a few weeks, John Fetterman will be required by federal law to publish our Q3 fundraising results in a report just like this one. **The first thing our opponents will look for is how much cash on hand we have.**
Let’s be real: $7,690,491 is a lot of cash on hand for a Republican candidate to have after Q3. In 2016, the GOP was so anxious about keeping this Senate seat that they spent millions of dollars early-on to protect it.
Now that Senator Toomey is retiring, they’re getting even more anxious. **The GOP was desperate to win Pennsylvania in 2016, and we know they’ll be just as desperate in 2022.**
_That’s why it’s so essential we report as much cash on hand as possible, starting right now in Q3 of 2021._
[**_With all of this in mind, Peter, will you help our campaign expand our cash on hand by making your first $5 donation? We must raise as much money as possible before our next big FEC deadline if we want to flip Pennsylvania and elect John Fetterman to the U.S. Senate._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28623?refcode=em20210824-2379&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2379%2E434096%2EulKXND)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28623?refcode=em20210824-2379&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2379%2E434096%2EulKXND)**
Thanks,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210824-2379-footer&t=23&refcode2=2379_434096_ulKXND&akid=2379%2E434096%2EulKXND)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Unite the Country
subject: the GOP is beating us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [unitethecountry
body:

name: Washington State Postcard
subject: Where's Patty Murray?
body:
We can't find her home in Washington
---
| | | | | | You're receiving this message because you signed up to receive emails from Smiley for Washington. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can unsubscribe at the bottom of this email.
---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| Patty Murray has been in office as Washington's US Senator since I was 11 years old... that's about the same age as my middle son Graham!
Yet, she doesn't seem to spend a lot of time here at home. Clearly she has mixed up our great state of Washington and Washington D.C.?
Both are in the top 10 for rising crime and for the most homelessness. Maybe because she knows how bad things are here and in DC, she just mixes them up. Or maybe, once you've been a DC politician for 30 years, your priorities change and you forget why you went there in the first place.
However, that is no excuse to ignore our state's homelessness crisis or the rising crime that is plaguing our communities.
We need a leader who cares about our state, who wants to raise a family here, and have their kids stay here and grow in Washington. We've elected the same politician for 30 years (before I could even vote!), and now it's time to elect a Washingtonian... a political outsider who is not bound to any party bosses or political establishment. It's time to turn the page and retire Patty Murray.
[If you are ready to retire Patty make a donation today and help us WIN Washington. >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CO-TgPFg9qn0n6cNahbwJhX5Zztn-3WKjUdRmP0nE-5f2BPrv5hjfrAjLo4fSGHi_JBcdNf5uMe93HOfG6s4OV2a-5qUtuhh_2iMFlQX83fPsnJ7P2yIa7nBRR-dmiYY0ViV14d14rYXkQKwT_ERZf13ZbQXl1tBSCz1B7bFiVhnI5U1pnHD11MOMQo-_JqJlbwA5KKJS1d4QLwJjz5QpQ==&c=a_Mra8Fb_ssatiIScKc1CjwQYVtk9PJ94grs-U2Bs4FLiNt-oGOkhg==&ch=hrkKXYSWtib4I8sIUS4FHtR6xAtlvFw2oCV-pMCdQR2Hq3Am6qR42w==)

| The politicians who spend more time in DC than in their home state are an issue. How can you call yourself a senator of our state when you haven't been here for the past two decades?
How come these issues like homelessness and crime aren't resolved? Patty has been in office for so long and has nothing to show for it.
It's time to retire Patty.
Sincerely,
Tiffany Smiley for Senate

clean_body: We can't find her home in Washington | | | | | | You're receiving this message because you signed up to receive emails from Smiley for Washington. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can unsubscribe at the bottom of this email. | | | | | Dear Friends, | Patty Murray has been in office as Washington's US Senator since I was 11 years old... that's about the same age as my middle son Graham! Yet, she doesn't seem to spend a lot of time here at home. Clearly she has mixed up our great state of Washington and Washington D.C.? Both are in the top 10 for rising crime and for the most homelessness. Maybe because she knows how bad things are here and in DC, she just mixes them up. Or maybe, once you've been a DC politician for 30 years, your priorities change and you forget why you went there in the first place. However, that is no excuse to ignore our state's homelessness crisis or the rising crime that is plaguing our communities. We need a leader who cares about our state, who wants to raise a family here, and have their kids stay here and grow in Washington. We've elected the same politician for 30 years (before I could even vote!), and now it's time to elect a Washingtonian... a political outsider who is not bound to any party bosses or political establishment. It's time to turn the page and retire Patty Murray. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | The politicians who spend more time in DC than in their home state are an issue. How can you call yourself a senator of our state when you haven't been here for the past two decades? How come these issues like homelessness and crime aren't resolved? Patty has been in office for so long and has nothing to show for it. It's time to retire Patty. Sincerely, Tiffany Smiley for Senate | | | | | | Smiley for Washington, Inc. | P.O. BOX 1058, Richland, WA 99352 | | Sent by mailto:tiffany@smileyforwashington.com powered by

She is a strong conservative leader who has fought tirelessly for border security, lower taxes, free speech and limited government. ---|--- | ---|--- Don't want to receive any more of our emails? . | Paid for by Debbie Lesko for Congress

name: Joe Mantegna
subject: We have a responsibility to honor their valor
body:
Hi Peter, this is Joe Mantegna. You might know me from movies or TV as Joey Zasa in _The_ _Godfather_ , the voice of Fat Tony in _The Simpsons_ , or Special Agent David Rossi in the CBS series _Criminal Minds._ But what you may not know about me is that off-screen, I try to spend time raising awareness and appreciation for those who risked their lives so that we can live in freedom. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58182680:65WEuglNa:m:1:3253819041:4566665661C64CFDCEB4BC1D68A44AA0:r) You see, out of the millions of brave men and women who served in World War II, Korea, and Vietnam, only about 6% are still with us today. _Most of the World War II veterans still alive are nearing or past 100 years old ... most of our Korean War veterans are in their 90s... and most of our Vietnam veterans are in their 70s and 80s._ Sadly, with hundreds of these heroes passing away every day, time is short to preserve their first-hand lessons and experiences from which future generations can learn. That's why today, I'm asking fellow patriotic Americans like yourself to help my friends at the American Veterans Center with a special, time-sensitive project -[ **to record the personal stories of our heroic veterans from our World War II generation before it 's too late. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58182680:65WEuglNa:m:1:3253819041:4566665661C64CFDCEB4BC1D68A44AA0:r) _You and I understand that freedom is not free and that its price is the blood and sacrifice of generations willing to stand and serve._ **I learned those lessons from my Uncle Willie who served in General Patton 's Third Army in World War II** - _he even earned a Purple Heart for the injuries he sustained in the Battle of the Bulge._ But what I didn't realize until later in life is that the war stories he told me weren't just about him... They were about honoring and remembering his brothers in arms who never made it back home... the ones who never got a chance to re-start their lives like he did. I knew then that whatever I chose to do in life was because of their valor - _and I knew that I had a responsibility to honor that valor._ So, almost fifteen years ago when I met Jim Roberts - President of the American Veterans Center - I was immediately glad to offer any help I could to help honor our veterans and military heroes. You see, the American Veterans Center (or AVC) understands better than most what it means to truly honor veterans, like my Uncle Willie, and remember those who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our country. That's why they send camera crews around the country to visit our aging veterans from World War II, Korea, and Vietnam, professionally filming their personal memories of service and sacrifice, and capturing their invaluable contribution to American history. After they finish recording one of these "Oral Histories", they post it on their YouTube page for millions of Americans to watch. Each is also donated to the Library of Congress' Veterans History Project for preservation and use by future researchers, and are made available on request to museums and documentary films. If you've ever watched one of AVC's Oral Histories, you'll know that they are extensive, high-quality interviews where our veterans have as much time as they need to tell every detail of their remarkable service. And as a T.V. and film producer myself, I can tell you firsthand that these Oral Histories are simply breath-taking. With the pandemic waning, the AVC is working to double-down on its effort to capture the remaining stories of our World War II heroes. Right now, the AVC has identified more than 200 stories to film as soon as possible, which include:
* **The 442nd Regimental Combat Team** - Veterans of the legendary all-Japanese American unit that would become the most decorated unit in American military history for its size and length of service, being awarded eight Presidential Unit Citations, 21 Medals of Honor, and more than 4,000 Purple Hearts.
* **The Ritchie Boys** - A special unit comprised largely of Jewish immigrants and refugees from Germany and Austria, trained in counterintelligence and deployed back to Europe with the United States Army to help defeat Hitler.
* **Royce Williams** - The top scoring carrier-based naval aviator and top scoring naval aviator in a Navy jet in the Korean War and the only fighter pilot to shoot down four Soviet MIG-15s in one fight.
* **Rosie the Riveters** - The American women on the home front who worked to build the planes, tanks, and ships for our boys fighting off on the front lines.

These are just a few of the amazing stories they have lined up to record before it's too late. But there is one challenge... In order to properly capture an Oral History - from identifying videographers to travel to equipment - it costs the American Veterans Center around $2,000. As a non-profit organization, the AVC relies almost entirely on generous Americans like you to preserve and honor the sacrifices of America's greatest heroes. [**So, will you help my friends at the AVC record the Oral Histories of as many living WWII veterans as possible with a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $15, $35, $50 or more today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58182680:65WEuglNa:m:1:3253819041:4566665661C64CFDCEB4BC1D68A44AA0:r) Right now, there are about 250 World War II veterans whose stories the AVC has identified to record. So, in order to professionally capture the Oral Histories of all 250 of the heroic veterans on their waiting list, it's going to cost the AVC around $500,000. These memories and their history is priceless, and the time to capture them is urgent. [**That 's why I'm asking you to join me in supporting the AVC Oral History Project with a tax-deductible gift of $15, $35, $50 or more today. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58182680:65WEuglNa:m:1:3253819041:4566665661C64CFDCEB4BC1D68A44AA0:r) If you can give more - such as $75, $100, or even $500 - that would certainly be most welcome. But please know that any amount you can afford to give today will make a real difference in helping the AVC preserve the legacies of our military veterans. Thank you for taking the time to read my letter. And thank you in advance for your help in this time-sensitive mission. _ _ Warmest regards, Joe Mantegna Actor, Director, Producer, Writer [**SUPPORT THE AVC**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58182680:65WEuglNa:m:1:3253819041:4566665661C64CFDCEB4BC1D68A44AA0:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58182680:65WEuglNa:m:1:3253819041:4566665661C64CFDCEB4BC1D68A44AA0:r) The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58182682:65WEuglNa:m:1:3253819041:4566665661C64CFDCEB4BC1D68A44AA0:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58182683:65WEuglNa:m:1:3253819041:4566665661C64CFDCEB4BC1D68A44AA0:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58182684:65WEuglNa:m:1:3253819041:4566665661C64CFDCEB4BC1D68A44AA0:r)
---|---|---

name: Stewart Navarre
subject: Believe in America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
Since we launched our campaign back in April, I have had the chance to talk with thousands of voters and listen to their concerns. In each conversation, I ask them, “are you better off than your parents and grandparents?” The answer is always yes.
I then ask if they believe their kids and grandkids will be better off — sadly, the answer is almost always no. I am not ready to give up on America because I know when we work together, we can accomplish anything.
That is why I am running for Congress, because too many Americans have begun to doubt our future.
I cannot do this alone, so I am asking 250 folks who are not ready to give up on America to step up and help us hit our end-of-summer goal. Can I count on you to help us today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn-eom?refcode=210824-email]
To restore faith in our country’s promise, we can no longer merely admire the problems -- we have to tackle them head on. We must expand access to healthcare, ensure every child — regardless of their zip code — receives a world class education, fix our crumbling infrastructure and protect the right to vote.
Have you had enough of politics as usual? Me too, and that is why I am running!
I hope you will join our movement today. Any amount is appreciated! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn-eom?refcode=210824-email]
Best,
Stewart
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn-eom?refcode=210824-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2108-q3-sn-eom?refcode=210824-email]
Stewart Navarre is a Democrat running for Virginia's 1st Congressional District. He's ready to serve his fellow Virginians with integrity, ethics, and hard work. Support Stewart with a donation today.

Fredericksburg, VA 22404

Glenn Youngkin has earmarked $75 million from his personal fortune to bankroll his campaign. AND the Republican National Committee just announced they’re pouring millions into Virginia to help Glenn build a massive voter turnout operation. Look, we don’t have those endless resources. But we do have something better: you and the tens of thousands who have already stepped up and donated to our campaign. Thanks to you, we’re building the largest grassroots donor campaign Virginia has ever seen. And it’s giving us a real chance to win. That’s why we email you so much, Derek. Every time we send an email, hundreds chip in anything they can to do their part. Look, I know it’s a lot, but believe me — having Donald Trump’s handpicked guy as our Governor would be far, far worse. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for hearing me out — I hope this gave you a little more insight into our strategy and why it’s so important. With gratitude, Terry = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Feds Go After Conservative Journalist
body:
My friend Owen Shroyer was forced to turn himself in yesterday.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/h6iLItbRntR27DZHxmEcug/mh2UXwRua763uyH8927FZuflUA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/h6iLItbRntR27DZHxmEcug/mh2UXwRua763uyH8927FZuflUA) My friend Owen Shroyer was forced to turn himself in yesterday.

While he never stepped foot inside the Capitol on January 6th, he's been charged with "illegally entering a restricted area on Capitol grounds", along with disorderly conduct.

Owen is a journalist and was covering the event with a news crew from InfoWars.

They never entered the Capitol, never jumped any barricades, and never disobeyed orders from law enforcement - because they were given none!

So why are the Feds going after Owen?

Because he's an influential conservative media figure, and they can take him down despite having no evidence of wrong-doing!

Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats are leading this charge with the intent to dismantle the activist wing of the conservative movement.

And it's working!

Families are being broken up, careers are being destroyed, and everyone else is being terrified into silence or submission.

But not me - and [**that 's why I'm asking for your support for my run for Congress**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/h6iLItbRntR27DZHxmEcug/mh2UXwRua763uyH8927FZuflUA).

We have to stand up and tell the truth about what is happening, and it shouldn't surprise any of us that **the majority of Republicans in Congress are silent as Nancy Pelosi is literally taking political prisoners around the nation!**

Do you think Democrats in Congress would have the same reaction if BLM and Antifa had swarmed the Capitol with Molotov cocktails and bricks like they did in Portland?

No! Pelosi, AOC and Ilhan Omar would be defending their right to protest, despite the fact that their actions are far from being "mostly peaceful"!

While over 600 Patriots have been charged with crimes from January 6th, nearly every BLM rioter is getting their charges dropped!

We need members of Congress brave enough to stand up to partisan plots like this . . . and that's why it's so important to send patriots to Congress who have a spine!

[**Help me get there today by funding my campaign.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/h6iLItbRntR27DZHxmEcug/mh2UXwRua763uyH8927FZuflUA)

And please, take a moment to give your thoughts and prayers to Owen Shroyer and the hundreds of other men and women whose lives have been upended by this partisan political power play.

Thanks so much for your time.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

| | Team-

When we are going out here and campaigning this year or if people are feeling a little tired, we need to remind ourselves: As goes Virginia so goes the Nation.

We cannot allow 2021 to be another 2009. After we won back in 2008 and elected the first Black President after 2 terms of disarray, we took our foot off the gas and we ended up with a Republican administration. And it’s not out of the realm of possibility. New polling just dropped from VCU today putting Terry at 40% and Youngkin at 37% which is basically as Governor Wilder put it “a dead heat”

We have too much on the line to stop now. We have fought too hard and have come too far to turn back now. They are looking to roll back everything we have accomplished. Because the stuff that is happening in Texas, in Florida, and throughout the south, limiting the right to vote, making it harder for people to get to the ballot box, all of that will be here before you know it.
---

If you want to have campaign finance reform and ethics reform in Richmond, I’m asking you to knock on those doors. If you want to repeal our so-called right to work laws and have true economic equality here in Virginia, I’m asking you to make a few phone calls. If you want to protect the air we breathe and the planet we live on, text a few of your friends.

[If you want to make a Virginia a place that will welcome you know matter who you are, what you look like, where you come from, who you love, what faith you serve, what you can do and how much money you make and make Virginia a commonwealth where wealth is common, get out there and elect democrats up and down the ballot. ](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=2c6e9cba3f&e=76fc145c69)

Racial Justice is on the ballot. Social Justice is on the Ballot. Environmental Justice is on the Ballot. Economic Justice is on the ballot. we’re gonna make even more progress in Virginia over the next 4 years and I can’t wait to do it with y’all. [Can you help us get there and help out our candidates by chipping in $25, $50, $100, or more to our tandem fundraising effort](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=746183787e&e=76fc145c69)?

| Keep pushing forward,
Matt

Peter,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=97bdb31164b741f6b0fe78cd3e39cf57&_e=prykLahXAW-YfIIIDAfX9AQiYzXynsQetxCcQahiNxHYMNHreuc-bTodNca7WtD1J7D1GHVve_yzPB0C59p2GRRqO9QhlSQfwKNsDdgEBJhhJ_cJHsVbkdR6r8tx48-jCDf8PJZYILzHUgNPm3S_aVozw-4bT0WdoqKb-4D81yvCgMW2vHPVf9Bl-Uwy6Iqipw0J_fcVf_v09N82htlIQoHVwsDF7tbFTMkLJzk5c0_JYCEHHS4_Nv2q_YoXfvs8c39kANqhzg0B64SiAIm_wUbFHUAYvgxIVXD9Cl15sHg1i7ZODNZGeYItu8aWPHRWz4lB3g6uovKDg__-xkOSePE83GQ0HChzaeWYAgjT754bnSckYkGW9f6qD0hVCN1RmRYhlsgvkJ8kpX8t_CIusyM1kiIr7qnxome-LlaFQxyrPnMCHOqRmr_Nc0PAA5mV5CdTpnujl-wgvB3W6nf9sIuMQBuRrjRKXWWn2SHpIvuTuhxGmCHWVtliGtx6jLwhxxd-wWMPHDT8cg7ogzfbHA%3D%3D)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=97bdb31164b741f6b0fe78cd3e39cf57&_e=prykLahXAW-YfIIIDAfX9AQiYzXynsQetxCcQahiNxHYMNHreuc-bTodNca7WtD1J7D1GHVve_yzPB0C59p2GRRqO9QhlSQfwKNsDdgEBJhhJ_cJHsVbkdR6r8tx48-jCDf8PJZYILzHUgNPm3S_aVozw-4bT0WdoqKb-4D81yvCgMW2vHPVf9Bl-Uwy6Iqipw0J_fcVf_v09N82htlIQoHVwsDF7tbFTMkLJzk5c0_JYCEHHS4_Nv2q_YoXfvs8c39kANqhzg0B64SiAIm_wUbFHUAYvgxIVXD9Cl15sHg1i7ZODNZGeYItu8aWPHRWD_N-twu9tPaVCQEJ6mEQaRzha1EHXc8AGlViNtR1q2-StKKwbc60ecp71VdsNi56kUcKEIH5iAGyQP_c5FBSZZWJKafebOh6eqjOkFuzF7ALgt1wdn4yfucb0vRCYOOPmbM5Ydd1hr_k_KKkjNW49iMcjChoBPWsJajPp1zQbPcuj7I8yQVD6mqza-RTMzNZOs-HWRM-VRTSe8qYf-MK9Q%3D%3D)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 18TH

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=97bdb31164b741f6b0fe78cd3e39cf57&_e=prykLahXAW-YfIIIDAfX9AQiYzXynsQetxCcQahiNxHYMNHreuc-bTodNca7WtD1J7D1GHVve_yzPB0C59p2GRRqO9QhlSQfwKNsDdgEBJhhJ_cJHsVbkdR6r8tx48-jCDf8PJZYILzHUgNPm3S_aVozw-4bT0WdoqKb-4D81yvCgMW2vHPVf9Bl-Uwy6Iqipw0J_fcVf_v09N82htlIQoHVwsDF7tbFTMkLJzk5c0_JYCEHHS4_Nv2q_YoXfvs8c39kANqhzg0B64SiAIm_wUbFHUAYvgxIVXD9Cl15sHg1i7ZODNZGeYItu8aWPHRWG_NRMlJwZe4eiqjqaMhKxWtW9w33CIOEswo_80h9AecG4zMey15_3nRthGX1vfor7uSlQ-9qsQWTbLiXl8dufwijCjKuiadfmFjT4EvHb4e-d9mE6aGcaC4sld4nNT_vfjEn1c6LzMqthpaBY9dAlimD17s4txm3jBbBHkbQdQmJXdnOdnAcRLSPP7KGI2qqBhefzcJtpCJXCZUkkh9_ig%3D%3D)

---

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it’s anyone’s guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn’t be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=97bdb31164b741f6b0fe78cd3e39cf57&_e=prykLahXAW-YfIIIDAfX9AQiYzXynsQetxCcQahiNxHYMNHreuc-bTodNca7WtD1J7D1GHVve_yzPB0C59p2GRRqO9QhlSQfwKNsDdgEBJhhJ_cJHsVbkdR6r8tx48-jCDf8PJZYILzHUgNPm3S_aVozw-4bT0WdoqKb-4D81yvCgMW2vHPVf9Bl-Uwy6Iqipw0J_fcVf_v09N82htlIQoHVwsDF7tbFTMkLJzk5c0_JYCEHHS4_Nv2q_YoXfvs8c39kANqhzg0B64SiAIm_wUbFHUAYvgxIVXD9Cl15sHg1i7ZODNZGeYItu8aWPHRWnlWvZ-s5JZJ0IPMocPs7lE2hl9r3aXyh_K_TfvmidAmI4fsWIUsbAOnHX8yAyLhJd9f6EHmiSUebIGhOu0Wbbcdw-Nkdm5O04UmQaHM61ie-4mNmu5FPKH3VDksQf-UAeIJITr3zmTPJGVxG2uAMT-8S0I1bJ0r84V0iC3U97wfn6a0EF0opzra9o8IhRm8p3oTuwG2afVAwosJarmpfmw%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Would you support a federal vaccine mandate? Or are you able to make your own healthcare decisions? Let us know. . Don't want to receive our emails? | Peter, The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role. We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations. | SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 18TH One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it’s anyone’s guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn’t be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate. Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us. How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status! The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word. Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them. Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked. Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border. Will the hypocrisy ever end? Thanks for letting us know – Thank you, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

When Floridians needed a helping hand to get through the pandemic, Gov. DeSantis **_opposed_** stimulus checks, tax cuts, and funding for local governments.

His actions are also **_damaging_** our tourism industry, the lifeblood of Florida’s economy:
* He’s ignoring the “red tide” algae bloom that’s driving off visitors to our coasts.
* He’s waging war on the cruise ship industry, which supports tens of thousands of jobs across our state.
* And he’s pretending there isn’t a Delta variant surge, even as Florida accounts for over **A FIFTH** of all national COVID-19 cases.

Let me say this as plainly as I can: Gov. DeSantis is bad for our economy. Instead of focusing on **_any_** of these issues, he’s fixated on running for president. He’s wading into hyper-partisan fights by signing transgender sports bans and voter suppression bills.

**Gov. DeSantis is thinking about presidents, polls, and primaries -- and do you know who he’s not thinking about?**

Floridians.

**[That’s wrong in my book, and it always will be. I’m running for governor of this great state to put people over politics, and I need your help to do it. Thanks and God bless,
Charlie Crist

name: Ruth Richardson
subject: Investing in our schools
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/xAjKx-WRbE_UasRLztpu4g9kOsQ3LvhMtDkNyEuH8Io=/W_1xzrrHBO3n4UcDDXbXa3RgS5SsWoSsFbJ7noen15E=?refcode=082421)
| | Friend, The start of the school year is just around the corner and with the rise of the Delta variant, it is likely to continue looking different for students across the state. One other reason school will seem somewhat different this year is because House DFLers were able to secure an historic increase in school funding last legislative session.
If Republicans in the Senate had remained unchecked they would've cut funding to our schools and shifted resources from our public schools to private schools. Instead, we secured the largest increase in school funding in more than 15 years.
This was a great first step, but there is much more we need to do to make up for underinvestments over the last decade. That's why we need to protect and expand our majority in the Minnesota House. [Can you help us out by making a contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/xAjKx-WRbE_UasRLztpu4g9kOsQ3LvhMtDkNyEuH8Io=/W_1xzrrHBO3n4UcDDXbXa3RgS5SsWoSsFbJ7noen15E=?refcode=082421)
Thank you for your continued support. Together we can keep building on our progress for years to come.
Thank you,
Rep. Ruth Richardson 52B - Mendota Heights, Inver Grove Heights, Eagan, Sunfish Lake Chair, Minnesota House Education Policy Committee
P.S. The Political Contribution Refund Program has been renewed for 2021. [If you are a Minnesota resident, make your refundable donation of $50 (or $100 per couple) today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/xAjKx-WRbE_UasRLztpu4g9kOsQ3LvhMtDkNyEuH8Io=/W_1xzrrHBO3n4UcDDXbXa3RgS5SsWoSsFbJ7noen15E=?refcode=082421) [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/xAjKx-WRbE_UasRLztpu4g9kOsQ3LvhMtDkNyEuH8Io=/W_1xzrrHBO3n4UcDDXbXa3RgS5SsWoSsFbJ7noen15E=?refcode=082421)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: IMPEACH Biden & FIRE Milley
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden's incompetence costs American lives |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=97399050ed&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

I served in Afghanistan during my 27 years in the Army.

I know exactly how a well functioning army operates. I know what our protocols are. And I know the capabilities of our enemy, the Taliban. I fought them before.

That is why I can say with confidence: Impeach Biden. Fire and court-martial Milley.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=87c1da781d&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who is a Biden lackey I can beat.**

Darren Soto is just another mindless Democrat who will never hold Joe Biden to account. He will never hold Milley to account.

It's been a week since this disaster unfolded and Soto hasn't spoken out against Biden. He will NEVER hold Biden accountable.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f0e822dfca&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Now, why should we hold Biden accountable? Here is an except from an interview I did this week:

_Republican congressional candidate Bill Olson charged Wednesday that the Biden administration’s big mistake in the Afghanistan pullout occurred last month when it let the American military give up its biggest air power asset — Bagram Airfield.

Olson, an Army veteran who served in Afghanistan, worked for the Joint Special Operations Command out of Bagram 13 years ago. He said the airfield north of Kabul was the center of American air power superiority and had kept everything in check.

The American military pulled out of Bagram in August. The Afghanistan military abandoned it. Then the Taliban claimed it by mid-August. The rest of the country fell swiftly, leaving America’s exit in chaos this week after 20 years of war and occupation.

“I’m not a brilliant strategist but I do know this: I do know that our strategy is when you are out there you are going to, as much as possible, use that air power. So the Taliban was kept at bay ... _Once you don’t have that air cover it makes it incredibly difficult to keep or take ground, and be safe about it,” Olson said._

“If you listen to (National Security Adviser) Jake Sullivan and President Joe Biden, they said they had every contingency covered. **Well, obviously they didn’t,** ” Olson said.

**Olson expressed outrage that the Biden administration would not answer affirmatively when asked if America would keep troops in Afghanistan until it can evacuate all Americans.**

“The answer to that question is, ‘Yes! Yes we will stay as long as it takes to rescue Americans.’ We do not leave Americans behind. But they were given the opportunity to say that and for some reason they’re not saying it,” Olson said.

_**He called for the resignation of Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman Gen. Mark Milley.**_

Olson spent 27 years in the Army, retiring as a sergeant first class. In addition to serving in Afghanistan, he also served in Iraq in Operation Desert Storm and Operation Desert Shield.

He said he is not against the pull-out from Afghanistan, saying that conclusion is almost universal. He said he also does not want Biden to fail in Afghanistan, even though Olson is a Republican. He also said it was almost inevitable that America would get out. But Olson could not contain his outrage at how it’s happening.

**In 2007 and 2008 Olson was in Afghanistan, based at Bagram. Bagram is the largest airfield in the country, and can support any kind of aircraft, Olson said. American military flew special operations and drones from the base.**

“I was intimate with what it was like to be there. To be honest, I was shocked. That was the linchpin. We were able to create that air support not just for ours but as well as for the Afghanis,” Olson said. “Almost in the dead of night, the rest of the (Afghan) Air Force and Army personnel left, and the Taliban took over in a day or two.”_

Biden is incompetent. He is pleading with the Taliban that we held under our heel just 20 days ago to allow the 15-40,000 Americans left in Afghanistan to be evacuated.

Biden never even thought about this. He never thought about evacuating personnel, or equipment, or our allies. He's even charging evacuees $2000 for the flight out!

**Biden has betrayed our nation, and his woke lackey Gen. Milley went along with it. Biden should be impeached, and Milley should be fired and court-martialed.**
---
|
---
| **Biden vacations while Americans are stranded in Afghanistan due to his incompetence. It's his Saigon, PLUS his Benghazi.**

**President Trump had a better plan. You evacuate your people first, then the equipment, THEN the military. **

Biden's incompetence will go down in history. He's the worst President we ever had, and he should be impeached for what he's done.

_I will vote to impeach Biden. Darren Soto will not._

Biden needs to be fought, the American people want him to be challenged, and I will challenge him every day!

The Dems control all of the Federal government. We cannot hope to hold Biden accountable while Pelosi is the Speaker. The Republic needs us to impeach Biden! [Help me put a check and balance on Biden and Pelosi!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=611cbab9af&e=afa21b7626)

[Will you help me win my congressional seat](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a259ece0b4&e=afa21b7626)? It's a red-trending swing seat that I overperformed in last year. Florida is swinging red, and people want us to stop Biden's demented policies and reform our woke military!

Biden showed that the emperor has no clothes. He will destroy this country entirely if we don't stop him. Help me stand up to "Joke Biden"!

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=36b89b4ff4&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4faa9cf3c5&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=52e8599be5&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=583144169b&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

He said the airfield north of Kabul was the center of American air power superiority and had kept everything in check. The American military pulled out of Bagram in August. The Afghanistan military abandoned it. Then the Taliban claimed it by mid-August. The rest of the country fell swiftly, leaving America’s exit in chaos this week after 20 years of war and occupation. “I’m not a brilliant strategist but I do know this: I do know that our strategy is when you are out there you are going to, as much as possible, use that air power. So the Taliban was kept at bay ... Once you don’t have that air cover it makes it incredibly difficult to keep or take ground, and be safe about it,” Olson said. “If you listen to (National Security Adviser) Jake Sullivan and President Joe Biden, they said they had every contingency covered. Well, obviously they didn’t, ” Olson said. Olson expressed outrage that the Biden administration would not answer affirmatively when asked if America would keep troops in Afghanistan until it can evacuate all Americans. “The answer to that question is, ‘Yes! Yes we will stay as long as it takes to rescue Americans.’ We do not leave Americans behind. But they were given the opportunity to say that and for some reason they’re not saying it,” Olson said. He called for the resignation of Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman Gen. Mark Milley. Olson spent 27 years in the Army, retiring as a sergeant first class. In addition to serving in Afghanistan, he also served in Iraq in Operation Desert Storm and Operation Desert Shield. He said he is not against the pull-out from Afghanistan, saying that conclusion is almost universal. He said he also does not want Biden to fail in Afghanistan, even though Olson is a Republican. He also said it was almost inevitable that America would get out. But Olson could not contain his outrage at how it’s happening. In 2007 and 2008 Olson was in Afghanistan, based at Bagram. Bagram is the largest airfield in the country, and can support any kind of aircraft, Olson said. American military flew special operations and drones from the base. “I was intimate with what it was like to be there. To be honest, I was shocked. That was the linchpin. We were able to create that air support not just for ours but as well as for the Afghanis,” Olson said. “Almost in the dead of night, the rest of the (Afghan) Air Force and Army personnel left, and the Taliban took over in a day or two.” Biden is incompetent. He is pleading with the Taliban that we held under our heel just 20 days ago to allow the 15-40,000 Americans left in Afghanistan to be evacuated. Biden never even thought about this. He never thought about evacuating personnel, or equipment, or our allies. He's even charging evacuees $2000 for the flight out! Biden has betrayed our nation, and his woke lackey Gen. Milley went along with it. Biden should be impeached, and Milley should be fired and court-martialed. | | Biden vacations while Americans are stranded in Afghanistan due to his incompetence. It's his Saigon, PLUS his Benghazi. President Trump had a better plan. You evacuate your people first, then the equipment, THEN the military. Biden's incompetence will go down in history. He's the worst President we ever had, and he should be impeached for what he's done. I will vote to impeach Biden. Darren Soto will not. Biden needs to be fought, the American people want him to be challenged, and I will challenge him every day! The Dems control all of the Federal government. We cannot hope to hold Biden accountable while Pelosi is the Speaker. The Republic needs us to impeach Biden! ? It's a red-trending swing seat that I overperformed in last year. Florida is swinging red, and people want us to stop Biden's demented policies and reform our woke military! Biden showed that the emperor has no clothes. He will destroy this country entirely if we don't stop him. Help me stand up to "Joke Biden"! | | Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter | | P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - ! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill. | | PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | | | Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved. name: RightUSA on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Socialism rising?
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58182799:J5He2glNc:m:1:3253819041:72ACB04C5BA4021C675809001F88202A:r) Dear Peter,
Two years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"
To say "everyone" is a gross exaggeration. But it's clear that socialism has made--and continues to make--inroads in America, especially among the young.
Today, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of that support and the amount of opposition to socialism. With your input, we can form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of liberty in our country.
**Please give your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58182799:J5He2glNc:m:1:3253819041:72ACB04C5BA4021C675809001F88202A:r)**
With your response, you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of opinion that can help us more clearly understand mainstream Americans' views--views that will interest policymakers and opinion leaders.
A recent poll showed that 70% of Millennials are either somewhat likely or extremely likely to vote for candidates with socialist positions. We have seen some of this in recent elections.
**Why is this?**
For one thing, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried.
For another, too many are no longer being taught about America's great heritage of liberty and the importance of the Constitution to freedom.
This is because of the "progressive" Left's increasing success in hijacking American education at both the K-12 and college levels.
_The New York Times_ ' "1619 Project" is a prime example of this. The mainstream media praised this effort to subvert the proper teaching of American history, and its lead essayist even won a Pulitzer Prize.
In the face of such well-financed efforts to indoctrinate the young and undermine informed patriotism, **Hillsdale 's educational outreach efforts have never been more urgently needed**.
By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** , your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.
We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country--Americans like you, who still revere our founding principles of liberty, as set forth in the Declaration of Independence and underlying the Constitution.
As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy."
If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today.
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58182799:J5He2glNc:m:1:3253819041:72ACB04C5BA4021C675809001F88202A:r)**
In the face of recent successes by the Left, we must remember: **it is never too late to preserve and defend liberty through education.**
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

You were added to the system March 29, 2021.

subject: I am writing to ask if you can make a $3 contribution before our end of month fundraising deadline comes to a close one week from today.

body:
When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since winning.
#

Friends —
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for the U.S. Senate. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the truth:
When I launched our campaign for Senate, I made a promise that, if elected, I would listen to Arizonans, hear their concerns and fight tirelessly for them in the Senate. That’s what I’ve done since taking office.
Now, that approach doesn’t make everyone happy. And we just learned of yet another right-wing dark money group running ads targeting me in Arizona.
So with our end-of-month deadline coming up, I am asking you to contribute $3 to help me fight back.
I know $3 doesn’t sound like the kind of money that can beat multi-million dollar ad campaigns targeting me, but by the time you got to this point in the email, someone else added their own $3. And they’re hoping you do the same.
It all adds up, and that’s how we win: together. So I am asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to our campaign before this critical, end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to a close? We’ll put your donation right to work to help us win this campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210824-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1186_6688874_Ksn2ZC&akid=1186%2E6688874%2EKsn2ZC)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Biden is Plotting to Undo the Second Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate
body:
Fight the gun grabbers

| | | | | | | [ ]()
---
| [ ]()
---
| I write to you today with a dire warning. Congress may be on the verge of "compromising" your gun rights away. And if gun rights supporters across America don't act immediately, the next gun grab could be right around the corner. A majority of the U.S. Senate currently supports gun control. Now, Chuck Schumer is talking about using the same tactics they used to pass Obamacare, to bypass the filibuster. If that happens, gun control will be one of the first items on their radical agenda. I've defeated gun grabs before, and you can rest assured that I will do everything I can to stop this attack on the Constitution. But I'm worried that Congress may soon reach a so-called "compromise" that would lead to guns being taken away from law-abiding Americans. [That's why I urgently need you to stand with me as I fight back against this. Can I count on you to contribute $100, $50, $25, or $10 immediately?](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DN9Uc_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7Dsa2IIv8nyNXV-2BDsR-2Bg0fzVPwX-2BQHNzrU4WmWAy8h6REH4ZfOzkWLbTjS0knSxWcoR-2F3dqy6079fZLFUXbhw53pw5-2BvtybyzSRlNHx2pvCVWLIjoq7hAtW2xpmpzqxdam5F9njMaEzvx6bAbBtIb4qR-2FXPYIlyiiClKQrXV3WoLmL3Bwy1XdBVi1foFTtjMD2zPg-2B5hdpYPJr22FNirEY61arey4fV053NOuHAAiVaWcaMhjllJsiVD0cyJjSYcHQa2w5MQ2u5Vs0qqbdfvAlKFoFYwYLzZuL9mpzlzUDkenNZSZC46vQuRLwoyfz-2FZ-2FImaDzRHZ4EQxExvTfKw9lw-3D-3D) Of course, it is no surprise that Democrats would support measures like "Red Flag laws" that lead to unconstitutional gun grabs. But there are members of my own Republican Party that support these laws too. In fact, a "Red Flag" bill has even been introduced by a Republican member of Congress! And multiple other Republicans in Congress support these unconstitutional measures. The so-called "moderates" in the Democratic Party are even worse on gun control. name: Charlie Kirk
subject: We’re holding school boards accountable
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58183517:6R1oVgl4N:m:1:3253819041:B5D3C1C2337E68A0A0287396154E5FC9:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58183517:6R1oVgl4N:m:1:3253819041:B5D3C1C2337E68A0A0287396154E5FC9:r) Peter, School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organization has been holding them accountable. **_Until now_.** I'm proud to announce the newest initiative of Turning Point USA (TPUSA) -- our **_School Board Watchlist_**. **To help us stand up against Marxist teachers, radical superintendents, and anti-American curricula on behalf of the 50,600,000 students shaped by their school boards ' decisions, I need your immediate support. ** [**My goal is to raise $24,000 by August 31. Will you help me protect students as they begin a new school year -- and put control of their futures back in the hands of parents -- with your gift of $12, $25, $50, $100, or more?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58183517:6R1oVgl4N:m:1:3253819041:B5D3C1C2337E68A0A0287396154E5FC9:r) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58183517:6R1oVgl4N:m:1:3253819041:B5D3C1C2337E68A0A0287396154E5FC9:r) Leftists have taken over the vast majority of school districts in every state -- likely even your district! The 13,500+ school boards across the United States ultimately determine how our children's minds will be shaped ... and whether they learn the truth about America's powerful history, Founding Fathers, and role in the world or whether they embrace the toxic, socialist, America-hating lies of the radical Left. Turn on the nightly news and you'll see the horrors of what K-12 "learning" has become in modern America. As socialism and "woke" culture infiltrate our society, leftist school boards across the country are:
* **adopting Critical Race Theory (CRT) curriculum** , ensuring students are indoctrinated with this dangerous Marxist vision of race;
* requiring teachers participate in **discriminatory professional development disguised as "diversity training"** and putting Leftist ideology before education;
* **renaming schools because of their "racist" namesakes**, which include national heroes like Abraham Lincoln and George Washington; and
* continuing to **use COVID as an excuse to maintain online learning** , despite extensive evidence that in-person learning poses little to no risk to students -- and knowing that online learning leaves many students underserved.

[**That 's why TPUSA's School Board Watchlist will expose the corrupt and radical decisions school boards are making, and then equip parents and community members with the information they need to demand a better education for their students! But Peter, I need your support to do it.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58183517:6R1oVgl4N:m:1:3253819041:B5D3C1C2337E68A0A0287396154E5FC9:r) Right now, TPUSA is assembling the nation's **FIRST EVER** school district ranking system of any kind, focusing exclusively on school districts' acceptance or rejection of radical Leftist and anti-American curricula, textbooks, and policies. TPUSA's School Board Watchlist will expose: >>> Radical agendas being pushed by the nation's largest school districts >>> Leftist, anti-American, Marxist, and CRT curricula and textbooks >>> Corrupt boards and individuals who pursue anti-American policies >>> And more! We've published all of our findings at **[SchoolBoardWatchlist.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58183518:6R1oVgl4N:m:1:3253819041:B5D3C1C2337E68A0A0287396154E5FC9:r)** ... and we're using our TPUSA megaphones -- online, on campus, and over the airwaves -- to bring national attention to the secretive, disturbing agendas being pushed by Leftist school boards so they can no longer hide in the shadows. [**But to have the biggest possible impact, I 'm asking for your support of $12 or more. Please help us reach our goal of raising $24,000 by August 31.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58183517:6R1oVgl4N:m:1:3253819041:B5D3C1C2337E68A0A0287396154E5FC9:r) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58183517:6R1oVgl4N:m:1:3253819041:B5D3C1C2337E68A0A0287396154E5FC9:r) The time to fight back is right **NOW** -- before it's too late. Thank you for your support to put public education back in the hands of parents and the community, **NOT** politicized school boards. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044 [Unsubscribe](${Gears.unsubscribe\(\)})
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
|
---

| | [**BREAKING: ‘Sen. Tony Vargas running for Congress’**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34597035/302473274/1129282168?refcode=20210824_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ0ZGY1Yy0yMDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c48Lytd2mFXCOzbOu8H4eqoiqGkj5iy0jmNYtTIcFKI=) _via KMTV_ [**_I wanted you to hear this directly from me: I'm running for Congress. We have an unprecedented chance to flip this seat and give Nebraskans the representation they deserve. I’ve set an ambitious goal -- $15,000 in the next 24 hours -- to get my grassroots campaign off the ground. I’ll explain why -- but if you don’t have time to read my whole email, can I count on your $10 before midnight? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34597039/302473283/1129282168?refcode=20210824_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ0ZGY1Yy0yMDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c48Lytd2mFXCOzbOu8H4eqoiqGkj5iy0jmNYtTIcFKI=)
* * *
I've dedicated my life to public service. But this run for Congress is personal.

**[I'm running for my Dad.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34597042/302473286/1129282168?refcode=20210824_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ0ZGY1Yy0yMDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c48Lytd2mFXCOzbOu8H4eqoiqGkj5iy0jmNYtTIcFKI=)**

He passed from COVID-19 in April 2020. I miss him every day.

So I was horrified when my own Congressman voted against critical COVID relief, funding for testing, vaccine distribution, and support for families of COVID victims.

[**_I refuse to let that happen to any other family. But to stand up to Don Bacon, I need your help. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34597044/302473289/1129282168?refcode=20210824_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ0ZGY1Yy0yMDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c48Lytd2mFXCOzbOu8H4eqoiqGkj5iy0jmNYtTIcFKI=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34597050/302473291/1129282168?refcode=20210824_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ0ZGY1Yy0yMDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c48Lytd2mFXCOzbOu8H4eqoiqGkj5iy0jmNYtTIcFKI=)
_The Vargas Family_ **[I'm running for my kids, Ava and Luca.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34597056/302473298/1129282168?refcode=20210824_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ0ZGY1Yy0yMDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c48Lytd2mFXCOzbOu8H4eqoiqGkj5iy0jmNYtTIcFKI=)**

My parents worked tirelessly to achieve the American Dream for me and my brothers.

I want nothing more than for my children -- and all our kids -- to have the greatest opportunity.

But Don Bacon is in Congress fighting for cheap political points rather than families like mine.

[**_I know how much you all care for your families. And I know we need a voice in Congress fighting for our kids, not special interests. Can you help me get this campaign off the ground? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34597061/302473304/1129282168?refcode=20210824_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ0ZGY1Yy0yMDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c48Lytd2mFXCOzbOu8H4eqoiqGkj5iy0jmNYtTIcFKI=)

**[And finally, I’m running for people like my students.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34597063/302473308/1129282168?refcode=20210824_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ0ZGY1Yy0yMDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c48Lytd2mFXCOzbOu8H4eqoiqGkj5iy0jmNYtTIcFKI=)**

I was a proud public school teacher and school board member for 8 years.

My students inspired me with their infinite potential.

But Republicans in Congress have abandoned our education system and gutted funding for the public schools we need for our kids to succeed.

[**_I know I can win. But Bacon already has over $420,000 lined up to win his re-election. I need $15,000 in the next 24 hours to get this campaign running immediately and flip this seat for Nebraskans. Can I count on your $10? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34597064/302473310/1129282168?refcode=20210824_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ0ZGY1Yy0yMDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c48Lytd2mFXCOzbOu8H4eqoiqGkj5iy0jmNYtTIcFKI=)

I don't like having to ask you for money.

But I'm running for our families, our kids, and our future. And taking on Don Bacon is going to be a major feat.

So I’m humbly asking you to join this team: [**_Will you chip in $10, or whatever you can, to kick off my campaign and help me win this key race? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34597068/302473314/1129282168?refcode=20210824_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ0ZGY1Yy0yMDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c48Lytd2mFXCOzbOu8H4eqoiqGkj5iy0jmNYtTIcFKI=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34597072/302473317/1129282168?refcode=20210824_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ0ZGY1Yy0yMDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c48Lytd2mFXCOzbOu8H4eqoiqGkj5iy0jmNYtTIcFKI=)

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

name: Andy Blalock for Congress
subject: We need a NEW Congress and Presidential Administration!
body:
**Friends! We are doing great!** I am not a career politician. Rather, I am a hard working rancher, teacher, and patriot who wants to represent the great people of North Alabama, and the patriots who support my campaign nation wide!

Recently, we have traveled throughout every county to meet folks in North Alabama. We have spoken with the [Republican Women of Madison](http://rwmadison.org/), as well as the [Young Republicans of Madison](https://www.alabamayr.com/) and we have attended several rodeo and horse show events to campaign. We are receiving great feedback everywhere we have been. We aren't stopping there! We are adding events to the calendar every day to meet folks across North Alabama. I am honored to meet these great people, and receive their support.

I have also recently attended a group meeting with [UNMASK OUR KIDS](https://www.unmaskalkids.com/) Alabama, followed by a meeting with the school board of Huntsville City Schools. This group is for parent's choice to mask rather than a forced mask mandate. The federal nor the state government should mandate any mask or vaccine. These should 100% be the right of the people to choose.

My mission is to be elected as a United States Congressmen to represent the people in the 5th district of Alabama; to represent conservative patriots throughout the United States, and to work with congress to insure our constitution is upheld and the citizens of the United States have power over government! NOT the other way around!

Since 2020 we have witnessed **OVER AND OVER** what we thought "couldn't get any worse!" The Biden administration is making a disgrace of our great country with our allies while inflation continues in America and jobs are NOT being filled. Meanwhile, CONGRESS and the PRESIDENT sit idly by, even taking a vacation. **WE NEED A NEW CONGRESS!**

* * **ELECTION INTEGRITY!**
* Investigations continue to prove fraudulent activity in Arizona and Georgia, but each time information is discovered a new "crisis" occurs. Congress should act!
* **AFGHANISTAN!**
* President Biden withdrew troops without notifying our allies, or the American people working there, and left millions of dollars in equipment behind. Now we have more troops in Afghanistan than previously deployed! Thousands of citizens are stranded. Congress should act!
* **ENERGY AND INFLATION!**
* Since Biden took office gas prices are more than $1.00 higher per gallon. Inflation of many goods such as lumber, corn, and other necessities have also increased in price. Congress should act!
* **COVID PANDEMIC!**
* The preamble to the constitution states to "insure domestic tranquility" yet COVID is being used as a chess piece in political games to divide the American people and control them for power in politics. Mask and vaccine mandates are dividing the American people.
* In MAINE and OREGON state mandates are being placed to require all emergency personnel are vaccinated and they are already seeing a shortage in these emergency workers. Congress should act!

**ELECT A NEW CONGRESS**
****

I am praying daily for the men and women fighting on our front line, and those stranded in Afghanistan. I am also praying to continue meeting great people across this district and to see my mission successful. I hope you will continue to share my message!

*****Together *****

**WE WILL SEE AMERICA UNITED**

Stand with me friends and patriots. Share my mission with others, and please consider support when you can. This election is expensive and requires much advertising and travel to insure people hear my message and I can be elected.

To contribute please click on the link [HERE](https://secure.anedot.com/andy-blalock-for-congress/donate) or visit [www.andyblalock.org](//www.andyblalock.org)

We have a **FUNDRAISER DINNER** being planned for late September or October. You will receive an email in regards to the date and time. The dinner will be at the Summit at Redstone Arsenal. I hope to see all of you there at the event.

Take care, God Bless you, and God Bless the United States of America

Sincerely,

Andy Blalock

ANDY BLALOCK COMMITTEE
TO ELECT FOR CONGRESS
25055 Airport Road
Athens, AL 35614
931-722-0968
