name: Dudley Brown
subject: I’M GIVING AWAY A TANK!
body:
Some HEAVY METAL -- specifically THIS TANK -- your National Association for Gun Rights is giving away right now! [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c392%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=MunhJ3jX%2fPOwg6PQXwK6lA&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65168%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k9Yl13Gj%2f%2baofvgzrD0ZPA&sysid=1)
Dear Fellow Patriot,

Do you know what you need?

Some **_HEAVY METAL_** \-- specifically **[THIS TANK](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65169%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6e3n5izDl6FlwVKoKh0vrw&sysid=1)** \-- your National Association for Gun Rights is giving away right now!

Ok, it’s not “ _technically_ ” a tank.

It’s a “1959 Daimler Ferret Mk 2/3 Scout Car.”

But it’s armored.

It has a turret with a WORKING belt-fed Browning M1919 (we replaced the fully-auto one with a semi-auto to make it legal).

And believe me, your neighbors are going to think it’s a tank when they see you driving down the street!

_So let’s just call it a tank_.

**[All you have to do is confirm your pledged support by September 15 th, and you’ll be entered to WIN the National Association for Gun Rights’ HEAVY METAL GIVEAWAY](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65160%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xC%2biQyVFQ0Z%2fC1QN4tEI9g&sysid=1)**, which includes:
**>>>_First Prize_** \-- a FN-15 AR-15 Rifle, plus 500 rounds of 5.56 ammo and Axil-GS Extreme hearing protection, so you can stay safe while you’re having a good time at the range;
**>>>_Second Prize_** \-- an M4 Tactical Benelli shotgun, 250 rounds of 00 buckshot, and Axil Trackr earmuffs;
**>>>_Third Prize_** \-- a Beretta M9 9mm handgun, 1000 rounds of 9mm ammo, and Axil Trackr earmuffs.

You’ll also be entered to win our **_Grand Prize_** \-- the 1959 Ferret I told you about.

I’m conducting this special offer because Second Amendment supporters are facing some CRITICAL battles right now, and I need to make sure our priorities line up with yours.

In offering this giveaway, **_I’m hoping to hear back from 100% of our supporters_**.

**[I’m also hopeful patriots like you will consider a generous contribution as well to help the National Association for Gun Rights continue our important work](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65161%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YfxPdvGnjmuhsGlMaaq9PA&sysid=1)**.

I know some people might think giving away a tank like this is outrageous.

But do you know what I think is outrageous?

Everything President Joe Biden -- the most anti-gun President in U.S. history -- is trying to do to our country.

With House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-CA) and Chuck Schumer (D-NY) calling the shots in BOTH houses of Congress, the gun grabbers are doing everything they can to RAM through their entire radical agenda, including:
*** **_The Feinstein Gun Ban_**. Far worse than the expired ban, which was in effect from 1994-2004, this California-style ban would outlaw 200+ specifically named firearms for cosmetic features gun grabbers think look “scary.” As Congressman Eric Swalwell (D-CA) wrote in a _USA Today_ op-ed, “Ban assault weapons, buy them back, go after resisters;”
*** **_Banning magazines that hold more than just a handful of rounds -- along with the firearms that use them_**. Imagine going to jail or facing exorbitant fines because someone found an old $10 magazine you forgot about in a closet;
*** **_NATIONAL GUN REGISTRATION (under the guise of so-called “expanded background checks_ ”)**. The gun grabbers’ dirty secret is that the ONLY way such a scheme could be enforced is for our federal government to maintain 4473 forms to keep track of every gun and gun owner in America. And as you and I know, registration is just the first step toward CONFISCATION!
*** **_SHUTTING DOWN American gun manufacturing overnight_**. Under President Biden’s scheme, firearms manufacturers could face expensive lawsuits if one of their firearms is used in a crime. Just imagine Ford being liable if an F-150 driver ran a red-light and caused a crash! You might as well kiss your favorite American firearm brand goodbye if this becomes law.
To help grease the skids for all of this madness, the Gun Control Lobby is turning the screws on U.S. Senators Joe Manchin (D-WV) and Kyrsten Sinema (D-AZ) to GUT the filibuster.

That’s right. Just TWO Democrat U.S. Senate votes -- and grassroots patriots like you -- could be all that’s stopping ALL of our Second Amendment freedoms from going up in smoke.

**[That’s why I’m counting on you to pledge your support for all of the National Association for Gun Rights’ top priorities as they stand today](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65162%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nXNsaMULY9foOp5YTGW6gw&sysid=1)**.

If you respond by September 15th, you’ll be entered to win our **[HEAVY METAL GIVEAWAY](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65163%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FbXQOd7PWWKmkrJ1f34Y0g&sysid=1)** , including the Ferret tank I told you about.

These relatively light armored vehicles were so respected by national defense forces, 20 countries’ national armies were still using them as recently as 1996! Since then, they’ve become a huge hit with car collectors and collectors of military vehicles.

In fact, well-known gearhead Jay Leno has one.

_You see, unlike tanks, the Ferret rides on run-flat tires instead of tracks and has a top speed of 45 miles per hour_.

So you can drive it on the road while enjoying all the dirty looks you get from the preening pansies in the gun control crowd!

I’m conducting this **[HEAVY METAL GIVEAWAY](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65163%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FbXQOd7PWWKmkrJ1f34Y0g&sysid=1)** because your ongoing support is so important to the National Association for Gun Rights -- _especially with everything that’s at stake throughout the rest of 2021 and all of the battles we still have on our plates_.

I don’t have our anti-gun national media’s megaphone.

I don’t have Michael Bloomberg’s BILLIONS.

But my hope is that I have YOU.

The National Association for Gun Rights’ power comes from good folks like YOU -- _hunters_ , _collectors_ , _hobbyists_ , _target shooters_ , _constitutionalists_ , and _those who carry firearms for self-defense_.

But standing up to the gun grabbers and their schemes depends on good folks like you who will take on the fight -- and who will commit in both words and actions to ensure the flame of liberty is never snuffed out.

**[So please pledge your support for the National Association for Gun Rights’ efforts right away](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65164%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6C%2f%2bTXnSkc%2ff9%2fXmppm99Q&sysid=1)**.

If you do so, you’ll be entered to win any of the three 4 firearms listed previously -- including the Ferret tank -- as part of our **[HEAVY METAL GIVEAWAY](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65163%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FbXQOd7PWWKmkrJ1f34Y0g&sysid=1)**.

But must pledge your support by September 15th to be entered to win.

**With everything on the line in 2021, we must continue to keep up a pro-gun presence everywhere**.

So if you could possibly consider making a generous contribution, I’d really appreciate it.

**[Perhaps in addition to pledging your support and entering to win the HEAVY METAL GIVEAWAY, you could agree to a contribution of $100](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65175%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Jko46q0sLV15V8eyulSKIA&sysid=1)**?

I know that’s a lot to ask for.

But I know you understand the stakes.

With gun grabbers in TOTAL control of Washington, D.C., if we let up the pressure -- even for an instant -- our Second Amendment freedoms could be toast.

**[Of course, if $100 is just too much, please agree to $50, or at least $30](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65176%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aZ8XJbjbizDwgytnZFGBCQ&sysid=1)**.

**[Whatever you decide, please pledge your support by September 15 th to have your name entered to win our HEAVY METAL GIVEAWAY](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65177%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BGuicT%2bB56wze0pOIO%2bTaA&sysid=1)**!

**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Association for Gun Rights**

P.S. With everything that’s at stake in 2021, my hope is you’ll pledge your continued support -- letting me know you support our efforts.

**[If you do so by September 15 th, I’ll automatically enter your name to win ALL the items in our HEAVY METAL GIVEAWAY -- including the Ferret tank you see](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65178%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RYshZ66uF%2fziqASdZ2kvrg&sysid=1)**.

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65170%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a2drFu3ZvCZwvsQrCo2Yng&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65171%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O3hlYECDRFGLRVOFYiZ2pQ&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65172%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fx9GrH%2fp3BlkzM4FWWxW9Q&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65173%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lz994r3NcXI%2btjcAan21nw&sysid=1)

Peter,

---

This is a direct result of Joe Biden’s utter failure to try and lead on the world stage through WEAKNESS.
---
That’s why I’m reaching out to every one of my supporters to get their input at this critical hour... **__How safe do you feel as an American with Joe Biden calling the shots?__**

clean_body: Do you feel safe with Biden in the White House? | Peter, As a Navy SEAL, seeing what’s happened in Afghanistan over the past week has been infuriating. Let me be clear -- under President Trump’s policy of peace through strength, this NEVER would have happened. This is a direct result of Joe Biden’s utter failure to try and lead on the world stage through WEAKNESS. That’s why I’m reaching out to every one of my supporters to get their input at this critical hour... How safe do you feel as an American with Joe Biden calling the shots? Recipient: dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com Submission Status: Pending Deadline: Tonight @ 9:45 P.M. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: I’m assembling an A-Team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress [Click here to unsubscribe
body:
Peter, I’m a proud Florida native, a combat decorated Green Beret, a former Fox News Contributor, and a small business owner.

Serving my country is all I’ve ever really wanted to do. I’m the son and grandson of Navy chiefs, and I want to create the same great great future for my daughter that their hard work and courage created for me.

Today, Congress fails to get enough done because it’s filled with too many career politicians - they haven’t built a business from scratch or fought terrorists on the ground.

We need a new generation of leadership in Washington of servant leaders who lead by example with their values and deliver results, not excuses.

My commitment to you now is the same as it was to my fellow soldiers in combat: **I will serve with everything I have, and I will do it honor and duty.**

But just like in the battlefield on the Middle East, I know that no great challenge can be met alone.

**That’s why I’m assembling an A-Team of patriots to help bring CHANGE to Congress and preserve the freedoms that so many generations have fought for. ** [**JOIN THE A-TEAM **](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=088eb94097a144308a6c6fa28f5d31ea&_e=3sC3yasDv-_Wa3PNZGkNofH3mzT4D3vYau4V6SezXp3YE1-4_l0YQdZFdyCf8Gi679lbyKaS9rie-ORQDkcUnF81EuKbPgmbhxiUoFbRQdFEDyD8Ls9990pREja17LiZtuJ4fmZBeJPd_4sDL7Q9S_cQetM-c6hi8zpGaA7JV6rkCO83B5sOliNyfvy6euUB3ib5XTV_r1WgeUjw8aUQJ4xYo-jXoJK1K99WFWuVAYi9qJH-6c3gJw2Tq_X26pqIcAmVEh5Hlms9bMAi9igRlAvrK3JOUDhfkBniiM5j8u5j7oeef0FxqudO1iXxK_59EUHuMYQ8n-RGQKHkIovx9raGPvoJnUt-N6saQdQOGUhhPvkB_KSA7BwBEG4RpfC9PwCmTRfyzgclMOHnYlZq5Q%3D%3D) Together, we can take on our enemies and continue to make America the greatest nation on earth.
In Service, Col. Mike Waltz
Special Forces Green Beret

| | Derek, we have one week until our end-of-August filing deadline.

And with polls showing a tied race, and the stakes shockingly high here in Virginia, it’s more important than ever that we reach our million dollar fundraising goal.

**_[Can I count on you to do your part by rushing a $25 contribution right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34597673/302475335/-2023814932?refcode=20210824.4_TM_8DH&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjgyYTE3Ni0yMjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X_n6A-moeO8Lk86ZVdPWX7v_aLrloA55ZRzSxw7Nrwg=)_**

DeSantis, and now this new poll proves what we’ve known all along -- that people are hungry for a Florida for All, Gov. DeSantis is vulnerable, and Charlie Crist can win in 2022. However, there’s no way we’ll be able to pull off a win without the full backing of grassroots donors. We see the numbers, and we see our path to victory. There’s no way we’ll get there without your support -- and we need you now. \-- Team Crist \---------- Forwarded Message ---------- From: Charlie Crist for Governor Subject: BREAKING NEW POLL: Charlie Crist leads Ron DeSantis 45% - 44% ST. PETE POLLS: Charlie Crist 45% - Ron DeSantis 44% Derek, We’ll keep this short. According to a brand new poll from St. Pete Polls, Charlie is leading Gov. Ron DeSantis by 1%. But with that kind of razor-thin margin we need to do EVERYTHING we can RIGHT NOW to keep up our momentum. This poll changes everything. According to FloridaPolitics.com, DeSantis’ lead has “evaporated.” But we know that his billionaire backers won’t take this lying down. We need all hands on deck to ensure we have the funds to keep this race competitive. name: #teamMia Volunteers
subject: Have You Voted? Time is Running Out. #7DAYS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2021, FPPC# 1437973
body:
https://tinyurl.com/JoinTeamMia [https://tinyurl.com/JoinTeamMia]Dear Peter,
We are 7 DAYS away from August 31st! That’s right, exactly ONE week out from Election day. That may seem like a lot of time if you still haven’t cast your ballot, but August 31st will be here before you know it. Your vote is your voice, and we want to ensure you have all the resources to make voting as easy and accessible as possible.
The first step is to set aside some time to locate your ballot, fill it out, and ensure you sign where necessary. If your ballot will be dropped off by someone other than yourself, make sure to get their signature as well. Then set aside some time to cast your ballot at a safe and secure dropbox location near you. Click here [https://www.acgov.org/rovapps/maps/ballotdropbox_map.htm?electionid=244] to find your dropbox location and go VOTE!
Voting by mail? No problem, just make sure you request a vote-by-mail ballot here, [https://www.acvote.org/acvote-assets/03_voting/PDFs/permVBMapplication-en.pdf] if you haven’t already gotten one! You can also return your ballot at any certified mailbox, but make sure your ballot is returned and postmarked on or before Election Day! Lastly, encourage your friends and family to set aside a plan to vote and share this message with them!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/dog.jpg]Even dogs are part of #teamMia and are engaging in their civic duty!
Every voter in AD-18 should have access to resources to help them vote, and unfortunately, not every person will see this message, but thankfully #teamMia has programs set up to reach more voters! But we need your help to fund [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OqLUyOFf_UmBEZtk52jZ-w2?emci=cc7bd3d2-07e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=61082b8b-0ce4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=12257991] them. Your donation will bring us one step closer to Sacramento. Help us reach AD-18 and get out the vote by donating [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OqLUyOFf_UmBEZtk52jZ-w2?emci=cc7bd3d2-07e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=61082b8b-0ce4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=12257991] $7, $70, or $700, and it’ll only take a few minutes. Let’s all bring AD-18 closer to having a strong representative in office by voting, donating, or both!
Yours always,
Mia Bonta
*For more information about voting and the upcoming election, please visit https://www.acvote.org/index*
Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2021, FPPC# 1437973
1241 High St, Oakland, CA 94601 | 415-891-9751 | volunteer@miabonta.comhttps://www.facebook.com/miabonta [https://www.facebook.com/miabonta] https://twitter.com/MiaBonta [https://twitter.com/MiaBonta] https://instagram.com/mia.bonta [https://instagram.com/mia.bonta] https://www.linkedin.com/in/mialisabonta/ [https://www.linkedin.com/in/mialisabonta/]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0f0e3d82-0305-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7/f76e98a7-2605-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTk0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzZlOThhNy0yNjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e87kJEKMkPwkO6Ese5UMaiVw9Oz_YKbmvGJ2gY6llfU=&id=125147074 .

name: RIGHTUSA on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: A bright light during dark hours
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58181419:JcqCIgl3N:m:1:3253819041:59140D7328768527D92D33ACC3739D9F:r) Dear Peter,
I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email.
Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work.
You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. __
And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58181419:JcqCIgl3N:m:1:3253819041:59140D7328768527D92D33ACC3739D9F:r)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled.
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because...
...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course.
Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58181419:JcqCIgl3N:m:1:3253819041:59140D7328768527D92D33ACC3739D9F:r)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58181419:JcqCIgl3N:m:1:3253819041:59140D7328768527D92D33ACC3739D9F:r) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club.
We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58181419:JcqCIgl3N:m:1:3253819041:59140D7328768527D92D33ACC3739D9F:r)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long.
Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58181419:JcqCIgl3N:m:1:3253819041:59140D7328768527D92D33ACC3739D9F:r)
Warm regards,
Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system March 29, 2021.

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: An update from Powered by People
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

The 2022 election may be over a year away, but the fight for voting rights
can’t afford to take a break.

That’s why Beto and Powered by People volunteers have been working
non-stop to register new voters, advocate on behalf of voting rights
legislation, and more!

Just take a look at some of our amazing volunteers doing this good work
from Laredo...

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46790?refcode=ema20210824-150783&t=1001&akid=150783%2E444211%2E4FYUyE ]A Powered by People volunteer standing next to a newly registered voter

To Houston...

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46790?refcode=ema20210824-150783&t=1002&akid=150783%2E444211%2E4FYUyE ]A Powered by People volunteer wearing a mask and holding a clipboard
with voter registration forms

To San Antonio...

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46790?refcode=ema20210824-150783&t=1003&akid=150783%2E444211%2E4FYUyE ]Four masked Powered by People volunteers standing behind a table with
voter registration forms

To Dallas...

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46790?refcode=ema20210824-150783&t=1004&akid=150783%2E444211%2E4FYUyE ]A masked Powered by People volunteer standing next to a person filling
out their voter registration form

To El Paso...

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46790?refcode=ema20210824-150783&t=1005&akid=150783%2E444211%2E4FYUyE ]Beto wearing a mask and baseball hat, helping an unregistered voter
fill out their voter registration form on a clipboard

And all across Texas!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46790?refcode=ema20210824-150783&t=1006&akid=150783%2E444211%2E4FYUyE ]10 Powered by People volunteers standing behind a table, holding
clipboards and voter registration forms.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46790?refcode=ema20210824-150783&t=1007&akid=150783%2E444211%2E4FYUyE ]Can you make a $3 or more donation today to support
Powered by People's work to protect voting rights, register new voters,
and elect leaders who care about Texans?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46790?refcode=ema20210824-150783&amount=3&t=1026&akid=150783%2E444211%2E4FYUyE ]Contribute $3

Beto
and the Powered by People team have been working hard to expand and
protect the rights of Texans all year. In June, Beto toured Texas to push
the federal government to pass the For the People Act, which would roll
back voter suppression efforts in Texas and across the country. And when
Texas House Democrats broke quorum and flew to Washington, D.C., this team
raised over $730,000 to help them stay the course. Not to mention, the
four-day voting rights march from Georgetown to Austin that Powered by
People helped organize.

It's plain and simple. While Powered by People is trying to build an
inclusive democracy, Texas Republicans are trying to take away Texans’
votes. Defeating bad actors in Texas isn't going to be easy — it will take
a multi-year effort centered around community organizing and voter
registration.

That's why Powered by People is doing the work now, with just over a year
to go until the next statewide election. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46790?refcode=ema20210824-150783&t=1027&akid=150783%2E444211%2E4FYUyE ]We're going to fight for our
democracy with everything we've got. If you're ready to be a part of this
movement, will you make a donation of $3 or more right now?

Thank you for your support,

Powered by People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/46790?refcode=ema20210824-150783&t=1028&akid=150783%2E444211%2E4FYUyE ]Donate »

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1029&akid=150783%2E444211%2E4FYUyE

name: California Mother of the Year
subject: Larry Elder thinks this is OK?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
California gubernatorial candidate says employers should be allowed to ask women if they plan to have children [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34599846/302482154/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyNjUwYzE2LTJhMDUtZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8gdwqAyrYyjpoeA-n6ghrx7eYcxpL5qjiB4p94qmZJU=&emci=22c7a4c5-2305-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b2650c16-2a05-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131) Hi Peter, Hey--Simona Grace here, **California Mother of the Year 2020 **and Founder of Moms in Office. I was humbled and honored last year when [**American Mothers**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34599847/302482155/804087270?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyNjUwYzE2LTJhMDUtZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8gdwqAyrYyjpoeA-n6ghrx7eYcxpL5qjiB4p94qmZJU=&emci=22c7a4c5-2305-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b2650c16-2a05-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131) named me Mother of the Year for the work that I do to champion mothers in my state of California and beyond. In 2018, I was inspired to start an organization to help elect more moms so single moms like me can have better representation. **[I am reaching out to you today to help me and the Moms of California to oppose the September 14 Right Wing Recall. Peter, we need all hands on deck now. Can I count on you to chip in today to make sure we can have the resources we need to reach every voter in California in the final stretch? ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34599848/302482156/949434673?refcode=0824&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyNjUwYzE2LTJhMDUtZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8gdwqAyrYyjpoeA-n6ghrx7eYcxpL5qjiB4p94qmZJU=)** The far-right Republican recall attempt in California is pushed by anti-maskers, anti-vaxxers and some of Donald Trump's biggest supporters. While Republican leadership continues to deny science, Governor Newsom put health and equity at the center of the state's response during a global pandemic. If Republicans succeed, they will replace him with someone who does not listen to science in the midst of a pandemic and a climate crisis in California.**Like Larry Elder, a** **California gubernatorial candidate who says employers should be allowed to ask women if they plan to have children.** **[Peter, can Governor Newsom count on you to help us stop the Republican recall attempt in California? We would not ask if it was not so important, but we rely on small dollar donations from supporters like you to win this fight. Every dollar makes a difference.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34599849/302482157/949434673?refcode=0820&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyNjUwYzE2LTJhMDUtZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8gdwqAyrYyjpoeA-n6ghrx7eYcxpL5qjiB4p94qmZJU=)** clean_body: California gubernatorial candidate says employers should be allowed to ask women if they plan to have children Hi Peter, Hey--Simona Grace here, California Mother of the Year 2020 and Founder of Moms in Office. I was humbled and honored last year when named me Mother of the Year for the work that I do to champion mothers in my state of California and beyond. In 2018, I was inspired to start an organization to help elect more moms so single moms like me can have better representation. = The far-right Republican recall attempt in California is pushed by anti-maskers, anti-vaxxers and some of Donald Trump's biggest supporters. While Republican leadership continues to deny science, Governor Newsom put health and equity at the center of the state's response during a global pandemic. If Republicans succeed, they will replace him with someone who does not listen to science in the midst of a pandemic and a climate crisis in California.Like Larry Elder, a California gubernatorial candidate who says employers should be allowed to ask women if they plan to have children. = = = = = = = This is a time to come together =. Thank you! Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office = Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Hey Peter,

You’ve been hearing a lot from my team recently about the important updates we’ve made to our email program. Some of those updates meant we had to pause our messages for about a week, which has slowed down our fundraising for August. Let me explain why that matters.

Early donations are critical to building a strong foundation for our people-powered campaign -- and oftentimes, the money we raise today can make a bigger impact on the outcome of our race than it would in the final weeks of an election. Plus, your generous support allows me to stay on the road talking with voters and focused on the critical fights ahead. That’s important.

**I can tell you that national Republicans are closely watching our campaign and they would love nothing more than for us to fall short this month, but I don’t want to give them the satisfaction.**

Peter, I'm not sharing this information with you to fool you into donating or to tell you the sky is falling. That's not how I'm running this campaign. But the gap in our fundraising does come at a bad time -- Ron Johnson has started attacking me directly and we’ve got an important fundraising deadline coming up in a few days.

**[So, I’m humbly asking you to consider helping us out with a small donation. Can I count on you to chip in today? Most days, fundraising is the last thing on my mind given how often I'm out on the road meeting with Wisconsinites to talk about the kitchen table issues that matter most to them and their families. But building a winning campaign requires resources.

When we fall behind on the goals we set, it means we have fewer resources to pay for gas to travel the state, and I have to spend less time talking to folks one-on-one about their concerns. I don’t want to cut back on that because it’s just too important.

This grassroots team has always had my back -- from my very first campaign to save the State Treasurer’s office to our race for the U.S. Senate. I’m counting on you to have my back now more than ever.

**[If it makes sense for your budget, please add a donation right here before our end-of-month deadline. It would mean a great deal to me personally if you did.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34600285/302483340/-1936136847?gpsid=50_130_20239&refcode=em21_210824_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_v1&utm_campaign=em21_210824_EOM2_fnd_gq_act__SG_ettx_v1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2EzMTJkOS0yYTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MsK-C-x6sv42K2JeCO3ECSl_KKtBdigTjnz-tw0baYI=)**

clean_body: Hey Peter, You’ve been hearing a lot from my team recently about the important updates we’ve made to our email program. Some of those updates meant we had to pause our messages for about a week, which has slowed down our fundraising for August. Let me explain why that matters. Early donations are critical to building a strong foundation for our people-powered campaign -- and oftentimes, the money we raise today can make a bigger impact on the outcome of our race than it would in the final weeks of an election. Plus, your generous support allows me to stay on the road talking with voters and focused on the critical fights ahead. That’s important. I can tell you that national Republicans are closely watching our campaign and they would love nothing more than for us to fall short this month, but I don’t want to give them the satisfaction. Peter, I'm not sharing this information with you to fool you into donating or to tell you the sky is falling. That's not how I'm running this campaign. But the gap in our fundraising does come at a bad time -- Ron Johnson has started attacking me directly and we’ve got an important fundraising deadline coming up in a few days. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Most days, fundraising is the last thing on my mind given how often I'm out on the road meeting with Wisconsinites to talk about the kitchen table issues that matter most to them and their families. But building a winning campaign requires resources. When we fall behind on the goals we set, it means we have fewer resources to pay for gas to travel the state, and I have to spend less time talking to folks one-on-one about their concerns. I don’t want to cut back on that because it’s just too important. This grassroots team has always had my back -- from my very first campaign to save the State Treasurer’s office to our race for the U.S. Senate. I’m counting on you to have my back now more than ever. = I'm so grateful to have you on this team, Peter -- and I look forward to meeting you out on the road very soon when we get to your neck of the woods. **We can’t give Ron Johnson another term. He’s been a disaster for Wisconsin and a national embarrassment.**

We’re coming up on a critical deadline at the end of the month, and we need to finish strong this last week. **Pitch in $5 or more today to get us to our goal and show that it’s time for Ron Johnson to go.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: I believe in a free America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
We have progress |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=17fd897232&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the State Representative in Arizona who has been leading the charge for Election Integrity since Day one.

**With your continued support and the force of the strongest grassroots movement in a generation, we have made tremendous strides.**

Demonstrating and providing ample evidence that the election was stolen in Arizona and that victory should likely be credited to Donald Trump, a movement has begun that has spread around the country.

With strong efforts in key swing states in Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Georgia, and with a tremendous push to recall Governor Newsom in California, we are on a historic upswing for Conservatism.

And make no mistake, the issue on the ballot is the soul of our nation, the one thing that makes America truly America, the integrity of our elections.

And this is why I am writing you today, in need of your continued support. [I need your help to not only continue the fight for election integrity, but to lock down our elections for good as Secretary of State of Arizona.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=399ad56ae7&e=44b8c466b0)

_We are on a deadline._

Right now, we are spreading the #ProveIt movement like wildfire and we need more campaign materials, literature, staff, and volunteers to fan the flames.

This costs money, and the iron is hot. [For us to reach our end of month goal, we need to raise an additional $27,500 by September first. Can you help us with this goal with a donation today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=879c325084&e=44b8c466b0)

And why do we need to make this push now?

It’s simple. The final results of the Maricopa Audit which I helped spearhead are being released soon. And there is already a wave of Fake News media trying to discredit it – before the results are even released.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=88061f6202&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Newsweek “reports:”

_As Cyber Ninjas prepares to present its findings from a widely criticized audit of the 2020 election results in Arizona's Maricopa County, some Republicans are strongly criticizing the process the Florida-based company followed._

_Trey Grayson, a Republican who served as Kentucky's Secretary of State from 2004 to 2011, dismissed the trustworthiness of the audit in remarks to the Associated Press published on Sunday. "There are too many flaws in the way this review was conducted to trust it," Grayson said._

_Arizona's state Senate Republicans had used biased and inexperienced contractors to carry out the audit, he said, adding that they often used unusual and unreliable methods to conduct the process. Arizona Republicans had also turned to funders who readily promoted conspiracy theories._

**To be clear, the ink has not even dried on final reports yet to be released and major news outlets are trying to discredit them.**

This is because the Fake News knows the results will be catastrophic to their narrative.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c3c60a425e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _And this is where you come in._

There are two main ways to get an idea out there. The first is organically.

**This is what you see with the Fake News. Part of the reason the Democrats were able to steal the election with such reckless abandon is because the propaganda machine of the Fake News spews lies 24/7 brainwashing the public. **

_No one needs to pay them. They are allies of the Left._

Try and imagine a world where the mainstream media reports “Terrible Fraud uncovered in Maricopa County – Evidence is shocking.”

**It’s not going to happen, no matter what the evidence is. You know how biased the Fake News is.**

This brings us to the second way we can get this information out there. _By paying._
Unfortunately, when we have the Leftist dominated mainstream media fighting us and propagandizing against us, getting the REAL NEWS out there costs a premium.

**And the end of the month coincides with a critical media blitz that we will be doing to make sure that EVERYONE knows the results of America’s Audit, no matter how the Fake News Media tries to hide and suppress it.**

[_Please, help us today to reach our end of month fundraising goal, so that we can convert the results of Maricopa’s Audit into real action!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c548ccbaad&e=44b8c466b0)

Folks, I have been writing to you to months, keeping you updated on the life of the Election Integrity movement. I have been writing to you from my heart.

**I believe in a Free America, one where my vote counts. One where the voice of every American is heard and respected.**

_And right now, that America is under attack. There are only two words that can save that America._

**_Election. Integrity._**

**_Period._**

As always, I continue to appreciate your support in this grassroots movement of epic proportions. _[Every donation counts, no matter how big or how small.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d145a6ca93&e=44b8c466b0)_

One day, I envision writing you, saying we’ve won. The Fake News Media can’t lie anymore, the evidence is too great.

**But until that point – it’s you and me versus the establishment, and its Conservatives versus the Media. **

**_And that is why we must stay strong together._**

[_Donate today to join the #ProveIt movement!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4c0747cb07&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=57b1bb8d41&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6e8c7d3714&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=d094f501db) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=d094f501db).
---

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: Biden's Failures in Afghanistan
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EGDJcjfDQTKat4hGoMnK6IYF34pOMGL01YKCKKoC4xmwltEiCxVa5TgQFKDAVCQbtf-1zfBHxDE_o7LiHmzWHkij-SdhetVJYpFQM1ERE3kHcSlJCBXtQMwtdsyR-4pACaoVenCDmj36Cdxpxjo-qFwwZF46oQrUvATR5k50YYSq7xDrmLmsQ0crMeXA9LcE&c=O1g_K7GMGFPTGUXAJB0oE-qudhQIyukgynV0joHXUl25JngnIXXLZw==&ch=UDnPWXFbUljFKDAiSHpMXGA2rG-rx0llc0cqFeNR4TIaxoKiEYjAkw==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
---
| I've said before that we've gone from an America First administration to an America can't be found regime.
And this administration just made that obvious in the worst of ways...
Dozens of generals and Pentagon officials have LIED to the American people about Afghanistan, and the way that President Biden has conducted this withdrawal has been shameful and a disgrace. This will go down as one of the most significant foreign policy failures in our country's history!
---
| | | [HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EGDJcjfDQTKat4hGoMnK6IYF34pOMGL01YKCKKoC4xmwltEiCxVa5TgQFKDAVCQbtf-1zfBHxDE_o7LiHmzWHkij-SdhetVJYpFQM1ERE3kHcSlJCBXtQMwtdsyR-4pACaoVenCDmj36Cdxpxjo-qFwwZF46oQrUvATR5k50YYSq7xDrmLmsQ0crMeXA9LcE&c=O1g_K7GMGFPTGUXAJB0oE-qudhQIyukgynV0joHXUl25JngnIXXLZw==&ch=UDnPWXFbUljFKDAiSHpMXGA2rG-rx0llc0cqFeNR4TIaxoKiEYjAkw==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EGDJcjfDQTKat4hGoMnK6IYF34pOMGL01YKCKKoC4xmwltEiCxVa5TgQFKDAVCQbtf-1zfBHxDE_o7LiHmzWHkij-SdhetVJYpFQM1ERE3kHcSlJCBXtQMwtdsyR-4pACaoVenCDmj36Cdxpxjo-qFwwZF46oQrUvATR5k50YYSq7xDrmLmsQ0crMeXA9LcE&c=O1g_K7GMGFPTGUXAJB0oE-qudhQIyukgynV0joHXUl25JngnIXXLZw==&ch=UDnPWXFbUljFKDAiSHpMXGA2rG-rx0llc0cqFeNR4TIaxoKiEYjAkw==)
---
| The lack of a clear plan to get American citizens out of the country has foolishly and needlessly put our men and women in the armed services at risk. Joe Biden has shown he's unfit to lead as Commander in Chief!
The cherry on top of this failure is the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs, General Milley, who is obviously more concerned with "Critical Race Theory" and "white rage" than he is with our military's charge...
This is a top-to-bottom failure, and the American people deserve accountability.
Don't let Joe Biden's Afghanistan Crisis go unaccounted for - [demand that there be consequences for the dishonor committed against our service members, the strengthening of the Taliban, and the ABANDONING of our citizens!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EGDJcjfDQTKat4hGoMnK6IYF34pOMGL01YKCKKoC4xmwltEiCxVa5TgQFKDAVCQbtf-1zfBHxDE_o7LiHmzWHkij-SdhetVJYpFQM1ERE3kHcSlJCBXtQMwtdsyR-4pACaoVenCDmj36Cdxpxjo-qFwwZF46oQrUvATR5k50YYSq7xDrmLmsQ0crMeXA9LcE&c=O1g_K7GMGFPTGUXAJB0oE-qudhQIyukgynV0joHXUl25JngnIXXLZw==&ch=UDnPWXFbUljFKDAiSHpMXGA2rG-rx0llc0cqFeNR4TIaxoKiEYjAkw==)
---
| | | [RUSH IN HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EGDJcjfDQTKat4hGoMnK6IYF34pOMGL01YKCKKoC4xmwltEiCxVa5TgQFKDAVCQbtf-1zfBHxDE_o7LiHmzWHkij-SdhetVJYpFQM1ERE3kHcSlJCBXtQMwtdsyR-4pACaoVenCDmj36Cdxpxjo-qFwwZF46oQrUvATR5k50YYSq7xDrmLmsQ0crMeXA9LcE&c=O1g_K7GMGFPTGUXAJB0oE-qudhQIyukgynV0joHXUl25JngnIXXLZw==&ch=UDnPWXFbUljFKDAiSHpMXGA2rG-rx0llc0cqFeNR4TIaxoKiEYjAkw==)
---
| Thank you for joining me,
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EGDJcjfDQTKat4hGoMnK6IYF34pOMGL01YKCKKoC4xmwltEiCxVa5TgQFKDAVCQbtf-1zfBHxDE_o7LiHmzWHkij-SdhetVJYpFQM1ERE3kHcSlJCBXtQMwtdsyR-4pACaoVenCDmj36Cdxpxjo-qFwwZF46oQrUvATR5k50YYSq7xDrmLmsQ0crMeXA9LcE&c=O1g_K7GMGFPTGUXAJB0oE-qudhQIyukgynV0joHXUl25JngnIXXLZw==&ch=UDnPWXFbUljFKDAiSHpMXGA2rG-rx0llc0cqFeNR4TIaxoKiEYjAkw==)

| Kathy Barnette

name: Larry Elder Recall Newsom
subject: Kamala’s recall Hail Marry
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
Kamala Harris is rushing to California this week to campaign for Gavin Newsom and prop him up. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8118faeff8da4a0986c6cb42dc9c75be&_e=P5SF4qTTVJ4BM94mEKfT4HJmfVYKnCMBDKqZJl1jambw-OcToZmw2p8DwH-4pHlLRGaCYAQOxpvA4IjpMETgEkuxXWbTvlnXNqERSQE0eT9HROd0u7Jerpr2Up7rA6Zq50kayBqaLXX3P6koh1tcFvDmoibrcr9w3VehH3zY-aIsu5GxZ8MAai8lAmBmtmrmTzcJwV5EdvXQhozlHHp4DpwPJDfQyLlkhtl4N4AJfBTmSP9ELDIzrsk9LebysrO0i_XoVXE1ynyMaFdTEPBxNt-R3cgTuonqkAHXmJePcf_-a3kEoHkGskZvFOu2MYdMRJxzdpiFgCnGcr5fmFb7eoF3epQLCIJi6GFH5rqCto7l_EXYaQh3pGX0DCUY9bG9)

---
We have a problem, friend.

Even with Biden’s chaos in Afghanistan, **VP Kamala Harris is rushing to California this week to campaign for Gavin Newsom** and prop him up ahead of the recall election.

Harris holds a significant influence on Democrats in the Bay Area who up until now may have been indifferent about the results of the recall election.

We need your help URGENTLY! [**Can you spare $20, $40, $60 or more to help us ensure that Kamala doesn’t sway the outcome of this election?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8118faeff8da4a0986c6cb42dc9c75be&_e=P5SF4qTTVJ4BM94mEKfT4HJmfVYKnCMBDKqZJl1jambw-OcToZmw2p8DwH-4pHlLRGaCYAQOxpvA4IjpMETgEkuxXWbTvlnXNqERSQE0eT9HROd0u7Jerpr2Up7rA6Zq50kayBqaLXX3P6koh1tcFvDmoibrcr9w3VehH3zY-aJBjtWkFXeC764hnNeh5phjoHR3EIFuWBqapjvXPV7q94DfNsQs8WyfMpwiCGttAtpa0dBCB5j0eGwA_CAZKfmk26gcdTSREQo8z4dKmTODAjIsEkW83Y8Mx9f0lZwrOjE8FxzYDmQY905zdB1SMd6nWIm3WyyTH_jIkfSqChx3ShL8mdufDc2gn8SGsQWwJjxEQ3xk2GQv0ouuM1kxwB4F)

The good news is, this “Hail Mary” attempt to protect Newsom **shows just how scared they are that they could lose this recall and another puppet Democrat governor.**

First, they enlisted Elizabeth Warren for their advertising campaign, then President Biden endorsed Newsom in a tweet, and now Kamala Harris is actually coming to California to campaign for Newsom!

_**One would think that the Vice President might have better things to be doing given Pres. Biden’s disaster in Afghanistan**_ – but protecting their radical leftist agenda seems to be much more important to them.

They’re scrambling to protect their puppet governor and we need your help to make sure their last-ditch efforts don’t work.

[**Will you send in $25, $50, $100 or more today to help us make sure that we can turn out every California voter possible to cast a ballot to recall Gavin Newsom?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8118faeff8da4a0986c6cb42dc9c75be&_e=P5SF4qTTVJ4BM94mEKfT4HJmfVYKnCMBDKqZJl1jambw-OcToZmw2p8DwH-4pHlLRGaCYAQOxpvA4IjpMETgEkuxXWbTvlnXNqERSQE0eT9HROd0u7Jerpr2Up7rA6Zq50kayBqaLXX3P6koh1tcFvDmoibrcr9w3VehH3zY-aI_QJQGZOX5uEBWO67xilfBSfO3JHGp4H-Rm2kSmNts2IRM0ynxMrN-yMDYJMbjCoypDk-hkSfOL1HmNVPMEsAgbrXW6ZUhdOm2qfjMWTuOAOAJMBrkeJ23F6LTuke5zmQ9lgGZuKf74x_e3Jt9t3dTRZ99n_9-V4Ai9tPpEII-qEci-ZAo22Ynxt0fJhwCi8jvkuqlbskwEoGL2iMUUk8N)

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8118faeff8da4a0986c6cb42dc9c75be&_e=P5SF4qTTVJ4BM94mEKfT4HJmfVYKnCMBDKqZJl1jambw-OcToZmw2p8DwH-4pHlLRGaCYAQOxpvA4IjpMETgEkuxXWbTvlnXNqERSQE0eT9HROd0u7Jerpr2Up7rA6Zq50kayBqaLXX3P6koh1tcFvDmoibrcr9w3VehH3zY-aJNifVAmUHuW-gOFfkga9_rjWUsAp0Y2spHZobLJAuKIrdPqgpbHqMJz9klUwConP5F-5lCQg9v2NEChFb71GWib4d5DitG2JmUegOA70sfouC2963VDZu2xz2Ko8YwBXKdn_0mxI9lmViXOnthQ0b6VZ1JATCW1i07CsFY2LI0zfbkYlI8Vr3Xyqjg5AKtGLxgkXj_fMyvg67732a1dw-N)
Thank you,

Lou Barnett
Campaign Manager

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: The House just passed the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34602050/302488467/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWI5OTNiZS0zMjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-lp2zQGlYT2gzvR6LOyLsOajvk-ptdTgfadjTBioXis=&emci=0ee7a142-2605-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8eb993be-3205-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend, Today, the U.S. House of Representatives took the momentous step of passing the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act (HR4), a crucial piece of legislation that will protect Americans’ freedom to vote and protect our democracy for all voters. **Now, as we celebrate this victory, we need you to call your Senators at 833-465-7142 to say that the Senate must take immediate action to pass HR4, along with S1, the For the People Act. ** **We applaud Speaker Pelosi and the House of Representatives, and Representatives Sewell, Nadler, Butterfield, and Cohen for making voting rights a top priority. The passage of this landmark legislation was also made possible by the thousands of volunteers and organizers who have worked tirelessly to engage and educate voters—thank you for your dedication and commitment. ** With the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and the For the People Act, Congress has a once-in-a-decade chance to protect voters from partisan gerrymandering, stop voter suppression in its tracks, and ensure voters’ voices are heard. In 2021 alone, over 400 anti-voter bills have been introduced in 49 state legislatures across the country—the need for HR4 and S1 to protect the freedom to vote for all eligible Americans has never been more clear, or more urgent. The John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act would establish processes to prevent states from implementing discriminatory voting rules, and the For the People Act would establish minimum national standards that ensure the freedom to vote is accessible for all eligible Americans. **Together, the For the People Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act are key tools in protecting the freedom to vote across the country—particularly for voters of color. ** Every call you, your friends, or your family members made to your Representative helped ensure that this landmark legislation advanced today. **Take some time to catch your breath and celebrate—and then keep calling your Senators at 833-465-7142.** Thank you for staying in the fight—it continues in the Senate! Thank you for all you do, Team Fair Fight Action
|
---|---|---

|

name: RightUSA on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: History has proven Hillsdale correct
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58181446:61ievglkN:m:1:3253819041:E34AE8690A299AF844BB8F63FBF1D6F4:r) Dear Peter,
For Hillsdale College, independence is invaluable.
Hillsdale refuses to accept a single penny of federal or state funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans.
This independence frees Hillsdale from corrupting and unconstitutional regulations and allows us to remain true to the college's 1844 mission: to provide the kind of education needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."
**The kind of education offered by Hillsdale is rare in American higher education today. There are several reasons for this. Let me mention two important ones.**
One reason is that since the 1960s, Left-wing progressives have increasingly come to dominate American colleges and universities. They have thrown out the old mission statements and restructured their curricula to promote "progressive" ideology.
Another**** contributing factor to the decline of American higher education has been the massive influx of taxpayer funding to colleges and universities--funding that comes with regulatory strings attached.
Going back to the 1950s, when the direct distribution of federal-taxpayer money first became available to colleges, Hillsdale refused to accept such funds.
Since that time, Hillsdale's Board of Trustees has pledged several times to resist any attempts by the government to regulate its internal affairs. Hillsdale was almost alone in seeing the dangers posed by federal funding.
**History has proven Hillsdale 's decision to be correct--and Hillsdale's status as America's leading liberal arts college that reaches and teaches increasing millions of citizens nationwide stands as proof.**
Hillsdale's independence also means that all of the scholarships, grants, and loans that our students need to attend Hillsdale College must be privately funded through the generosity of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
**Indeed, all of Hillsdale 's work is entirely dependent on private support--and as I already mentioned, this work is by no means confined to our Michigan campus. **
Hillsdale **radiates its educational mission nationwide** through its many outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.
Consider our monthly speech digest, _**Imprimis**_. Now in its 49th year, **_Imprimis_** reaches more than 5.7 million households and businesses nationwide.
Hillsdale also produces **online courses** , and **we offer them free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. Over 2.5 million citizens have already enrolled in one or more of these courses, which cover such topics as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics.
Hillsdale also extends its mission into******American K-12 education****.** Our Barney Charter School Initiative has already helped establish******over 20 Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools in over eleven states****.**
**** In addition, Hillsdale provides, free of charge, an **American classical K-12 curriculum********-- including American civics****--** to a growing network of educators and homeschoolers.
**Our effective educational outreach on behalf of liberty has a tremendous impact --and in this time of increasing threats to American liberty, we aim to expand these outreach efforts even further. **
None of this would be possible **without your support**.
That's why I'm asking you to partner with Hillsdale by making a generous donation today.
**Your gift is vital to the continuation and expansion of Hillsdale 's work to promote informed patriotism. **
**You can give safely and securely online here:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/price-of-independence](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58181446:61ievglkN:m:1:3253819041:E34AE8690A299AF844BB8F63FBF1D6F4:r)**
**With your help, Hillsdale will remain a beacon of genuine independence ... and will continue to work tirelessly to preserve America's great heritage of liberty for future generations. **
All of us at Hillsdale College are deeply grateful for your partnership.
Best regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Dear Peter, For Hillsdale College, independence is invaluable. Hillsdale refuses to accept a single penny of federal or state funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This independence frees Hillsdale from corrupting and unconstitutional regulations and allows us to remain true to the college's 1844 mission: to provide the kind of education needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty." The kind of education offered by Hillsdale is rare in American higher education today. There are several reasons for this. Let me mention two important ones. One reason is that since the 1960s, Left-wing progressives have increasingly come to dominate American colleges and universities. They have thrown out the old mission statements and restructured their curricula to promote "progressive" ideology. Another** contributing factor to the decline of American higher education has been the massive influx of taxpayer funding to colleges and universities--funding that comes with regulatory strings attached. Going back to the 1950s, when the direct distribution of federal-taxpayer money first became available to colleges, Hillsdale refused to accept such funds. Since that time, Hillsdale's Board of Trustees has pledged several times to resist any attempts by the government to regulate its internal affairs. Hillsdale was almost alone in seeing the dangers posed by federal funding. History has proven Hillsdale 's decision to be correct--and Hillsdale's status as America's leading liberal arts college that reaches and teaches increasing millions of citizens nationwide stands as proof. Hillsdale's independence also means that all of the scholarships, grants, and loans that our students need to attend Hillsdale College must be privately funded through the generosity of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Indeed, all of Hillsdale 's work is entirely dependent on private support--and as I already mentioned, this work is by no means confined to our Michigan campus. Hillsdale radiates its educational mission nationwide through its many outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Consider our monthly speech digest, Imprimis. Now in its 49th year, Imprimis reaches more than 5.7 million households and businesses nationwide. Hillsdale also produces online courses , and we offer them free of charge to any citizen wishing to learn. Over 2.5 million citizens have already enrolled in one or more of these courses, which cover such topics as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Hillsdale also extends its mission into**American K-12 education. Our Barney Charter School Initiative has already helped establish****over 20 Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools in over eleven states. ** In addition, Hillsdale provides, free of charge, an American classical K-12 curriculum******-- including American civics-- to a growing network of educators and homeschoolers. Our effective educational outreach on behalf of liberty has a tremendous impact --and in this time of increasing threats to American liberty, we aim to expand these outreach efforts even further. None of this would be possible without your support. That's why I'm asking you to partner with Hillsdale by making a generous donation today. Your gift is vital to the continuation and expansion of Hillsdale 's work to promote informed patriotism. You can give safely and securely online here: With your help, Hillsdale will remain a beacon of genuine independence ... and will continue to work tirelessly to preserve America's great heritage of liberty for future generations. All of us at Hillsdale College are deeply grateful for your partnership. Best regards, Larry P. Fellow Conservative,

**I’m not exaggerating when I say Mike Carey’s campaign to secure the OH-15 Special Election for pro-Trump Conservatives on November 2nd is the most important race of 2021.**

This is the last election before the 2022 midterms and if the Democrats succeed in flipping this seat, the Left’s odds of securing the House majority in the midterms increase significantly.

As the Chair of the House Republican Conference, I’m working everyday with House leadership to build our roadmap for retaking the Republican Majority in 2022, _**and we all agree a victory in the OH-15 Special Election is our first step.**_

[**Help us retake the House Majority by making a small contribution to Mike Carey’s campaign for OH-15.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=42959975248c451a992071a23a9f24e6&_e=RXasnbBmcrel2DXnk5Kig4m5QkmFF5VGkN1PI7wnNBaykyeMifeQ1_PBnrjGENcZPXbGlyXXcwsLPSJg2mqm0oyBo-lewwpGgsv2B3HchKVZbicT3jB1GqmQXaI9VdRfHyZI9n4p1Dy4LtTKmAW5v46vgTkrFQFmGFkA0MkqmgiVH3cZXpRGwc3kFTcSac0K1DyFY9sRhkbo_7Ao7YmNgMfg5_KC-CeW1BUgrpjGBUTEtPR8imStAd3TmJj76_remPl8zXF4Z0H_t8h-s2WJng3AvJiLLvvPYrQ28rV0TnXy373cIzz2PiA9n7kfeq-EDEZVG2An6yPP-HL0k6vVRe_qQHbhclXkkKTODET2APo75H-2XddVMk2nh2CTBdr0zsyI1UuESpHc-OSPFfOHtna8DX6wTHKORJow-QMvnlInz-8WzgmFuidk2RRZ0jZtllZVF_IQnbhujm4zKEl1zA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Last week, the US Census Bureau released data from the 2020 Census. That means we're one step closer to finding out what our district lines will look like here in Texas and who we need to communicate with.

**It also means the Texas GOP is one step closer to using their trifecta to rig the districts through gerrymandering to preserve their advantage over Democrats. This time, they're not even trying to hide it:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34603641/302497548/77586780?refcode=em-82421-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWVkNzU3MC0zOTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DWKaHdpHxx1oPNwMDDEAuhqitGjlemEl006nqcDP-Y8=)
It gets worse. For the first time, _the GOP will not have any federal oversight over redistricting._ That's thanks to the 2013 Supreme Court ruling that weakened the Voting Rights Act which required states with a history of discrimination (like Texas) to obtain federal approval before changing election laws.

**My race is the Democrats' best opportunity to help turn out voters in Austin -- one of the most Democratic leaning cities in Texas. This is how we win statewide races, which will help us push back against gerrymandering in the long run and stop Abbott’s right-wing agenda.**

**[We're up against a system that's rigged to weaken the votes of Democrats and underserved communities. clean_body: This is not how democracy is supposed to work. | = Friend, Last week, the US Census Bureau released data from the 2020 Census. That means we're one step closer to finding out what our district lines will look like here in Texas and who we need to communicate with. It also means the Texas GOP is one step closer to using their trifecta to rig the districts through gerrymandering to preserve their advantage over Democrats. This time, they're not even trying to hide it: = It gets worse. For the first time, the GOP will not have any federal oversight over redistricting. That's thanks to the 2013 Supreme Court ruling that weakened the Voting Rights Act which required states with a history of discrimination (like Texas) to obtain federal approval before changing election laws. My race is the Democrats' best opportunity to help turn out voters in Austin -- one of the most Democratic leaning cities in Texas. This is how we win statewide races, which will help us push back against gerrymandering in the long run and stop Abbott’s right-wing agenda. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Historically, when the Democratic party is in power we underperform in midterm elections, but too much is at stake, and we are right on the cusp of a major shift in our state in 2022 Your grassroots support right now means being able to organize early, and build the door-to-door infrastructure which is essential to turning out more Democrats in Austin. = We CAN make the GOP's plot backfire, but it means engaging our community earlier than ever. name: Patty Murray
subject: One thing you can do about voting rights now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
After Democrats flipped both Georgia Senate seats, Republicans in the Georgia legislature enacted a bunch of ridiculous restrictions that will make it harder for Georgians to vote -- all to boost their odds of defeating Senator Raphael Warnock when he’s up for reelection again next year.
#
Peter,
After Democrats flipped both Georgia Senate seats, Republicans in the Georgia legislature enacted a bunch of ridiculous restrictions that will make it harder for Georgians to vote -- all to boost their odds of defeating Senator Raphael Warnock when he’s up for reelection again next year.
It's clear we need to pass federal voting rights protections -- which the House just did today -- to protect voting rights and address Republican attempts in places like Georgia to deny people their fundamental right to participate.
But while I work to do everything I can and use every tool available to take action in the Senate -- including pushing for an exemption to the filibuster -- we also need to make sure Raphael Warnock is as prepared as possible to overcome Georgia’s voting rights restrictions.
**[Can you chip in $5 now to support Raphael Warnock and make sure he has the resources to win reelection?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34603732/302498697/1593777955?refcode=pm_em_210824_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODA4NzJkZi0zOTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sjuj_BzNl8OtMO4xfy8uT3Vj5VCCJGQG3Petk8qOjYI=)**
With a 51-50 Senate majority, you know we can’t afford to lose a single seat in the Senate this cycle.
Senator Warnock is one of our most vulnerable Democratic senators, and Republicans are going to throw every negative attack and obstacle they can in his way. We can’t let them cheat their way to victory by changing the rules and undermining the most fundamental principle of our democracy: the right to vote.
**[Please split a $5 contribution to Raphael Warnock and me right now to protect our Democratic Senate majority against the GOP’s despicable voting rights attacks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34603733/302498698/1593777955?refcode=pm_em_210824_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODA4NzJkZi0zOTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sjuj_BzNl8OtMO4xfy8uT3Vj5VCCJGQG3Petk8qOjYI=)**
Thank you,
Patty

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34603734/302498699/1593777955?refcode=pm_em_210824_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODA4NzJkZi0zOTA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sjuj_BzNl8OtMO4xfy8uT3Vj5VCCJGQG3Petk8qOjYI=)**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

* **An unprecedented border crisis**
* **Record inflation**
* **Unscientific mask mandates**

name: John Cranley
subject: re: climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
I want to make sure you hear about the U.N.’s climate report: | **“A CODE RED for humanity.”** That’s the warning the United Nations Chief issued after a recent report on the consequences of human-caused climate change. Friend, the fact is, we’re out of time. Permanent change to our environment is inevitable — but we can still decide just how bad the future will be. We can stick to the status quo and accept a world where drought is rampant, wildfires are larger, sea-level rise endangers coastal cities, and so much more.**Or, we can take drastic action on a societal level — starting right now — and limit the damage.** Unfortunately, the Republicans in Columbus have passed a law making it harder for clean energy businesses to bring jobs to our state. In Cincinnati, we are doing things differently. We are creating the largest municipal solar project in the country, because it’s good for our environment and good for our economy. As governor, I’ll incentivize green solutions and invest in clean energy jobs. I commit to adding 120,000 new jobs to our economy while prioritizing investments in clean infrastructure — _because we can protect our environment and expand the economy all at once._ **_[If you’re with me, sign onto our petition saying you SUPPORT bringing renewable energy solutions to Ohio>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34604060/302502992/1876347389?contactdata=ldGUdwGC3AZEIzVEQ0zLrhQgzzOfLi0FC8HYrUVE64S6cPBI5mCmMRinPeLenFZ7OJk3bURBMtgPa7khIvRS9omGMF3bP0Z1OYK8IgffhZwMF2g1wfO1QuMlKAbi504igIqEqhzcEl5Km8wltFXLbg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODc3Y2E5Yy0zYjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hw8MxZzohykmG0mgyYUCpfKj8ZNsWqeLNAP61vdOcRQ=&emci=57d920f5-3905-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1877ca9c-3b05-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=22604289)_** **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34604061/302502993/1876347389?contactdata=ldGUdwGC3AZEIzVEQ0zLrhQgzzOfLi0FC8HYrUVE64S6cPBI5mCmMRinPeLenFZ7OJk3bURBMtgPa7khIvRS9omGMF3bP0Z1OYK8IgffhZwMF2g1wfO1QuMlKAbi504igIqEqhzcEl5Km8wltFXLbg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODc3Y2E5Yy0zYjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hw8MxZzohykmG0mgyYUCpfKj8ZNsWqeLNAP61vdOcRQ=&emci=57d920f5-3905-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1877ca9c-3b05-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=22604289)** Listen, Ohio’s comeback story _has_ to begin with a commitment to fighting climate change. If we can’t save our planet, nothing else matters. None of us want our children to live in fear of famine or destructive weather events — it’s certainly not the future I hope my son will enjoy. But if we’re going to leave the next generation a planet that will sustain them, we can’t afford to wait any longer. **Our global fight against climate change has to start right now, including here in Ohio.** **_[Add your name to our petition to say you support my plan to grow Ohio’s green energy economy>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34604062/302502994/1876347389?contactdata=ldGUdwGC3AZEIzVEQ0zLrhQgzzOfLi0FC8HYrUVE64S6cPBI5mCmMRinPeLenFZ7OJk3bURBMtgPa7khIvRS9omGMF3bP0Z1OYK8IgffhZwMF2g1wfO1QuMlKAbi504igIqEqhzcEl5Km8wltFXLbg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODc3Y2E5Yy0zYjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hw8MxZzohykmG0mgyYUCpfKj8ZNsWqeLNAP61vdOcRQ=&emci=57d920f5-3905-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1877ca9c-3b05-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=22604289)_** Thank you, John **[Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34604063/302502995/-1406512299?refcode=em_JC_PET_Environment_082421_endbutton&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODc3Y2E5Yy0zYjA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hw8MxZzohykmG0mgyYUCpfKj8ZNsWqeLNAP61vdOcRQ=)**

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

McCarthy picks Trump over his constituents. |

Here we go again, friend.

GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy is once again trying to stonewall *bipartisan* legislation that came out of the Senate. This time, it's the infrastructure deal.

This is a bill the Central Valley desperately needs, but McCarthy is more interested in helping Donald Trump than his own constituents. He's an absolute disaster for our community and our country.

**[If you've heard enough and are ready to unseat McCarthy, chip in a $3 contribution to make sure we meet our weekly fundraising target to defeat him.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34604339/302506631/-686739743?refcode=em-82421-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWNlZDg4ZC0zZDA1LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yBBqAqsSwtHjk8Mmg_0YcKZfOvFQuygjL3_wnLaTnL4=)**

Here's the deal:

I'm sick and tired of seeing our community come dead last -- when it comes to income and job opportunities, environmental quality, and health care. Meanwhile, McCarthy is out in DC jockeying for a leadership role and palling around with Trump.

**15 years he's been in office, and after 15 years nothing seems to change.**

We can't just let McCarthy off the hook, which is why we're doing things differently. Rather than dump money on TV ads, we're making a sincere attempt to organize voters long ignored by McCarthy. We're building a true field outreach infrastructure, because that's what it's going to take to get this done.

**Central Valley voters know that McCarthy has been horrible, but many don't know I'm the viable Democrat running against him. The best way to spread the word is a strong voter communication effort -- that's where you come in:**

**[If just 3 people from your city chipped in $3 right now, we'd hit our $9,141 end-of-week goal INSTANTLY. I know we can do this, but we all have to step up and do it as a team. This time, it's the infrastructure deal. This is a bill the Central Valley desperately needs, but McCarthy is more interested in helping Donald Trump than his own constituents. He's an absolute disaster for our community and our country. = | = Here's the deal: I'm sick and tired of seeing our community come dead last -- when it comes to income and job opportunities, environmental quality, and health care. Meanwhile, McCarthy is out in DC jockeying for a leadership role and palling around with Trump. 15 years he's been in office, and after 15 years nothing seems to change. We can't just let McCarthy off the hook, which is why we're doing things differently. Rather than dump money on TV ads, we're making a sincere attempt to organize voters long ignored by McCarthy. We're building a true field outreach infrastructure, because that's what it's going to take to get this done. Central Valley voters know that McCarthy has been horrible, but many don't know I'm the viable Democrat running against him. The best way to spread the word is a strong voter communication effort -- that's where you come in: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I can't thank you enough for chipping in, Marisa Wood Teacher for Congress = | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. Consider supporting Marisa's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: Marisa Wood for Congress, PO Box 12103, Bakersfield, CA 93389. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Marisa Wood for Congress PO Box 12103 Bakersfield, CA 93389 United States
