name: Carolina Serrano
subject: I’m Latina so I have to be a Democrat?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAROLINA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Democrats want you to believe that people that look like me, and talk like me, can’t believe in America-First values. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=314cf0382b2c43ab880817e3f17bc851&_e=GQPgzms7jIPYAbyRDAgU983t-Ez6S_xVBNDeWCusDU3rO2VTdPAiAIyzwPqsUwOKMaPFAGYz9aFSw2kBESLOI6_1CbUbBPHPsogbhz6Osk_qds6SviyeCG20PWnkKHWsPyBqHGRLT8ufshdDP0WQS8OTNzIoJmvZN3tnjHcfqaXJz6aNYj9ACJI6AHm1w-JNyodRLHL2q5U-t4mVBXwks_dQwu802uJSlT-Q4BwitYs4-hh94_Idqjq5gS6mP938CfxmJG7slS8wMqC-W7h8wg7Sf6yqklLwyLUHe041z4KnslgvXf84XS9hcm3A8jLKysDc66b2xJkaMN9OdTyPkRNLCcER_R4p0noxpAhbuIHYKe0DyA-BKZmsfUALAzAF)

---
Fellow Conservative,

The Radical Left wants to open our borders, implement socialism, and defund the police.

I want to build the wall, protect our freedoms, and defend our communities from the defund police radicals in Washington D.C.

But more on that in a minute. **I’m Carolina Serrano.**

A proud Hispanic Republican and Colombian American who is working to put America FIRST. I grew up splitting a lot of my time between the US and Colombia with my three siblings and parents eventually landing in Nevada which has been home for almost 20 years.

I’m running for Congress in Nevada’s 4th district because I’m tired of seeing what the Radical Left is doing to our beautiful country. After spearheading the Latinos for Trump effort in Nevada, I saw just how many people like me are tired of being used by the Democrats to sell their political narrative that they are doing what’s best for Hispanics.

Democrats want you to believe that people who look like me, and talk like me, can’t believe in America-First values - but I’m here to tell you that I do, and I’m not the only one. The Left doesn’t own the Hispanic vote, and frankly, their radical values don’t align with our pro-freedom way of thinking.

[**Watch more about why I believe in the America-FIRST agenda below:**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=314cf0382b2c43ab880817e3f17bc851&_e=GQPgzms7jIPYAbyRDAgU983t-Ez6S_xVBNDeWCusDU3rO2VTdPAiAIyzwPqsUwOKMaPFAGYz9aFSw2kBESLOI6_1CbUbBPHPsogbhz6Osk_qds6SviyeCG20PWnkKHWsPyBqHGRLT8ufshdDP0WQS8OTNzIoJmvZN3tnjHcfqaVAxiPFZTK64Qv3NmADoXFOEnj-W2mLIVYkmKktp3o3HX6ghsmtezlrbDk9Ln9AU_M2Tho9ZshF_uMljeMwiMLNlOCtP2oBPIeaA3U8E3avj_RVfPRySTVa5Id3VpuPbrpBUSivnAX1MmMNNy7xfnbjmDN3t-Ov5JbqTjl0HB1SFMgmKwcORJ3UIiSRwsgJO2_nWGP-4M38u_--s7tOX9dn)

[ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=314cf0382b2c43ab880817e3f17bc851&_e=GQPgzms7jIPYAbyRDAgU983t-Ez6S_xVBNDeWCusDU3rO2VTdPAiAIyzwPqsUwOKMaPFAGYz9aFSw2kBESLOI6_1CbUbBPHPsogbhz6Osk_qds6SviyeCG20PWnkKHWsPyBqHGRLT8ufshdDP0WQS8OTNzIoJmvZN3tnjHcfqaVprCS2ziYVHd8ZElQSi9E75ER1dYOZ9Q6oeykxbKkfrEY8NhjGUEfu_sHeT6GE2V3EvWzWmg_n6twKAhpzCUh6_Jq6pwQBSvIfzHjH2R-tvSv7j8V5qXShtwyUdqQ4qJDnXfTPqKhTik95ZyE16h8eMZz0x4tVHkrkx97AOVq0H358B--mht1HnF-N0TUBaGm3XcwUDfJUIV7b9KIadvTo)

Democrats want you to believe that building the wall and protecting our communities, is somehow racist... I’d like to see them tell me - a proud Latina woman - that I’m somehow racist.

It’s time to expose the socialist agenda for what it really is. I’ve seen first-hand the horrors of socialism, ripple through Latin America and I want to protect America from this poisonous mentality.

_The Left is coming for our families._

_The Left is coming for our hard-earned paychecks._

_And the Left is coming for our freedom._

I won’t sit idle any longer. Democrats don’t know my name today, but little do they know I’m their worst nightmare. [**Please, join me today and help send a conservative, Latina, America-First woman to Congress today!**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=314cf0382b2c43ab880817e3f17bc851&_e=GQPgzms7jIPYAbyRDAgU983t-Ez6S_xVBNDeWCusDU3rO2VTdPAiAIyzwPqsUwOKMaPFAGYz9aFSw2kBESLOI6_1CbUbBPHPsogbhz6Osk_qds6SviyeCG20PWnkKHWsPyBqHGRLT8ufshdDP0WQS8OTNzIoJmvZN3tnjHcfqaWJkSqXXoMFPGSPfAKC0Vqnk_FzftEeA0zsALgw8SjsHlN41xscqmad44lDhSL9sYCth4wQIWMfZHW7XZfSbXcgVPisoxgjMeTMsxC4Jl4Lsb1UQ4KuLI2hlE3wLNxzuTh0Xk4UuTvrYQYDEf7zELL987LS2iwgl77NxNnaRVsXBRc7ejAWrZ7TKoqOpCsQIfMFf3PCNHfFcAeKzg4rytNe)

[** Send Carolina to Congress ➔ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=314cf0382b2c43ab880817e3f17bc851&_e=GQPgzms7jIPYAbyRDAgU983t-Ez6S_xVBNDeWCusDU3rO2VTdPAiAIyzwPqsUwOKMaPFAGYz9aFSw2kBESLOI6_1CbUbBPHPsogbhz6Osk_qds6SviyeCG20PWnkKHWsPyBqHGRLT8ufshdDP0WQS8OTNzIoJmvZN3tnjHcfqaWBNbN25oEKgbCFMubyw0mhQhgH-p0FnwUIC9Joe54cFZyGEcHgIEhuKt7ppuGNVG9-U_NyhhBKChejp8RHP_olzbUsGy_g8v-eiSry5OMUDfb9CQNxscbU3bZfkdjRK1jb9DWqxj-GysGj1-i9JdlqkneIMbZL717JMAZd6Fffw1ep-pfvoDj1Z45z_vqA-E8YnWkmmnnOjUdgpaKnnLaC)

Por la Libertad,
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=314cf0382b2c43ab880817e3f17bc851&_e=GQPgzms7jIPYAbyRDAgU983t-Ez6S_xVBNDeWCusDU3rO2VTdPAiAIyzwPqsUwOKMaPFAGYz9aFSw2kBESLOI6_1CbUbBPHPsogbhz6Osk_qds6SviyeCG20PWnkKHWsPyBqHGRLT8ufshdDP0WQS8OTNzIoJmvZN3tnjHcfqaUPY2UpUNndAuMBw5i0o6hGLdTBIFrBaVRSPNmr4VYfrhV3bbl_I3IqT17E6vCkl0V9tchmIaUdxATL_Rx1Tx0lTDiOkOL7G3nPxVva6dUOl27h-wNq7zy-BkCQQagBlSCnTVGznsd9288GPCvmymAWeRktvdymLJjFk1B_R1Bi7wFFzplTdfTd8tiwBbm-n5Zp8Ex5oOIji-NK7KHwcKXn)
Carolina Serrano

Republican Candidate for Congress

name: Larry Elder Recall Newsom
subject: ALERT: Kamala propping up Newsom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
Kamala Harris is rushing to California this week to campaign for Gavin Newsom and prop him up. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=542290a159b54238abd85e7d4b33dbc9&_e=_GpsOpe0G1RCBA60ix_hIQ5qzEYZI_TSFBV3WsvcFzen4aukRiUT0gfj3KKfC9bAdHtbvfM77cn4zcoLGiDjz-nNUniAik24obFbwa18lkhrzFWZg-xfBqPDtYoVZ07550X8aE57ii4sbvWtY6CBfJn7w3rjFeejD98Qfg475lTOyCmu8fDhQNWzO_SbNkfNxOsKxteP-hoIQGJEbtjN9I_cYltTIMQiQQXvWtWDZhuxmKMIVmScvYgJIWweXxiQod46nAE2Y3-OGGbrgK0Gr1uZhy6TqKHVrTiwdP3HY5YUFzqHhX_arEbvmY1NQecICf3sUHfausPL_THUfXeCORCWnyaNDYIaLT8pj29CeqwKnXMgh6B4ra9YrbneJmrG)

---
We have a problem, Peter.

Even with Biden’s chaos in Afghanistan, **VP Kamala Harris is rushing to California this week to campaign for Gavin Newsom** and prop him up ahead of the recall election.

Harris holds a significant influence on Democrats in the Bay Area who up until now may have been indifferent about the results of the recall election.

We need your help URGENTLY! [**Can you spare $20, $40, $60 or more to help us ensure that Kamala doesn’t sway the outcome of this election?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=542290a159b54238abd85e7d4b33dbc9&_e=_GpsOpe0G1RCBA60ix_hIQ5qzEYZI_TSFBV3WsvcFzen4aukRiUT0gfj3KKfC9bAdHtbvfM77cn4zcoLGiDjz-nNUniAik24obFbwa18lkhrzFWZg-xfBqPDtYoVZ07550X8aE57ii4sbvWtY6CBfJn7w3rjFeejD98Qfg475lQI2cFdgTerVSCCSHJY9Jv5c00071B-erzR32pLn63vzqXFwSWRpRZIYRM42e5SC2vxJKQTdp4xDk0Hx4B89ofs_5k6C1Ly1l38ePNDr2dqJIiN8aejEIpYiD0x3TkHEcKW1T48bcb9CORUCNBXOn7GF6QsATSgwPyGDmJHOIZKzmx-W1L0Ta6WfnQd95-KmIHcvDp67BM5Fpk8BMUxeLZ8)

The good news is, this “Hail Mary” attempt to protect Newsom **shows just how scared they are that they could lose this recall and another puppet Democrat governor.**

First, they enlisted Elizabeth Warren for their advertising campaign, then President Biden endorsed Newsom in a tweet, and now Kamala Harris is actually coming to California to campaign for Newsom!

_**One would think that the Vice President might have better things to be doing given Pres. Biden’s disaster in Afghanistan**_ – but protecting their radical leftist agenda seems to be much more important to them.

They’re scrambling to protect their puppet governor and we need your help to make sure their last-ditch efforts don’t work.

[**Will you send in $25, $50, $100 or more today to help us make sure that we can turn out every California voter possible to cast a ballot to recall Gavin Newsom?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=542290a159b54238abd85e7d4b33dbc9&_e=_GpsOpe0G1RCBA60ix_hIQ5qzEYZI_TSFBV3WsvcFzen4aukRiUT0gfj3KKfC9bAdHtbvfM77cn4zcoLGiDjz-nNUniAik24obFbwa18lkhrzFWZg-xfBqPDtYoVZ07550X8aE57ii4sbvWtY6CBfJn7w3rjFeejD98Qfg475lSyeS8-cGTOYK-q65MCFsnqTIzPhIKuXFWUmk_E5vs4f92OibuoLEZFy6Gk4edyJjKklC_o5ya7yegT6VRcmGAArjNfPUKvwtrk4n-uaE7-LKckCk5aeZ1_0icvQY7dT9_uGH6gH7_-guWR0_smUz5xmkOCxOMqHVEKY2PKbT60-Yev8jevXB7DAKNuQvjlaDJzdKqA0T7ruVmb0pe-7OmB)

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=542290a159b54238abd85e7d4b33dbc9&_e=_GpsOpe0G1RCBA60ix_hIQ5qzEYZI_TSFBV3WsvcFzen4aukRiUT0gfj3KKfC9bAdHtbvfM77cn4zcoLGiDjz-nNUniAik24obFbwa18lkhrzFWZg-xfBqPDtYoVZ07550X8aE57ii4sbvWtY6CBfJn7w3rjFeejD98Qfg475lTnZyFABxJaZ2l4nrtDjOMYYAvTYIKz8fOk7owYR5ula55c1JFjl89LYUOKZu6N_GQ7f51aNZMNAPiBlTqSzULqijFxc34usMdZZtZKpqAsDb1eEpL2U3wILd_opCbjw-_8vT9bF7vaytvoISbC7QwOcTVnLaW68iW5WdY65NvtH_O-g189d6wpTXuvVKlFKHKVHIytatr-_nsmB2VLUybX)
Thank you,

Lou Barnett
Campaign Manager
Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee

P.S. Voting by mail is happening as you’re reading this, and every minute that goes by without your support is another missed opportunity to help turn out pro-recall votes. [**Please rush your support now and help us overcome the boost Kamala is trying to give to the Left.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=542290a159b54238abd85e7d4b33dbc9&_e=_GpsOpe0G1RCBA60ix_hIQ5qzEYZI_TSFBV3WsvcFzen4aukRiUT0gfj3KKfC9bAdHtbvfM77cn4zcoLGiDjz-nNUniAik24obFbwa18lkhrzFWZg-xfBqPDtYoVZ07550X8aE57ii4sbvWtY6CBfJn7w3rjFeejD98Qfg475lTSFqqmFijk9rLXs0esmcyxnFusUwiCepIOER9lVxgJ3VmeUA23My87sLnxrXttBntvWBOnqi8iVSRo0pd1Lnl3_rhpT1hVBNIlo8wrpZmAjXDFz_LHMjQc0KQJp44bOTouSwyJf1IkR3tB86vSTsahcPn6fF5n1-9Bjw2VRSukSh9Ma_KSXmKpyyr9nnGZgQG6RPC4qknk67tLOZHnk0vw)

Biden’s disaster in Afghanistan – but protecting their radical leftist agenda seems to be much more important to them. They’re scrambling to protect their puppet governor and we need your help to make sure their last-ditch efforts don’t work. Thank you, Lou Barnett Campaign Manager Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee P.S. Voting by mail is happening as you’re reading this, and every minute that goes by without your support is another missed opportunity to help turn out pro-recall votes. | PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM Committee major funding from: Geoff Palmer Saul Fox Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Bruno Amato
subject: [Sign On] Demand Kevin McCarthy do his job by supporting the bipartisan infrastructure bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
Once again, Kevin McCarthy is actively preventing the Central Valley from receiving critical support | | |
---
Folks — Once again, Kevin McCarthy is actively blocking the Central Valley from receiving resources and support. [In a moment, I’ll ask you to sign the petition demanding Kevin McCarthy to actually do this job, but first I want to explain a bit more about why this is so important.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnIXQWPsiYhuxpjd3W6Chu6dD2sashURGqjJGmr-eUJ-q4sE3r48mcL5SvbXyM3ayppF-N0IGtPXFhrIEl142kuQKNbeZS1AxtdJdvsk_EMEHE6KWmOHZ0Y1VciFmDEF_oMjigMAlu1VWJgjPoC9tAN0HyxeaQHdOWfd_tbED4E7GLzaxZ0BoJP7Yks9SrEr0DzBGU1qoCmVEDS0vC4mRxitlxhaWknPTE0r_VsmxCfAAQ_PbBfd0U22Te6gtT_1whViY4S9WKtPiPgTkrWKBvSMZ6CJs1vCHxDa7KQOdkf8Wr9slm3kCLPv-ev80hfG9bX9FmLhXO70mmSGXCPhTJAdv-l2aKzzSClw3QceBXRgI9WVFkhKQsasu_vbS72Be0/3eq/Cr7upAUCS1uglxVHanqUZQ/h0/bRK7v0QnryJb2Z8ZeDql0-ORSGibaE6SU4AWB6K6gnA)
As the House Minority Leader, Kevin McCarthy has the power to make sure Republican members of the House can support the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill — but instead he’s already said he won’t support it. In fact he called it a ‘Socialism Now’ bill. To be candid, folks, that’s pure crap. Here’s just a **preview** of what Kevin McCarthy opposes in this bill:
* Investing in infrastructure to defend against extreme weather events and the larger effects of climate change
* Connecting every person to high speed internet
* Eliminating lead pipelines and delivering clean drinking water to millions of people and 400,000 schools
* Making upgrades in our power infrastructure — something we desperately need in California where our electrical grid is susceptible to the impacts of extreme wildfires

**If that’s socialism then sign me up, folks.** We know that the Central Valley would benefit immensely from the investments made from the bipartisan infrastructure bill and Kevin McCarthy does, too. He'd rather be seen as siding with his far-right backers than actually delivering real support to his district. [Every single minute that Kevin McCarthy opposes this historic legislation and delays on leading Republicans to support it is a minute we are left without the help we need in CA-23. Sign our petition and demand that Kevin McCarthy support the bipartisan infrastructure bill.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnIXQWPsiYhuxpjd3W6Chu6dD2sashURGqjJGmr-eUJ-q4sE3r48mcL5SvbXyM3ayppF-N0IGtPXFhrIEl142kuQKNbeZS1AxtdJdvsk_EMEHE6KWmOHZ0Y1VciFmDEF_prVF2fFkYGJ3SNP6LJOLPGs3ghC7qciICK-RdZ1WlhHY55NzWssGgoMmFGBJbJ7frhps8kXsO6e7K59HKqZ5uxpgsJjO7OHc7VfdBZ0xo0IiiwIMt5R3X3DtCpHK0LnhjWNaph5MZ1DDsVpDwF55w5j2PGIufrLynHxPVWu_i2hnZboC8s2bhKlYt2gZ00EHjzBSBRuXHSabaSdAcQHCiIMd-ntHCNj-Y50fSTqsopOY9B1sJr6SU9iifsmwbiPIQ/3eq/Cr7upAUCS1uglxVHanqUZQ/h1/MyoiNtG0uKmRmw44HzIufBMJE8tWcB6cnhix7Kooy2c) [Sign On »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnIXQWPsiYhuxpjd3W6Chu6dD2sashURGqjJGmr-eUJ-q4sE3r48mcL5SvbXyM3ayppF-N0IGtPXFhrIEl142kuQKNbeZS1AxtdJdvsk_EMEHE6KWmOHZ0Y1VciFmDEF_ofH-EeCGd7H6I_I7PbW51Tf2_FeW4H2TaXBBXC9TYuyV32lwzGoJ85fM3kF3TFarLhcOQ-8DN9prHCKrtYcckMX09FA6ZxWoLJE4dPAe0Lpbm66ON8JZBxXZFQHOxPxYaxFqhuNu2WinawqkA6FkjVlh1cDpE4daT4eL13AntOSEuiKAvjd6IDWuYdAMQLH6xuX6mHW6Ub1tF7ib8HE4QZ0gwNkgMkXoKY8MP4vo9u8YrbjRh_EhKRBZq4Oz9XHA8/3eq/Cr7upAUCS1uglxVHanqUZQ/h2/V0_hYxU-uNQh2clFZuuPv98pBG2Ayf3zHagCqlOm4GI) Kevin McCarthy has no place representing us in Congress if he can’t be bothered to do his job and make sure CA-23 is receiving critical resources that will make our communities safer, stronger, and more resilient. **He’s only interested in accruing more power and being the Speaker of the House — we can't let him get that far.** By saying he refuses to support the bipartisan infrastructure bill, he’s telling us he does not care about what we need right here in the Central Valley. He only cares about his political ambitions. We must stand up and demand better. [Add your name to our petition right now to demand that Kevin McCarthy do his job and get help to the people he represents. clean_body: Once again, Kevin McCarthy is actively preventing the Central Valley from receiving critical support | | | Folks — Once again, Kevin McCarthy is actively blocking the Central Valley from receiving resources and support. As the House Minority Leader, Kevin McCarthy has the power to make sure Republican members of the House can support the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill — but instead he’s already said he won’t support it. In fact he called it a ‘Socialism Now’ bill. To be candid, folks, that’s pure crap. Here’s just a preview of what Kevin McCarthy opposes in this bill: Investing in infrastructure to defend against extreme weather events and the larger effects of climate change Connecting every person to high speed internet Eliminating lead pipelines and delivering clean drinking water to millions of people and 400,000 schools Making upgrades in our power infrastructure — something we desperately need in California where our electrical grid is susceptible to the impacts of extreme wildfires If that’s socialism then sign me up, folks. We know that the Central Valley would benefit immensely from the investments made from the bipartisan infrastructure bill and Kevin McCarthy does, too. He'd rather be seen as siding with his far-right backers than actually delivering real support to his district. Kevin McCarthy has no place representing us in Congress if he can’t be bothered to do his job and make sure CA-23 is receiving critical resources that will make our communities safer, stronger, and more resilient. He’s only interested in accruing more power and being the Speaker of the House — we can't let him get that far. By saying he refuses to support the bipartisan infrastructure bill, he’s telling us he does not care about what we need right here in the Central Valley. He only cares about his political ambitions. We must stand up and demand better. I promise you, folks, my first priority will always be the people I serve. I am running for Congress to work for the people of the Central Valley and to do that, we need to defeat Kevin McCarthy. I know we can do it — together. Let's get it done, Bruno Amato | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress

body:
I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1ef937faa1d940b1a9067132fbf1bebf&_e=Y2RhIY6V1hjmsKHRl_FvjmwkgCiV2rfpJ5STRD8ETww0c2CtEBOI3u0VntysK2diljMihPDVeqFU90Q-b6YTtTRVd20miTvc5BgdMmzAHpEYmLVH1TUDNR6f-2nrSVbwU5UWNFASEdIfwDnW_wYYA5Jm-w7XD9Bb5xZBBu4xE2dvXgfFxnPgTp05tVa9OUt7uzQibDOoRsV0WoTXvSc70RvPL99tZ5-ZzFxkBuV0cLxU4Y-pFLN-rv_zzK1o_nNFAWdSzgo0oObJnHQ-hyi2XwyBw7k6s7EhQLn60Mz1invhe2Vhq10uz_gEcomzognE8aIKrLGbcPklmx2eMAxZYd0y3jaC2L6Gue6jBNZeB37yYOJaO3LlAp9_U72TqfhY55mW7sbCVJz2M9uapIMiE2F_IPhDt0Rt7B1KeIxyyort19d0WdXhxYbfmsWwO3qTQko3V5AGjyRQwoZECXHUZw%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1ef937faa1d940b1a9067132fbf1bebf&_e=Y2RhIY6V1hjmsKHRl_FvjmwkgCiV2rfpJ5STRD8ETww0c2CtEBOI3u0VntysK2diljMihPDVeqFU90Q-b6YTtTRVd20miTvc5BgdMmzAHpEYmLVH1TUDNR6f-2nrSVbwU5UWNFASEdIfwDnW_wYYA5Jm-w7XD9Bb5xZBBu4xE2dvXgfFxnPgTp05tVa9OUt7uzQibDOoRsV0WoTXvSc70RvPL99tZ5-ZzFxkBuV0cLxU4Y-pFLN-rv_zzK1o_nNFAKD3CdYlWgHgf9rjY-AddJkqUkv4X7NSdSt0HVfR9tcr6EvneVV6z152qWay-uvrRih8B14WIs1-9aju1R2I0iA3xvxFzMwFL_9MUVmluqbnHjyoqVVUPTiMrqwlJxUFnzvRIV8CGzpAZR0QMKkRvclZd73Yn4u0CES6nXNDFno5Ng1bUAkLw9Sn5AosqfKq4BZELQCAJj74Dx2onSTIaQ%3D%3D)
I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1ef937faa1d940b1a9067132fbf1bebf&_e=Y2RhIY6V1hjmsKHRl_FvjmwkgCiV2rfpJ5STRD8ETww0c2CtEBOI3u0VntysK2diljMihPDVeqFU90Q-b6YTtTRVd20miTvc5BgdMmzAHpEYmLVH1TUDNR6f-2nrSVbwU5UWNFASEdIfwDnW_wYYA5Jm-w7XD9Bb5xZBBu4xE2dvXgfFxnPgTp05tVa9OUt7uzQibDOoRsV0WoTXvSc70RvPL99tZ5-ZzFxkBuV0cLxU4Y-pFLN-rv_zzK1o_nNFtiStHzPsaZuKxp0D7KU2pGowS2A7zCyKUE9Wa3hdphRtGeP174Zdp7y0NplgIyVKfo30Kix0Qp3oZFdTktQeARgt7WIwCKydtFS7_aLkyDKSOGByDMGD4skCE_didqsYV2_wRW9xPVLzQRvl0KtIF9QMiuIHjzOjPvy0nRNGQ56C1w50Lb74q2xDLeW3jheeV9sTNjY-Aui4hjqrrpg9mA%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1ef937faa1d940b1a9067132fbf1bebf&_e=Y2RhIY6V1hjmsKHRl_FvjmwkgCiV2rfpJ5STRD8ETww0c2CtEBOI3u0VntysK2diljMihPDVeqFU90Q-b6YTtTRVd20miTvc5BgdMmzAHpEYmLVH1TUDNR6f-2nrSVbwU5UWNFASEdIfwDnW_wYYA5Jm-w7XD9Bb5xZBBu4xE2dvXgfFxnPgTp05tVa9OUt7uzQibDOoRsV0WoTXvSc70RvPL99tZ5-ZzFxkBuV0cLxU4Y-pFLN-rv_zzK1o_nNFdB-eRRKaRIVrxMG-ge_aHa3dWn2A0CT-aBmK2WYWqo8Zd0D7Not4g-T-Ih4bWNHaPEnYH2V4Cah6bELKshK4hFbzN5YjZ0Czu1om7-qJJUT0Zq-vAw0JGrJjO6DHFS2wgvkJadk0pY6PJrn4GYyv6sXBl9GSwSITV5Hk5tLW8XJqmM1lbkuALMfXPa39fbbrZ0Wbw26WE8XaC7m9j1iyvA%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1ef937faa1d940b1a9067132fbf1bebf&_e=Y2RhIY6V1hjmsKHRl_FvjmwkgCiV2rfpJ5STRD8ETww0c2CtEBOI3u0VntysK2diljMihPDVeqFU90Q-b6YTtTRVd20miTvc5BgdMmzAHpEYmLVH1TUDNR6f-2nrSVbwU5UWNFASEdIfwDnW_wYYA5Jm-w7XD9Bb5xZBBu4xE2dvXgfFxnPgTp05tVa9OUt7uzQibDOoRsV0WoTXvSc70RvPL99tZ5-ZzFxkBuV0cLxU4Y-pFLN-rv_zzK1o_nNFj8kVoMvhCJ5rJhATDYvcC7J1pcE8s4D88eNgUrTfUWz7ioVbw2iXJf-zbDHDKeZHEkb4OSSHzMJQAARP15zP6VagN6lyCCwLcziQO1xQozfjGtYAxqC5ttUvUuPf2VbT025K65TlGlQuehLaLssDXTYRk0P34yDIBzKQePWYaXCO_GnCIKr1owjugeZc0vxtFHZzFhkViHHDSeUUxz4ymg%3D%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $6 - to mark my sixth anniversary of thwarting a terrorist attack?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1ef937faa1d940b1a9067132fbf1bebf&_e=Y2RhIY6V1hjmsKHRl_FvjmwkgCiV2rfpJ5STRD8ETww0c2CtEBOI3u0VntysK2diljMihPDVeqFU90Q-b6YTtTRVd20miTvc5BgdMmzAHpEYmLVH1TUDNR6f-2nrSVbwU5UWNFASEdIfwDnW_wYYA5Jm-w7XD9Bb5xZBBu4xE2dvXgfFxnPgTp05tVa9OUt7uzQibDOoRsV0WoTXvSc70RvPL99tZ5-ZzFxkBuV0cLxU4Y-pFLN-rv_zzK1o_nNFsQ9Y_PIhUjHSiPvm8hSsd6FELqg66AuH6H7aqamCr2MV8Ss7gWUIMyQXlrjb-CaGUmi7SFB_RV8eqDp2mncD1Mrn0yK07zZ3lKig8ItELvY9RpHk_VCwPrxp--7kwhB934hbL7D6wbhHk2tFofn3t8uEovu3cPRWcsDlo0-nh5ripv3nCdFhsyVAxjhZMpTlsf3ABiFr1UAvKlmFopEaKA%3D%3D)

clean_body: I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Fellow Conservative, Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes... August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist. This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream. Right now, Democrats are... Opening and destroying our borders. They are granting dangerous amnesty that will flood every corner of America. Raising our taxes like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable. Defunding the police, leading to a surge in violent crime Erasing historical figures from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln Teetering on the edge of a dangerous foreign policy crisis These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders. The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.** My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you very much, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

Conservatives are censored on countless platforms, but Twitter is allowing the spokesperson of the Taliban to rant freely. The Taliban are an evil organization that promotes terrorism against America, brutally represses women’s rights, and kills anyone who disagrees with them. If Twitter wants to censor anyone, they should start with the Taliban, not conservatives.

I will not stand for it. Neither should you.
[**PROTECT OUR VOICES**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=19a02f67838843e38a10e20e9a9b7410&_e=Q44k3Hm9Tq2XKX-JGyd7QziJlY5xMWmL_7CbyTeXgTuj0LVFKNPZgWcHthzMGonH8K9PkRu2KpKJxURkr1s6g2w7b1E6ncCpX1gxx8bjP8lfWFuIgwXQSKnMVT4eftzw-sZ5K9oH4ADSzf3eeTeFKbJuCIquy6rHrFLAfrDzR6CKSuwifaDyf4RXMCMZQK46U-kTlFIAdDTOcGt5VwhwtGwrF2tRBEChqME4rTBt1JDMMmbkUD-JpSvc6v_YmoLDdUd-d1UwHPefxKKztdQuowlRyVt_5BW_HPQcLRGpYjjZF8DpLat6cPaVZVPiWyRKH45vYswa7J5VQ1ZYPnrpiswFsjpq08rIvygcX8HxrfUwrhqikBxRRgqhgUzp-1tIRdY6x3JJVqnz1R6yDj75IW28Mwqcs2arL6YHtGSMLIC0Yj5J_umPhRmx-6KTk05GzVlM7FlXgKWu5SA9DVco55mX3mIKvEaqNEfN-EYQ7OQkSxi6mL2QBT5QBdibpm6VmHg_1gOMEU6poh1GqrqDIQ%3D%3D)

Can you chip in to help me demand accountability from Big Tech? If I can’t speak freely I can’t stand up for you. This is unacceptable and it must end.

name: John Castorani
subject: I know this is a lot to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
My team and I really hoping to make a big splash when we announce our 3rd quarter fundraising numbers at the end of September. | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=00e42c668ca941c3b55b121ee47e4e85&_e=SacV828RyNePpLbihU0FZJeeCsMryBANwjerpxPUuoN9Qbf7Y9G80yJLqAwji1dGJzq9cHu_oSU_mX2KNaUcqYpII7jT4nAprW2BD13CUcY_4qg3v7QDWM_PvIw9Yu-qBlCm2W-e3nTyc44FsNzlrb03KvEhTckzpRDJvQfdtMBG0EBHQ7qLFBbAywwsmzcZuenjnDnlgVZJWHQuEAaZ7Q4RhanvSMLXPGDymPRYTsQGMHQDMUJGtyw0c57PEo3j529Sd7-hTuO25UpuLdcJEQQJKU-U0UvUgB2iaZOQOlzARdZxJ7BF1yKi7ydhl0kHQxehpq6rYS21T7IYCu-z9b2zjyINj4wKKPJcN5IK7-_0FeWmPQ1a3l1OsKTUEsWC9abvlIEqM58Tmu-Y9EFWMjFL6yaMbPn7zkZY7lT_4ORTiPW-Kzoo3zrIu3USWXQzUyiIt5vIEMsXg51iiO-_psvE8UFmm3sfPHWdSr0cz10%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

Quick thank you before I cut to the chase of this email. I didn’t have any expectations of raising six figures in campaign contributions when I launched my campaign for Congress back in May.

To say that you’ve blown me away is an understatement.

I sincerely hope you’re in this with me for the long haul, because if you’ve been reading my emails regularly, you’ll know that the district in which I’m running, Virginia’s 7th, is going to play host to one of the most expensive House races in the nation. **I know it’s annoying to ask for money more than 14 months ahead of Election Day, but the truth is that this race could attract more than $10 million in spending.**

_Why?_

**Because the Democrat I’m running against really shouldn’t even hold the office she’s occupying in the first place. Virginia’s 7th district is a Republican district that she won in a less-than-stellar year for Republicans nationwide.**

[**You can help me flip this seat back into our column, effectively flipping the House in one fell swoop. name: TRUMP RETURNS (via DCCC)
subject: 15,000 anti-Trump signatures requested >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you SUPPORT banning Trump from social media platforms?
| | | | [Do you SUPPORT permanently banning Donald Trump from social media platforms?

PETITION RESPONSE : ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-q~)[PENDING](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-q~)[
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

** ****YES >>**** ****NO >>******
](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-q~)
---

We can't believe it.

After the deadly January 6 insurrection, social media platforms **BANNED** Donald Trump for his **lies and conspiracy theories**.

But now we're reading breaking reports that Trump is trying to **FORCE** his way back online with the help of the courts.

Make no mistake: **Trump used his platform to spread lies and undermine trust in our elections --_and even incite a white supremacist insurrection._**
__
And worst of all, we know he could do so again if he 's allowed to return.

**We refuse to sit idly by and let Trump rebuild his online cult.**

So we're asking grassroots Democrats everywhere to rise up and let us know where they stand on this pivotal issue.
[**QUICKLY: Do you SUPPORT permanently banning Donald Trump from social media platforms?**](https://links.e.dccc.)

[** YES >>** **NO >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/4E6Vs3dj-vF~)

Thank you,

Democratic HQ
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45511210&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2NTk4MDc3MAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45511210&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2NTk4MDc3MAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Randy Abreu
subject: We’re very close to creating a Civilian Climate Corps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The U.S. needs a revitalized Civilian Climate Corps. Here’s why:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210824-2372-header&t=1&akid=2372%2E2526796%2Ee4SxkK)
Imagine if we could create a program to employ _a quarter million_ people with dignified jobs to combat the climate crisis.
**What if I told you that we could create that program and make it a reality this year?**
As co-chair of the Unity Task Force on Climate Change, Alexandria and allies proposed the creation of a **Civilian Climate Corps (CCC)**. The CCC would put 1.5 million people on a path to good, union jobs – not just in national parks, but in under-resourced low-income communities, tribal and Indigenous communities, and communities of color as well.
In April of this year, Alexandria joined with Senator Markey to officially introduce CCC legislation, and earlier this month, the creation of the CCC was officially included in the budget reconciliation bill now moving through Congress.
While this is good news,**it is our job to make sure the Civilian Climate Corps is included in the final package and receives bold, robust federal funding.**
We are almost at the finish line. **The CCC is very close to becoming a reality.** With your help, we can get the first Green New Deal law signed at the federal level.
[AOC is leading the charge for a Civilian Climate Corps in the latest budget bill. If you’re able to – will you make a $3 donation to keep AOC in Congress fighting for the CCC and other Green New Deal programs?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210824?refcode=em20210824-2372-P_FND_EXP_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2372_2526796_e4SxkK&akid=2372%2E2526796%2Ee4SxkK)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210824?refcode=em20210824-2372-P_FND_EXP_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2372_2526796_e4SxkK&akid=2372%2E2526796%2Ee4SxkK)**
This is not a pipe dream. We’ve already done this before. The **Civilian Conservation Corps** was one of the major New Deal programs created by Franklin Roosevelt. It employed over three million workers over the course of a decade — building, repairing, and conserving our forests, parks, and natural resources.
Our climate crisis today requires another peaceful, but wartime-scale, mobilization in order to combat the climate crisis.
Corps members will help conserve our public lands and deliver new clean energy to low-income communities, rural communities, and communities experiencing significant environmental harm.
They will help us address the changing climate through various apprenticeship training opportunities and direct-hire programs that put good-paying and union jobs within reach for more Americans. As a result, they will help to protect and expand union organizing for generations to come.
The Climate Corps we are fighting for will guarantee the sovereignty of Indigenous people over their lands and not only serve underserved communities, but recruit people from those communities as well.
[Please chip in $3 today to keep AOC fighting in Congress for a Civilian Climate Corps that puts millions to work combatting the climate crisis. Every dollar makes a tremendous difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210824?refcode=em20210824-2372-P_FND_EXP_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2372_2526796_e4SxkK&akid=2372%2E2526796%2Ee4SxkK)
In solidarity,
Randy Abreu
Policy Director
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210824?refcode=em20210824-2372-P_FND_EXP_GND&t=23&refcode2=2372_2526796_e4SxkK&akid=2372%2E2526796%2Ee4SxkK)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210824-2372-P_FND_EXP_GND&t=24&akid=2372%2E2526796%2Ee4SxkK)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2372%2E2526796%2Ee4SxkK) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2372%2E2526796%2Ee4SxkK) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2372%2E2526796%2Ee4SxkK)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2372%2E2526796%2Ee4SxkK)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2372%2E2526796%2Ee4SxkK)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: It passed. Here’s what’s next:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, big news:
**The House just passed the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, restoring the historic VRA that my friend and hero Rep. Lewis fought so tirelessly for!**
To fully honor his legacy, we must protect the right to vote and end voter suppression in America — _but we can only do that by finally ending the Jim Crow filibuster._
**[If you agree with me that we need to END the filibuster, fight voter suppression, protect the right to vote, and preserve our democracy, can you chip in $3 or more to fuel our fight to end the filibuster before it’s too late?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210824?refcode=em20210824-571&t=20&refcode2=571_420207_QruQvI&akid=571%2E420207%2EQruQvI)**
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210824?refcode=em20210824-571&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=571_420207_QruQvI&akid=571%2E420207%2EQruQvI)**
This historic civil rights legislation will now be stuck in the Senate unless we act. The filibuster has been used countless times to block progress on civil rights and voting rights — and Mitch McConnell even used it to block _simply beginning debate_ on the For the People Act earlier this year.
Both the John Lewis Voting Rights Act _and_ the For the People Act would protect our elections from the kind of extreme voter suppression and gerrymandering that Republican lawmakers are deploying in states across the country. **But the filibuster is standing in the way, and we’re running out of time to stop Republican-controlled state legislatures from passing hundreds of restrictive voter suppression laws.**
That's why I am helping to lead a nationwide push to end the filibuster and pressure the Senate to finally get rid of it — so we can get delivering for the people. [**Chip in $3 or more today to help us turn up the pressure on our fight to end this Jim Crow relic standing in the way of voting rights and our progress.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210824?refcode=em20210824-571&t=22&refcode2=571_420207_QruQvI&akid=571%2E420207%2EQruQvI)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210824-571-footer&t=23&refcode2=571_420207_QruQvI&akid=571%2E420207%2EQruQvI)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=571%2E420207%2EQruQvI)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=571%2E420207%2EQruQvI)
